overview.text_en:
Gather in the morning and, led by a guide, take a walking tour of Rome, the world-famous historic and cultural city. This is the birthplace of the ancient Roman Empire, known as the "Eternal City" for its long history. Visit the Colosseum (exterior) and the Pantheon (exterior) standing on the ruins of the ancient Roman capital, and tour the Spanish Steps and the Trevi Fountain (exterior). Afterwards enjoy free time, then check in at the hotel to rest.
Overnight: Sheraton Roma Hotel or Mantegna Hotel, or an equivalent 4-star hotel
Note: Due to the protection of Rome's ancient buildings, vehicles are prohibited and most areas are pedestrian zones. Since all the attractions in central Rome are within the ancient Roman city, the walking tour of Rome that day covers approximately 5-6 kilometers on foot.
[For some departure dates the order of sightseeing in the itinerary is adjusted, but the content visited is the same and does not affect the overall experience; the specific arrangements are subject to the departure notice and the actual itinerary.]
overview.text_zh:
上午集合，在导游的带领下徒步游览世界著名的历史文化名城罗马，这里是古罗马帝国的发祥地，因历史悠久而被称为“永恒之城“。参观罗马古都遗址上矗立着的斗兽场（外观）、万神殿（外观），游览西班牙广场和特莱维喷泉（外观）。之后自由活动，入住酒店休息。
夜宿：罗马梅第奇喜来登酒店或曼特尼亚酒店 或同等4星级酒店
备注： 由于罗马古城建筑保护，禁止车辆行驶，大多数区域为步行街区，而罗马市区内的所有景点都在古罗马城内，当天徒步参观罗马，步行行程约为5-6公里。
【部分团期行程游览的先后次序有所调整，但游览内容一致，不影响全程体验，具体安排以出团通知书及实际行程为准。】

accommodation.text_en:
Sheraton Roma Hotel or Mantegna Hotel, or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is surrounded by landscaped gardens, a golf course and an outdoor swimming pool. It features cutting-edge architecture and modern interior design, with rooms furnished in either modern or classical decor, all offering views of the garden, pool or golf course. In addition, the hotel has several restaurants serving exquisite international cuisine and traditional Italian dishes; with its tranquil setting, it effortlessly meets your varied needs and makes an ideal choice for relaxing both body and mind.
accommodation.text_zh:
罗马梅第奇喜来登酒店或曼特尼亚酒店 或同等4星级酒店
酒店周围环绕着园景花园，高尔夫球场和室外游泳池，酒店拥有前沿的建筑风格和现代化的室内设计，房间配有现代或古典的装饰家居，客房均享有花园、游泳池或高尔夫球场的景致。此外，酒店设有多个餐厅，为您提供国际风味的精致菜肴和传统的意式美食；酒店环境宁静，轻松满足您的多样需求，都将成为您放松身心的理想之选。

highlights.text_en:
An in-depth visit to Rome, an important cradle of world culture
Search among the ancient ruins that occupy roughly half of the city area for a historical civilization spanning thousands of years. Whether it is the world-famous architectural relics formed by the Imperial Senate, the triumphal arches, the commemorative columns, the Pantheon and the Colosseum, or the numerous exquisite Renaissance buildings and art treasures housed in over a hundred museums, or the many fountains of myriad postures throughout the city represented by the Trevi Fountain, and the vast public works of roads, aqueducts, bridges, squares and public baths—all freeze art in that wonderful moment. Some say "architecture is frozen music," and the architecture of ancient Rome plays a magnificent and timeless movement.
highlights.text_zh:
深度探访世界文化重要发源地罗马
在占据城区面积约一半的古代遗迹中去寻找沉淀了数千年的历史文明。无论是帝国元老院、凯旋门、纪功柱、万神殿和大竞技场等组成世界闻名的建筑遗址，还是上百座博物馆所藏的众多文艺复兴时期的精美建筑和艺术精品，甚至以特莱维喷泉为代表的、姿态万千的城中众多喷泉，还有规模浩大的道路、水道、桥梁、广场、公共浴池等公共建筑，都将艺术凝固在美妙的那一刻，有人说“建筑是流动着的音乐”那古罗马的建筑演奏出的就是一首雄浑隽永的乐章。

attractions.text_en: The spectacular Colosseum, located in the center of Rome, was built by the ancient Romans to please generals and soldiers returning in triumph and to glorify the great Roman Empire. It was a place where slave owners, nobles and free citizens watched beast fights or gladiatorial combat among slaves, and is one of Rome's most famous historical relics. The Colosseum is a masterpiece and marvel of architectural history, renowned worldwide for its immensity, grandeur and magnificence. Although only most of its skeleton remains, its imposing grandeur and majestic momentum still endure.
attractions.text_zh: 位于罗马中心的壮观的斗兽场是古罗马当时为取悦凯旋而归的将领士兵和赞美伟大的古罗马帝国而建造的，是古罗马帝国专供奴隶主、贵族和自由民观看斗兽或奴隶角斗的地方,是罗马较著名的历史遗迹。斗兽场在建筑史上堪称典范的杰作和奇迹，以庞大、雄伟、壮观著称于世。虽只剩下大半个骨架，但其雄伟之气魄、磅礴之气势犹存。

attractions.text_en: The Pantheon is a well-preserved ancient Roman building with a history of over 2,000 years. The artist Raphael, the Roman kings Vittorio Emanuele II and Umberto I, and others are laid to rest here. The Pantheon was built by Agrippa, son-in-law of Augustus, the first emperor of the Roman Empire, to worship the gods of Mount Olympus. It can be called a classic building of the Augustan period and a model of the exquisite architectural techniques of ancient Rome, praised by Michelangelo as "the design of angels."
attractions.text_zh: 万神殿是古罗马保存完好的建筑，距今已有2000多年的历史，艺术家拉斐尔、罗马皇帝维托里奥﹒埃曼努埃尔二世和温布尔一世等长眠于此。万神殿由罗马帝国首任皇帝屋大维的女婿阿戈利巴建造，用以供奉奥林匹亚山上诸神，可谓奥古斯都时期的经典建筑，是古罗马精湛建筑技术的典范，被米开朗基罗赞叹为“天使的设计”。

attractions.text_en: The Piazza di Spagna once appeared in scenes of the film "Roman Holiday" and has become a calling card of Rome known to everyone. Audrey Hepburn's fresh and radiant figure seems to have merged with the Spanish Square and beautiful Rome, becoming a memory that people can never shake off. The Spanish Square itself is not large in area, and the crowds mainly gather near the Spanish Steps. The steps have 138 steps in total and are the widest steps in Europe.
attractions.text_zh: 西班牙广场曾经出现在电影《罗马假日》的场景中，成为了所有人都知道的罗马名片。赫本那清新亮丽的倩影似乎已经与西班牙广场以及美丽的罗马合为一体，成为了人们永远挥之不去的记忆。西班牙台阶整个西班牙广场面积不大，人群主要集中在西班牙台阶附近。整个台阶共138级，是欧洲最宽的台阶。

attractions.name_zh: 特莱维喷泉(许愿池)（外观）
attractions.text_en: Also known as the "Maiden Fountain" or the "Wishing Fountain," it takes as its theme the victorious return of Neptune, the sea god of Roman mythology, and is grand and magnificent in its overall momentum. It is said that if you turn your back to the fountain and toss a coin over your shoulder, and it lands in the water, your dreams will come true.
attractions.text_zh: 又称“少女喷泉”，或者“许愿池”，以罗马神话中海神尼普勒战胜归来为题材，整气势磅礴、大气恢宏。据说背对着喷泉、从肩上投出一枚硬币，如果能投进水中，就能梦想成真。

overview.text_en:
After breakfast, head to Naples/Sorrento and take a ferry to the port of Capri. On the same day, either stroll along the seaside on your own before visiting the Blue Grotto, or take a boat around the island to explore the Blue Grotto on your own, or head into the town of Capri on your own to tour the Gardens of Augustus and overlook the entire bay; afterwards take a ferry back to the Sorrento pier and head to the hotel to check in.
Overnight: Sorrento Coast Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
Note: After landing on Capri, free activity applies and no transportation fees are included. The recommended route is Marina Grande - Capri Old Town - Gardens of Augustus, a one-way mountain road of about 1.3 kilometers passing three important attractions; along the way there are funiculars and taxis, which require additional payment.
The Blue Grotto of Capri is a natural attraction; if there is a high tide, wind and waves, or other factors leading the local marine meteorological authority to declare it closed, it cannot be visited. The Blue Grotto tour fee is not included in the tour package. To avoid misunderstanding, please follow local custom and, in addition to the fee for the Blue Grotto boatmen, pay a tip of 2-5 euros.
overview.text_zh:
早餐后，前往那不勒斯/索伦托乘坐渡船到达卡普里岛港口。当天或自行前往海边漫步后前往蓝洞参观，或自行乘船环岛探秘蓝洞，或自行前往卡普里城中游览奥古斯都花园，俯瞰整个海湾；之后坐渡船返回索伦托码头，前往酒店入住。
夜宿：索伦托海岸酒店或同等4星级酒店
备注：卡布里岛登岛后自由活动，不含任何交通费用，推荐路线为大港 -卡布里古城 - 奥古斯都花园单程路线约1.3公里的山路，途径三个重要景点，沿途有缆车和出租车，需要额外付费。
卡布里的蓝洞属于自然景观，如遇涨潮、风浪或者其他因素当地海洋气象机构宣布关闭，则无法入内游览。蓝洞游览费用不包括在旅游团内，为了避免误会，请根据当地习俗，除了蓝洞人力船工费用外，请支付2-5欧元的小费。

accommodation.text_en:
Sorrento Coast Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is a quality choice for enjoying the sea views of Sorrento, with magnificent views of the Bay of Naples at Sorrento. Surrounded by sea views on three sides, the hotel has a private beach and a private pier, two restaurants of different styles and a fully equipped marine SPA center. It is within walking distance of the lively seaside town center, and the hotel's pier is the mooring point for sea-going yachts.
accommodation.text_zh:
索伦托海岸酒店或同等4星级酒店
酒店位于欣赏索伦托海景的优质选择，拥有壮丽的索伦托那不勒斯海湾的景观，酒店三面环绕海景，拥有私人沙滩和私家码头，两间不同风格的餐厅和一间完整设施的海洋SPA中心，步行可达热闹非凡的海滨小镇中心，酒店码头就是出海游艇的停泊点。

highlights.text_en:
The Blue Wonder of Capri—the "Blue Grotto"
Since ancient Roman times, Capri has been a famous tourist and health resort. On his return journey after the eastern campaigns, Emperor Augustus landed on the island and, captivated by its beautiful scenery and pleasant climate, did not hesitate to exchange the island of Ischia, four times its size, for Capri to use as his own summer retreat. Capri is of limestone terrain, with steep, towering rocks, and among the rocks there are many peculiar caves, the most famous of which is the "Blue Grotto." The Blue Grotto is hailed as one of the seven wonders of the world. The entrance of the Blue Grotto is below the cliff, and the opening is very small, so it can only be entered by small boat. Due to the special structure of the entrance, on the one hand sunlight can enter the cave through the opening, and on the other hand it is reflected up from the water at the bottom of the cave, so the seawater inside the cave is a crystalline blue, mysterious and unfathomable, and even the rocks inside the cave turn blue—hence the name "Blue Grotto." To visit the Blue Grotto you must choose the right moment: first, the weather must be clear; second, you must go at low tide; third, there must be no wind or waves.
highlights.text_zh:
卡普里岛蓝色奇观“蓝洞”
卡普里岛从古罗马时期开始,这里就是著名的旅游疗养胜地，奥古斯都大帝在东方战役结束后的归途中曾在该岛登陆，被这里的优美环境、宜人气候所折服，不惜以4倍的伊斯基亚岛换取卡普里岛，作为自己的避暑之地。卡普里岛属于石灰质地形，岩石峭立，岩石间有许多奇特的岩洞，其中著名的就是“蓝洞”。蓝洞被誉为世界七大奇景之一。蓝洞的洞口在悬崖的下面，洞口很小，只能乘坐小船才能进入。由于洞口的特殊结构，一方面阳光可以从洞口进入洞内，一方面又从洞内水底反射上来，因此洞内的海水一片晶蓝，神秘莫测，连洞内的岩石也变成了蓝色，故称“蓝洞”。参观蓝洞一定要选择时机:一要天气晴朗;二要在退潮的时候去，三要没有风浪。

attractions.text_en:
The Blue Grotto is hailed as one of the seven wonders of the world and is a famous attraction of Capri; many people go to Capri precisely to behold the wonder of the Blue Grotto. You can enter the Blue Grotto by small boat to tour it. Due to the special structure of the entrance, the seawater inside the cave is a crystalline blue. The surface seawater of the Blue Grotto presents a deep, serene blue, while the deeper seawater is sky blue, and the seawater sets off the rocks in the cave so they too are all azure. When the weather is clear, the Blue Grotto is exceptionally beautiful and enchanting.
Note: The Blue Grotto of Capri is a natural attraction; if there is a high tide, wind and waves, or other factors leading the local marine meteorological authority to declare it closed, it cannot be visited. The Blue Grotto tour fee is not included in the tour package. To avoid misunderstanding, please follow local custom and, in addition to the fee for the Blue Grotto boatmen, pay a tip of 2-5 euros.
attractions.text_zh:
蓝洞被誉为世界七大奇景之一，是卡普里著名的景点，很多人去卡普里的目的就是为了一睹蓝洞奇观。可乘小船进入蓝洞游览，由于洞口的特殊结构，使得洞里的海水一片晶蓝。蓝洞表层的海水呈现幽幽的深蓝色，而深层海水却是天蓝色的，海水映衬得洞中的岩石也都一片蔚蓝。天气晴朗的时候，蓝洞分外的美丽和妖娆。
备注：卡布里的蓝洞属于自然景观，如遇涨潮、风浪或者其他因素当地海洋气象机构宣布关闭，则无法入内游览。蓝洞游览费用不包括在旅游团内，为了避免误会，请根据当地习俗，除了蓝洞人力船工费用外，请支付2-5欧元的小费。

attractions.text_en: Capri is located near the southern entrance to the Bay of Naples and belongs to the Campania region of Italy. On the island there are the medieval castle ruins of Barbarossa and Castiglione, as well as the church dedicated to the island's patron saint, San Costanzo. It is one of the famous tourist destinations in southern Italy. The forests, waters, air, sunshine and island villas that the wealthy of the world long for have attracted people from all over the world. Among them, the Blue Grotto is the attraction that everyone who comes to Capri must visit; when the sky is clear and the air bright, sunlight shines into the cave, and every corner of the deep-blue cave is exquisitely beautiful.
attractions.text_zh: 卡普里岛位于那不勒斯湾南部入海口附近，属意大利坎佩尼亚区。岛上有巴巴罗萨和卡斯蒂利奥内两座中世纪城堡遗迹以及供奉该岛守护神圣科斯坦佑的教堂，是意大利南部著名的游览胜地之一。卡普里岛的森林、水域、空气、阳光和令全世界富豪憧憬的岛屿别墅，曾吸引了来自世界各地的人们，其中蓝洞是每一个人来卡普里岛一定会参观的景点，天清气朗时，阳光照射入洞穴，深蓝的洞穴内每一处角落都美不胜收。

attractions.text_en: Located in the town of Capri, the Gardens of Augustus record the ten years of Augustus's life living here. One side of the garden is a sheer cliff, and in the distance is the azure sea. On the left side of the garden is the Lovers' Rock; legend has it that this Lovers' Rock was originally a pair of lovers who, unable to be together, threw themselves into the sea one after another to die for love, and afterwards became this rock leaning intimately together.
attractions.text_zh: 位于卡普里小镇上的奥古斯都花园记录着奥古斯都在这里居住的十年生活。花园一侧是断壁，远处则是碧蓝的海水。在花园的左侧是情人石，相传这情人石原本是相爱的恋人，因无法恋爱纷纷跳入海中殉情，之后就成了这相依相偎的石头。

overview.text_en:
After breakfast, embark on a charming boat cruise day trip to explore the treasures of the Amalfi Coast. Take a boat to Positano to explore the enchanting cliffside village, then take a boat to Amalfi to admire the panorama of the Amalfi Coast town. Afterwards take the boat back and check in at the hotel.
Overnight: Sorrento Coast Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
Note: In the event of extreme weather at sea, out of consideration for guest safety the cruise company will cancel the boat trips to Positano and Amalfi. In that case our agency will arrange a coach tour of Sorrento Old Town that day, and Positano and Amalfi cannot be visited; the boat cruise fee will be refunded to guests.
overview.text_zh:
早餐后，踏上迷人游船一日游，探索阿马尔菲海岸的宝藏。乘船前往波西塔诺，探索迷人的悬崖村庄，然后乘船前往阿马尔菲，欣赏阿马尔菲海岸小镇全景。之后乘船返回，入住酒店。
夜宿：索伦托海岸酒店或同等4星级酒店
备注：如遇海上极端天气情况，出于游客安全考虑，游船公司取消出海游览波西塔诺和阿马尔菲活动，我社将安排当天乘坐大巴车参观索伦托老城，无法参观波西塔诺和阿马尔菲，出海游船费用将退还给游客。

accommodation.text_en:
Sorrento Coast Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is a quality choice for enjoying the sea views of Sorrento, with magnificent views of the Bay of Naples at Sorrento. Surrounded by sea views on three sides, the hotel has a private beach and a private pier, two restaurants of different styles and a fully equipped marine SPA center. It is within walking distance of the lively seaside town center, and the hotel's pier is the mooring point for sea-going yachts.
accommodation.text_zh:
索伦托海岸酒店或同等4星级酒店
酒店位于欣赏索伦托海景的优质选择，拥有壮丽的索伦托那不勒斯海湾的景观，酒店三面环绕海景，拥有私人沙滩和私家码头，两间不同风格的餐厅和一间完整设施的海洋SPA中心，步行可达热闹非凡的海滨小镇中心，酒店码头就是出海游艇的停泊点。

highlights.text_en:
[Paradise on Earth]: The Amalfi Coast
The Amalfi Coast is a World Heritage Site and has also been named by America's National Geographic magazine as one of the 51 beautiful places one must visit in a lifetime. Here there is a winding coastline and spectacular cliffs, with hidden medieval fishing towns, described as "highly dramatic." Here there are ancient medieval towns famous for their unique culture and architecture. Among the popular towns are Amalfi, Positano, Ravello and Maiori. In these towns you can see many ancient churches, castles, bell towers and shrines, buildings whose history can be traced back several centuries, each with its own story.
highlights.text_zh:
【人间天堂】：阿马尔菲海岸
阿马尔菲海岸是一处世界文化遗产，更被美国《国家地理》杂志评为一生中必须去的51个美丽的地方之一。这里有蜿蜒的海岸线和壮观的悬崖峭壁，还隐藏着中世纪渔业小镇，被形容为“高度戏剧性”。这里有着古老的中世纪小镇，这些小镇以其独特的文化和建筑而著名。其中受欢迎的小镇包括阿马尔菲、波西塔诺、拉韦洛和莱马尼。在这些小镇中，你可以看到许多古老的教堂、城堡、钟楼和神殿，这些建筑物的历史可以追溯到几个世纪以前，每个建筑都有着自己的故事。

attractions.text_en: Positano is a small town located along the Amalfi Coast in the Campania region of Italy. The main part of the town backs onto the mountains and faces the sea. One writer described it thus: Positano is a dreamland—when you are there, she is not quite real, but after you leave, she comes vividly to life. The Amalfi Coast is hailed as Europe's most beautiful coast; here the coastline winds and twists, with towering mountains and islands rising majestically on the shore, valleys and headlands interlacing, orchards and wild plants coexisting. In this pristine natural environment there is a rich human history, and scattered among the dense forested mountains are many picturesque little towns, of which the more beautiful one is called Positano.
attractions.text_zh: 波西塔诺是位于意大利坎帕尼亚大区阿马尔菲海岸‎沿岸的一个小镇。城镇主要部份背山面海，一位作家这样形容：波西塔诺是一个梦乡，你在时，她不是很真切，你离开后，她变的栩栩如生。阿马尔菲海岸被誉为欧洲美丽的海滩，这里的海岸线蜿蜒曲折，岸上山岛耸峙巍峨，山谷与海岬交错，果园与野生植物并存，原生态的自然环境中有丰富的人文历史，浓密山林中散落着许多如诗如画的小镇，而其中较漂亮的那一个叫做波西塔诺。

attractions.text_en: It is located on the coast of the Province of Salerno in the Campania region of southern Italy; the small town near the coast is called Amalfi, from which it takes its name. Looking at it as a whole, half of it is the sea and half is sheer cliffs, on which there are winding mountain roads and villas arranged at varying heights.
attractions.text_zh: 它位于意大利南部坎帕尼亚区萨莱诺省沿海，接近海岸的小镇叫阿马尔菲(Amalfi)，由此得名。整体看去，这里一半是大海，一半是绝壁，绝壁上是蜿蜒的盘山公路和错落有致的别墅。

overview.text_en:
After breakfast, head to Pompeii to explore the ruins of the ancient city of Pompeii and learn about the former Pompeian civilization. Afterwards head to Naples to tour Naples Old Town, the Royal Palace of Naples (exterior) and Castel Nuovo (exterior). In the afternoon head to Rome and check in at the hotel.
Overnight: Sheraton Roma Hotel or Mantegna Hotel, or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
早餐后，前往庞贝，探索庞贝古城遗址，了解曾经的庞贝文明。之后前往那不勒斯游览那不勒斯老城，那不勒斯皇宫（外观）、新堡（外观）。下午前往罗马，入住酒店。
夜宿：罗马梅第奇喜来登酒店或曼特尼亚酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Sheraton Roma Hotel or Mantegna Hotel, or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is surrounded by landscaped gardens, a golf course and an outdoor swimming pool. It features cutting-edge architecture and modern interior design, with rooms furnished in either modern or classical decor, all offering views of the garden, pool or golf course. In addition, the hotel has several restaurants serving exquisite international cuisine and traditional Italian dishes; with its tranquil setting, it effortlessly meets your varied needs and makes an ideal choice for relaxing both body and mind.
accommodation.text_zh:
罗马梅第奇喜来登酒店或曼特尼亚酒店 或同等4星级酒店
酒店周围环绕着园景花园，高尔夫球场和室外游泳池，酒店拥有前沿的建筑风格和现代化的室内设计，房间配有现代或古典的装饰家居，客房均享有花园、游泳池或高尔夫球场的景致。此外，酒店设有多个餐厅，为您提供国际风味的精致菜肴和传统的意式美食；酒店环境宁静，轻松满足您的多样需求，都将成为您放松身心的理想之选。

highlights.text_en:
The Ancient City of Pompeii | Asleep for a Thousand Years, Still Brilliant and Glorious When It Awoke
The ancient city of Pompeii is located in the Campania region near Naples in southern Italy. It was once a small fishing village, but because of its proximity to an important Mediterranean port, with convenient transportation and gathering merchants, by the 8th century BC it had already developed into the second-largest city of ancient Rome. However, in 79 BC, with the eruption of Mount Vesuvius, volcanic ash and scorching lava instantly buried the ancient city of Pompeii, and the disaster killed countless living beings overnight. Only after more than a thousand years did the ancient city of Pompeii see the light of day again.
highlights.text_zh:
庞贝古城丨沉睡千年，醒时依旧灿烂辉煌
庞贝古城位于意大利南部那不勒斯市附近的坎帕尼亚大区，曾经是一个小渔村，由于靠近地中海的重要港口，交通便利，商贾云集，在公元前8世纪，就已经发展成了古罗马城的第二大城市。然而在公元前79年，随着维苏威火山的爆发，火山灰与炽热的岩浆瞬间掩埋了庞贝古城，灾难让无数生灵一夜之间丧生。历经一千多年之后，庞贝古城方得重见天日。

attractions.text_en: Located at the eastern end of the ancient city, the amphitheatre was built around the 1st century BC and could hold nearly 20,000 people. It is the oldest of the ancient Roman amphitheatres, more than 40 years older than the Colosseum of Rome. It has three tiers of spectator seating, and the upper tier still retains the pillars that once supported the canopy.
attractions.text_zh: 位于古城东端的露天剧场建立于约公元前1世纪，可容纳近2万人，是古罗马圆形剧场中古老的一个，比罗马的圆形竞技场还要早40余年，这里有三层观众席，上层仍保留着当年支撑顶棚的支柱。

attractions.text_en: The ancient city of Pompeii was once a small-to-medium town backing onto the mountains and facing the sea, destroyed in an instant by the great eruption of Mount Vesuvius to the northwest. The town's streets and houses were buried by volcanic ash, yet the living scenes of the Pompeians from more than two thousand years ago were completely preserved, and later this vast ruin was gradually excavated. In addition to various architectural relics, there are also some shocking casts. The people who perished during the eruption, wrapped in volcanic ash, decayed until only empty shells of their bodies remained; archaeologists injected these empty shells with plaster to make casts, showing the world the tragic state of Pompeii at that time.
attractions.text_zh: 庞贝古城曾是一座背山面海的中小城镇，因西北边的维苏威火山大爆发而毁于一旦。城镇街道、房屋被火山灰掩埋，却完整保留了两千年多前庞贝人的生活场景，后来这座庞大的遗址才被渐渐发掘出来。除各种建筑遗迹外，还有一些触目惊心的铸像。在火山爆发时遇难的人，因被火山灰包裹而身体腐朽得只剩空壳，考古学把这些空壳注入石膏、做成铸像，向世人展示庞贝当时的惨状。

attractions.text_en: This is a historical relic within the ancient city of Pompeii. It was once a temple, but due to its great age only ruined walls remain, though the overall outline of the temple can still be made out.
attractions.text_zh: 这是庞贝古城内的一处历史遗址，这里曾经是一座寺庙，但因为年代久远只剩下残垣断壁了，但寺庙的整体轮廓还是看得出的。

attractions.name_en: The Central Forum of the Temple of Apollo
attractions.text_en: Also called the Public Forum, this was once the political, economic and religious center of old Pompeii. The square basilica in the forum still retains some brick column bases; this was the former court and place of commercial transactions. Opposite the basilica is a Temple of Apollo, whose 48 Corinthian columns are well preserved, along with many exquisite frescoes. On the north side of the forum is a Temple of Jupiter with its back to Mount Vesuvius, from where one can clearly look out at Mount Vesuvius.
attractions.text_zh: 也称公共广场，这里曾经是昔日庞贝的政治、经济、宗教中心，广场上的方形会堂还残留着一些砖砌的圆柱底座，此处是以前的法院与商业交易场所。会堂的对面是一座阿波罗神殿，里面的48根科林斯式圆柱保存完好，还有许多精美的壁画。广场北侧有一座背对着维苏威火山的丘比特神殿，可以清楚的眺望维苏威火山。

attractions.text_en: For most travelers, Naples's sea, food and history are all important reasons to linger and be reluctant to leave. Naples was the most beloved city of the Italian writer Boccaccio; it is the birthplace of the songs "O Sole Mio" and "Torna a Surriento," and also the place where pizza originated. Naples presents a different face in each of the four seasons to travelers from all over the world. Naples is also called "Napoli," which in Italian is "Napoli." Naples is the capital of the Campania region and the Province of Naples, and is also one of the most populous cities in Italy, abundant in lemons and grapes. At the same time, she is an important tourist city of the Mediterranean, known as the "City of Sunshine and Joy." This is a source of inspiration for many artists and musicians, perhaps because of Mount Vesuvius, or perhaps because of Naples's simple antiquity.
attractions.text_zh: 对于大多数旅行者而言，那不勒斯的大海、美食及历史都是让人流连忘返的重要原因。那不勒斯是意大利作家薄伽丘最热爱的城市，这里是歌曲《我的太阳》、《重归苏莲托》的诞生地，也是披萨的起源地。那不勒斯一年四季都呈现出不同的面孔展现给来自世界各地的旅行者。那不勒斯也叫“拿波里”，意大利文是“Napoli”。那不勒斯是坎帕尼亚大区以及那不勒斯省的首府，也是意大利人口最多的城市之一，盛产柠檬和葡萄。同时，她也是地中海重要的旅游城市，被称为“阳光和欢乐之城”。这里是许多艺术家、音乐家的灵感之源，或许是因为维苏威火山(MountVesuvius)，又或许是因为那不勒斯的古朴。

attractions.text_en: Castel Nuovo, also known as the Angevin Castle, was ordered built by the first king of the Kingdom of Naples. Castel Nuovo includes the Civic Museum (Museo Civico) as well as the castle ruins. The museum (mainly displaying paintings) is on the first floor; the sea view can be seen from the second floor, and the ground floor is the Castel Nuovo ruins, with a floor built of transparent glass—travelers with a fear of heights need to take special care, as beneath the glass are the ancient building ruins and human bones. In addition, inside Castel Nuovo there is also a Sala Dei Baroni (literally the Hall of the Barons), whose ceiling architecture is very distinctive.
attractions.text_zh: 新堡，又名安茹城堡，是那不勒斯王国第一位国王下令建立。新堡包括公民博物馆(MuseoCivico)以及城堡遗迹。博物馆(主要展示绘画)位于第一层，第二层可以看到海景，零层则为新堡遗迹，地表为透明玻璃建造，有恐高症的旅行者需要特别注意，玻璃底下则为古建筑遗迹以及人的骸骨。另外，新堡内部还有一个SalaDeiBaroni(直译为男爵的房间)，房间顶端的建筑非常有特色。

attractions.text_en: The Royal Palace of Naples sits in the bustling city center, close to famous attractions such as Castel Nuovo and Castel dell'Ovo, and has spanned four dynasties. Its exterior looks quite ordinary, but if you choose to go inside, you will surely be amazed: this palace is extremely lavish, with an overall color scheme basically of gold, yellow and purple, representing the nobility of royalty. The palace has many, many rooms—the queen's bedchamber, the council hall, the study and so on—and inside there are also many displays of royal items and paintings of the royal nobility. The most noteworthy of all is the throne. Besides the various paintings, this is the most worth seeing place in the palace, and words such as "noble and elegant" cannot simply describe it.
attractions.text_zh: 那不勒斯皇宫身处闹市，临近新堡、蛋堡等知名景点，历经四个朝代，外表看上去十分普通，但是，如果选择入内参观，那么一定会让你大吃一惊，这个皇宫非常奢华，整个色调基本就是金色、黄色、紫色，代表皇室的高贵。皇宫有许许多多的房间，王后的寝宫、议政厅、书房等等，里面还有很多皇室用品的展示和皇室贵族的绘画，最值得一提的就是王座。这个皇宫里面最值得一看的地方，除了各类绘画就是它了，用尊贵典雅这一类词是无法简单形容的。

overview.text_en:
In the morning depart from Rome and head to the ancient town of Pienza for sightseeing, taking free photos along the Cypress Path on the way. Afterwards tour Piazza Pio II of Pienza, Pienza Cathedral (exterior) and other attractions, then set off for Siena to tour Siena Cathedral (exterior), Piazza del Campo, Siena Town Hall (exterior), the Torre del Mangia (exterior) and other attractions.
Overnight: Four Points by Sheraton Siena or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
上午从罗马出发前往皮恩扎古城游览，途中在丝柏树小径自由拍照，之后游览皮恩扎二世广场，皮恩扎大教堂（外观）等景点，出发前往锡耶纳，游览锡耶纳大教堂（外观），田野广场，锡耶纳市政厅（外观），曼吉亚塔楼（外观）等景点。
夜宿：锡耶纳福朋喜来登酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Four Points by Sheraton Siena or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is located on a quiet hilltop, surrounded by olive trees and gardens, with a beautiful setting suitable for getting close to nature. The rooms are laid with comfortable wooden floors, bright in design, with attractive and stylish interior furnishings. The hotel also has an exquisite restaurant serving classic Italian, local and Tuscan cuisine during dinner. The hotel's outdoor pool, fitness center and sauna all provide you with a more relaxing stay.
accommodation.text_zh:
锡耶纳福朋喜来登酒店 或同等4星级酒店
酒店位于安静的山顶，周围环绕着橄榄树和花园，环境优美且适合亲近自然。客房铺设舒适的木质地板，设计明亮，摆设美观的时尚内装，同时酒店配有精致的餐厅，在晚餐时段供应经典的意大利、当地和托斯卡纳美食。酒店的室外泳池、健身中心以及桑拿浴室都为您提供更加放松的入住体验。

highlights.text_en:
The Pastoral Beauty of the Val d'Orcia and the Medieval Ancient Town of Pienza
Close your eyes and you will imagine the classic Tuscan scenery—blue skies and white clouds, rolling hills dotted with rows of cypress trees and grapevines, and finally wheat fields—this is the perfect portrait of the Val d'Orcia. From the walls of the ancient town of Pienza, overlook the scenery of the World Heritage "Val d'Orcia."
highlights.text_zh:
奥尔恰谷田园美景与中世纪古城-皮恩扎
闭上眼睛，你会想象出托斯卡纳的经典景色—蓝天白云，连绵起伏的山丘，点缀着成排的丝柏树和葡萄藤，最后是麦田--这就是Val D'Orcia 的完美写照。从皮恩扎古城的城墙上俯瞰世界遗产-「Val D'orcia奥尔恰山谷」的景致。

attractions.text_en: The winding Cypress Path, a country road lined on both sides with Italian cypresses, with its uniquely shaped curves and neatly arranged cypress trees, has become one of the symbols of Tuscan pastoral scenery. The cypresses on both sides of the road cast dappled shadows under the sunlight, creating a tranquil and poetic atmosphere that has attracted countless photography enthusiasts and tourists to come and take photos.
attractions.text_zh: 蜿蜒曲折丝柏树小径、两旁种满意大利柏树的乡村道路，独特造型的弯道和整齐排列的丝柏树，成为托斯卡纳田园风光的象征之一。道路两侧的柏树在阳光的照射下投下斑驳的影子，营造出一种宁静而诗意的氛围，吸引了无数摄影爱好者和游客前来打卡。

attractions.text_en: Pienza is a small town on the hills of the southern Val d'Orcia in Tuscany. It is the birthplace of Pope Pius II; the Pienza he oversaw rebuilding in 1459 is regarded as a model of the "ideal city," and it is therefore hailed as a "touchstone of Renaissance urban living." Unlike other medieval Italian towns, Pienza's unique feature is that from its city walls one can overlook the scenery of the World Heritage "Val d'Orcia."
attractions.text_zh: 皮恩扎，位于托斯卡尼南部奥尔恰山谷山丘上的小镇，这里是教皇皮乌斯二世的出生地，1459年他主持重建的皮恩扎被视为“理想城市”的典范，因此被誉为“文艺复兴都市生活的试金石”。与其他意大利中世纪小镇不同，皮恩扎独特之处在于可以从城墙上俯瞰世界遗产-「Val D'orcia奥尔恰山谷」的景致。

attractions.text_en: Siena, this medieval ancient city, is filled with masterpieces of artistic masters and classical medieval architecture. As you wander through Siena's ancient, crisscrossing stone-paved alleys and the deep courtyards hidden in various places, you seem to be transported to medieval Europe a thousand years ago, and every detail will bring you surprises. For several centuries this city has maintained its complete classical appearance, as if time had stood still here since the fourteenth century. In addition to its unique scenery and art collections, Siena also maintains a series of traditions, including the cooking and making of desserts. On your trip to Siena, don't forget to taste the local specialties—the almond soft cake ricciarelli, the nut tart panforte, the peppered spiced nut cake pan pepato, the rice pudding budini di riso, the walnut cookie cavallucci, or the walnut wafer copate!
attractions.text_zh: 锡耶纳，这座中世纪古城布满了艺术大师的杰作和中世纪古典建筑，穿梭在锡耶纳古老而纵横交错的石板小巷和隐藏在各处的幽深庭院中，您仿佛置身于千年前的欧洲中世纪，其中的每一处细节都会给您带来惊喜。这座城市在几个世纪以来，一直保持着完整的古典外貌，仿佛时间自十四世纪起便在此停滞。除了它独特的风景和艺术典藏，锡耶纳还保持着一系列的传统，包括甜品的烹饪制作。在您的锡耶纳之行中，别忘了品尝当地的特色- 杏仁软饼ricciarelli、果仁馅饼panforte、胡椒香料果仁糕pan pepato、米饭布丁budini di riso、核桃饼cavallucci、或核桃华夫copate!

attractions.text_en: Piazza del Campo (also called the Shell Square because of its shell-like shape) is the center of the city of Siena and one of the largest existing medieval squares in Europe. Directly facing the square are the Siena Town Hall and the tower; inside the Town Hall is the Civic Museum, which houses many paintings of the Sienese school, including Ambrogio Lorenzetti's "Allegory of Good Government" and "Allegory of Bad Government." The tower's full name is Torre del Mangia; it is the tallest building in Siena and the second-tallest tower in Italy, with a vertical height of 102 meters. Visitors can reach the top via 55 flights of steps for a panoramic view of the beautiful scenery of Siena.
attractions.text_zh: 田野广场(因形似贝壳也叫贝壳广场)是锡耶纳城市的中心，是欧洲现存至大的中世纪广场之一，广场正对面是锡耶纳市政厅和塔楼，市政厅内有市立博物馆，里面藏有锡耶纳学派的众多绘画作品，包括AmbrogioLorenzetti的《好政府寓意》和《坏政府寓意》。塔楼全名为曼贾塔TorrediMangia，它是锡耶纳至高的建筑，也是意大利第二高的塔楼，垂直高度达到102米，游客可以通过55层的阶梯达到顶端，一览锡耶纳城的美景。

overview.text_en:
In the morning head to Pisa to tour the Leaning Tower of Pisa (exterior) and the Piazza dei Miracoli at the historic cultural center of Pisa. Head to tour Cinque Terre, visiting the beautiful fishing villages on the cliffs along the Ligurian coastline; afterwards check in at the hotel.
Overnight: Hilton Florence Metropole or an equivalent 4-star hotel
Note: If Cinque Terre cannot be visited due to bad weather or factors such as a railway company strike, the itinerary will automatically be changed to touring the coastal cities by coach or in another form.
overview.text_zh:
上午前往比萨，游览比萨斜塔（外观）和比萨历史文化中心的奇迹广场。前往游览五渔村，沿利古里亚海岸线，游览悬崖上的美丽渔村；之后入住酒店。
夜宿：佛罗伦萨希尔顿大都会酒店 或同等4星级酒店
备注：如遇恶劣天气或者铁路公司罢工等因素导致无法游览五渔村，行程将自动更改为乘坐大巴车或其它形式游览海岸线城市。

accommodation.text_en:
Hilton Florence Metropole or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The Hilton Florence is a modern hotel offering a Tuscan-style experience, with a superb location giving access to Florence's commercial center and letting you enjoy the bustle of Florence. From the terrace of the hotel's executive lounge you can admire the magnificent views of Florence. Each room is decorated in a warm modern style; the wooden floors and spacious marble bathrooms provide a high degree of comfort.
accommodation.text_zh:
佛罗伦萨希尔顿大都会酒店或同等4星级酒店
佛罗伦萨希尔顿酒店是一家体验托斯卡纳风格的现代化酒店，地理位置优越，可前往佛罗伦萨商业中心，享受佛罗伦萨的繁华。酒店行政酒廊的露台上可欣赏到佛罗伦萨的壮丽景色。每间客房均采用温馨的现代风格装饰；木地板和宽敞的大理石浴室可获得较大的舒适度。

highlights.text_en:
Italy's Beautiful Fishing Villages, a Cliffside Haven of Paradise
Stop at each beautiful fishing village along the long Mediterranean coastline, gazing at the sun-bathed beaches as the waves quietly lap the rocks, the colorful houses drawing nearer from afar. The curiosity to gaze at the beautiful fishing villages reaches its peak the moment you arrive; disembarking from the boat and walking on foot through the alleys of the fishing villages, the closer you get the more delightful the surprises. It is like savoring a five-colored visual feast of fine flavor, slowly tasting each delight within—this scene is so beautiful it stirs the heart.
highlights.text_zh:
意大利美丽的渔村，悬崖上的世外桃源
沿地中海的绵长海岸线在每个美丽渔村停靠，眼看被阳光笼罩的沙滩，海浪静静地拍打着岩石，五彩斑斓的房子由远及近，远眺美丽渔村的好奇心在到达的一刻达到高点，下得船来，徒步行走于渔村的小巷之间，越走近越惊喜。像是细细品味五色美味的视觉盛宴，一点点细品个中滋味，此情此景美好得让人心动。

attractions.text_en: The Leaning Tower of Pisa is the freestanding bell tower of the cathedral of the city of Pisa, Italy, located on the Piazza dei Miracoli to the north of the city of Pisa in the Tuscany province of Italy. It is a world-famous sight and one of the symbols of Italy, selected by UNESCO as a World Heritage Site. Legend has it that in AD 1590, Galileo performed a free-fall experiment on the Leaning Tower of Pisa and overturned Aristotle's view.
attractions.text_zh: 比萨斜塔是意大利比萨城大教堂的独立式钟楼，位于意大利托斯卡纳省比萨城北面的奇迹广场上，是世界著名的景观，也是意大利标志之一，被联合国教育科学文化组织评选为世界遗产。相传在公元1590年，伽利略曾经在比萨斜塔上做了一个自由落体实验，并推翻了亚里士多德的观点。

attractions.text_en: Also known as the Piazza del Duomo, it is a walled area in the center of the city of Pisa in the Tuscany region of Italy, part of which is lawn. The Piazza dei Miracoli is the center of the city of Pisa, and on the square there are four major buildings: the Pisa Cathedral, the Leaning Tower of Pisa (bell tower), the Baptistery of St. John, and the Pisa Camposanto. Around the square the ancient city walls and gates are also preserved. In April 1987, the International Council on Monuments and Sites nominated the Piazza dei Miracoli of the city of Pisa, Italy (including the cathedral, the baptistery, the Leaning Tower of Pisa and the camposanto) as a World Heritage Site.
attractions.text_zh: 又名主教座堂广场，是意大利托斯卡纳大区比萨市中心一片围墙包围的区域，部分为草地。奇迹广场是比萨城的中心，广场上有四大建筑：比萨主教座堂、比萨斜塔（钟楼）、圣乔瓦尼洗礼堂、比萨墓园。广场周围还保留着古代的城墙和城门。1987年4月，国际古迹遗产理事会提名意大利比萨城的奇迹广场（包括大教堂、洗礼堂、比萨斜塔和墓园）为世界遗产。

attractions.text_en: Cinque Terre is located in the coastal area of the Province of La Spezia in the Liguria region of Italy, built along the winding Mediterranean coastline. It is the collective name for the five cliffside villages of Monterosso al Mare, Vernazza, Corniglia, Manarola and Riomaggiore. What makes it special is the hiking trail linking the five villages, built along the coast; it is one of the most beautiful hiking routes in the world, about 15-20 kilometers long and taking around 5 hours—on one side the Mediterranean, on the other the mountains, and ahead the Italian fishing villages—a destination sought after by many hiking enthusiasts. In 1997 it was inscribed on the UNESCO World Cultural Heritage list.
attractions.text_zh: 五渔村位于意大利利古里亚大区(Liguria)拉斯佩齐亚省海沿岸地区，沿着蜿蜒的地中海海岸线而建，是蒙特罗索（Monterosso al Mare）、韦尔纳扎（Vernazza）、科尔尼利亚（Corniglia）、马纳罗拉（Manarola）及里奥马焦雷（Riomaggiore）这五个悬崖边上的村镇的统称。特别的是把五个村庄串起的徒步线路，沿着海岸而建，是世界上美丽的徒步路线，约15-20公里，需5小时左右，一边是地中海，另一边是山脉，而前面则是意大利渔庄，是诸多徒步爱好者趋之若鹜的胜地。1997年被联合国教科文组织列入世界文化遗产名录。

overview.text_en:
After breakfast, visit Florence, the birthplace of the Renaissance, touring the world's third-largest cathedral—the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore (exterior), the Piazza della Signoria, the Old Bridge, as well as the Piazza Santa Croce and the Basilica of Santa Croce (exterior). Afterwards head to Venice and check in at the hotel.
Overnight: voco Venezia or Hilton Garden Inn Venice Mestre, or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
早餐后文艺复兴发源地-佛罗伦萨，参观世界第三大教堂-圣母百花大教堂（外观）、市政广场，老桥以及圣十字广场和圣十字教堂（外观）。之后前往威尼斯入住酒店。
夜宿：威尼斯洲际VOCO酒店或希尔顿大使酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
voco Venezia or Hilton Garden Inn Venice Mestre, or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is one of Venice's newly renovated hotels, with a superb location, stylish modern design, and guest rooms with natural color tones and modern interiors, offering you a comfortable and cozy stay. The hotel provides a hearty breakfast, a well-equipped gym, a lounge bar serving wine and cocktails, and the hotel's Ludico Venice restaurant serves Italian dishes and fine cuisine.
accommodation.text_zh:
威尼斯洲际VOCO酒店或希尔顿大使酒店 或同等4星级酒店
酒店是威尼斯新装修的酒店之一，酒店地理位置优越，拥有时尚的现代设计，客房自然的色调和现代化的内饰，提供给您舒适温馨的入住体验。酒店提供丰盛的早餐，设备齐全的健身房，酒廊酒吧提供葡萄酒和鸡尾酒，酒店的Ludico Venice 餐厅供应意大利佳肴和美食。

highlights.text_en:
The Splendor and Prosperity of Florence, the Shining Brilliance of the Renaissance
In Florence, the world's capital of art and the birthplace of the Renaissance, enjoy a stunning visual feast! Among the blue skies and white clouds, the brightly colored walls, the dark green shutters and the deep red rooftops, search for the soul of the Renaissance; in the streets and alleys, the squares and churches, the museums and art galleries, feel the Renaissance that never grows old. As the writer Chen Yunhe said, "The poetic spirit of Dante Alighieri and the painting spirit of Leonardo da Vinci still drift over Florence, still continuing to pursue the people and events of the European Renaissance period..."
highlights.text_zh:
佛罗伦萨的辉煌鼎盛，文艺复兴的星芒闪耀
在世界艺术之都、文艺复兴的发源地佛罗伦萨，享受一场震撼的视觉盛宴！在蓝天白云，彩色鲜艳的墙壁，深绿色的百叶窗，深红色的屋顶之间寻找文艺复兴的灵魂，在大街小巷、广场教堂，博物馆、美术馆之中感受文艺复兴不老。正如作家陈运和所说“阿利盖利．但丁的诗魂、达．芬奇的画魂，仍在佛罗伦萨上空飘荡，仍继续追寻欧洲文艺复兴时期那些人与事.....''

attractions.name_en: The Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore (queuing required to enter)
attractions.name_zh: 圣母百花大教堂（需排队进入）
attractions.text_en: There are many solemn and majestic churches in the world, but few churches can be so enchanting. This beautiful church, faced with white, red and green granite, interprets the classicism, elegance and freedom esteemed in the Renaissance era to the fullest—no wonder it was named the "Saint Mary of the Flower." The original site of the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore was the Church of Santa Reparata, built in the 4th century. In 1296, Giovanni de' Medici funded the construction of the new church, which took 175 years to complete.
attractions.text_zh: 世界上庄严雄伟的教堂很多，但很少有教堂能如此妩媚。这座使用白、红、绿三色花岗岩贴面的美丽教堂将文艺复兴时代所推崇的古典、优雅、自由诠释得淋漓尽致，难怪会被命名为“花之圣母”。圣母百花大教堂原址是建于4世纪的圣·雷帕拉塔教堂。1296年，乔凡尼·美第奇出资建造新的教堂，花了175年时间才建成。

attractions.text_en: The Piazza della Signoria has the reputation of being an open-air sculpture museum and has also been the center of the city's political life for several centuries. On the square stand the Palazzo Vecchio (Old Palace), a replica of Michelangelo's sculpture "David," and the Fountain of Neptune. The open Piazza della Signoria is surrounded by the Uffizi Gallery, the Loggia dei Lanzi and numerous cafés and bars. The famous Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore is located directly to its north.
attractions.text_zh: 市政广场有露天雕塑博物馆的美誉，也是该城数个世纪以来政治生活中心，广场上坐落着维琪奥宫（旧宫）、米开朗基罗雕塑作品《大卫》的复制品以及海神喷泉。开放式的市政广场，周围环绕着乌菲兹美术馆、佣兵凉亭和众多的咖啡厅、酒吧。著名的圣母百花大教堂就位于它的正北方。

attractions.text_en: The Ponte Vecchio over the Arno River is also known as the Old Bridge. Built in 1345, it is one of the earlier large-span circular-arch bridges in Europe. It is said that Dante encountered the maiden Beatrice here, and later poured his longing into "The Divine Comedy." Over several centuries it has experienced floods, social upheaval and wars yet has stood firm and undefeated. It is one of the famous landmark buildings of Florence.
attractions.text_zh: 位于阿诺河(Arno)上的维奇奥桥，又被称为老桥。建于1345年，是欧洲较早的大跨度圆弧拱桥，据说但丁在这里邂逅了少女比阿特丽丝，后来将思慕之情倾注到《神曲》之中。几百年间，它经历过的水灾、社会动乱、战争而屹立不倒。是佛罗伦萨的著名地标建筑之一。

attractions.text_en: Piazza Santa Croce is located in the center of Florence, Italy, and is an important public space that has continued from the Renaissance to the present day. The heart of the square is the magnificent Basilica of Santa Croce; this Gothic building is the resting place of Italian notables such as Michelangelo and Galileo, and its interior frescoes and sculptures are worth savoring carefully. Around the square there are several cafés and restaurants offering authentic Italian cuisine, making it an ideal place to rest and taste local flavors. Piazza Santa Croce is also a venue for various cultural events and festivals; especially in summer, open-air concerts and theatrical performances attract many spectators. The square's open space is suitable for strolling and admiring the surrounding architecture, feeling the unique atmosphere of Florence.
attractions.text_zh: 圣十字广场位于意大利佛罗伦萨市中心，是文艺复兴时期延续至今的重要公共空间，广场的核心是宏伟的圣十字大教堂这座哥特式建筑是米开朗基罗和伽利略等意大利名人的安息地，内部的壁画和雕塑值得细细品味。广场周围有多家咖啡馆和餐厅，提供地道的意大利美食，是休憩和品尝当地风味的理想之地。圣十字广场也是举办各种文化活动和节庆的场所，尤其在夏季，露天音乐会和戏剧表演吸引众多观众。广场的开放空间适合漫步和观赏周围的建筑，感受佛罗伦萨的独特氛围。

overview.text_en: In the morning visit St. Mark's Basilica (exterior), St. Mark's Square, the Bridge of Sighs (exterior) and the magnificent Doge's Palace (exterior). These beautiful buildings built on the water, together with the winding water lanes, make Venice's romantic charm linger for a long time. Afterwards the group disbands at Mestre.
overview.text_zh: 上午参观圣马可大教堂（外观），圣马可广场，叹息桥（外观），华丽的总督宫（外观），这些建造在水上的美丽建筑和蜿蜒的水巷一起，让威尼斯的浪漫风情久久挥之不去。之后在梅斯特散团。

accommodation.text_en: No hotel
accommodation.text_zh: 无酒店

highlights.text_en:
The Beautiful Venice of the World, the "Pearl of the Adriatic," Still Dazzlingly Resplendent
Venice, as one of the important cities of the Renaissance, is made up of 118 small islands, linked together by 177 waterways and 401 bridges. It is known as the "City on Water," the "City of a Hundred Islands" and the "City of Bridges." Here is one of the most beautiful squares in the world, "St. Mark's Square," the beautiful Grand Canal, the phoenix-reborn La Fenice opera house, the melancholy Bridge of Sighs under Xu Zhimo's pen, and the breathtakingly beautiful colonnades. This is the birthplace of the Venetian school of painting, and also the filming location of many film segments; her unique temperament leaves every visitor enchanted and reluctant to leave.
highlights.text_zh:
世上美丽的威尼斯，“亚得里亚海明珠”依旧璀璨夺目
威尼斯作为文艺复兴时期的重镇之一，由118个小岛组成，并以177条水道、401座桥梁连成一体。有“水上都市”、“百岛城”、“桥城”之称。这里有世界上美丽的广场之一“圣马可广场”，有美丽的大运河，浴火重生的凤凰歌剧院，徐志摩笔下忧伤的叹息桥，美得令人窒息的回廊，这里是威尼斯画派的发源地，还是多部电影片段的拍摄地，她独特的气质让每一个到访的人都如痴如醉，不舍离去。

attractions.name_zh: 威尼斯圣马可大教堂（外观）
attractions.text_en: Abbreviated as St. Mark's Basilica, it stands on St. Mark's Square in the center of Venice. First built in AD 829 and rebuilt in 1043-1071, it was once the largest church in medieval Europe and is a classic work of Venetian architectural art; it is at the same time a treasure house holding a rich collection of artworks.
attractions.text_zh: 简称圣马可大教堂，是矗立于威尼斯市中心的圣马可广场上。始建于公元829年，重建于1043~1071年，它曾是中世纪欧洲大的教堂，是威尼斯建筑艺术的经典之作，它同时也是一座收藏丰富艺术品的宝库。

attractions.text_en: This is a museum located on the Piazza San Marco; the past glory of Venice is all here. Inside, you can see not only frescoes and the like, but also medieval weapons. On the way to the dungeon you cross the Bridge of Sighs, where you can look outside through a small hole, rather than, like the many people on the bridge opposite, looking over toward you at the Bridge of Sighs. Inside, photography is allowed, as long as you do not use a flash.
attractions.text_zh: 这是一家位于Piazza San Marco的博物馆，威尼斯过去的辉煌都在这里了。里面可以看的不仅有壁画等，还有中世纪的兵器，去地牢的时候走过叹息桥，能通过小孔看外面，而不是像对面桥上面那么多的人在往你这里看叹息桥。里面是可以拍照片的，只要你不要用闪光灯就可以了。

attractions.name_en: The Bridge of Sighs of Venice (exterior)
attractions.text_en: The Bridge of Sighs was in ancient times the route by which the court escorted condemned prisoners to the prison. The Bridge of Sighs is of an early Baroque style; the bridge is shaped like a house, covered above by a vault and tightly enclosed, with only two small windows on the side toward the canal. After a prisoner was tried at the Doge's Palace, serious offenders were taken to the dungeon, and as they passed over this airtight bridge they could only look at the blue sky through the small window, thereafter losing their freedom and involuntarily uttering sounds of sighing. It is said that if lovers kiss beneath the bridge they will love forever, and the film "A Little Romance" was shot here.
attractions.text_zh: 叹息桥是古代由法院向监狱押送死囚的必经之路。叹息桥造型属早期巴洛克式风格，桥呈房屋状，上部穹隆覆盖，封闭得很严实，只有向运河一侧有两个小窗，当犯人在总督府接受审判之后，重罪犯被带到地牢中，在经过这座密不透气的的桥时，只能透过小窗看看蓝天，从此失去了自由，不自主的发出叹息之声。听说恋人们在桥下接吻就可以天长地久，而电影「情定日落桥」就在这取景的。

attractions.text_en: It is the central square of Venice, once called by Napoleon "the most beautiful drawing room in Europe." The square is surrounded on three sides by magnificent and grand palaces, and to the east stand the tall bell tower and St. Mark's Basilica. Since ancient times, it has been the public activity center of Venice's political, religious and traditional festivals.
attractions.text_zh: 是威尼斯的中心广场，曾被拿破仑称作“欧洲美丽的客厅”。广场三面被宏伟壮丽的宫殿围绕，东面耸立着高大的钟楼和圣马可教堂。自古以来，就是威尼斯政治、宗教及传统节日的公共活动中心。

overview.text_en:
After gathering on the day, we set out for the village of Giverny to visit Monet's Garden, then cross the Normandy Bridge to Honfleur, a classic Impressionist town, to tour the quaint fishing-village city captured in painters' works. Afterwards we visit the twin cities of Deauville and Trouville, which preserve the most complete Norman-Anglo architectural ensemble, discovering the origins of Norman civilization from the perspective of architectural aesthetics. In the evening we head to Caen, the gastronomic capital of Normandy, and check in at the Ivan Vautier Hotel, where the Ivan Vautier three-course dinner set is recommended.
Overnight: Ivan Vautier Hotel or an equivalent 5-star hotel
Important notice:
1. Depending on how the departure dates are arranged, the sightseeing order of some departures may be adjusted forward or backward, with the outbound and return sequence reversed, but the content visited remains the same; this change to the itinerary does not affect the overall experience. The specific itinerary arrangement is subject to the departure notice.
2. Monet's Garden and former residence is closed in winter and open to visitors from early April to the end of October each year. The specific opening times are subject to the notice on the official website of Monet's Garden and former residence.
overview.text_zh:
当天集合后出发前往吉维尼小镇的莫奈花园游览，随后横跨诺曼底大桥前往印象派经典小镇——翁弗勒尔，游览画家笔下古色古香的渔村城市。之后前往游览城市保留完整的诺曼-盎格鲁建筑群的双子之城——多维尔和特鲁维尔，从建筑美学的角度发现诺曼底的文明起源，当晚前往诺曼底的美食之都——卡昂，入住伊万沃蒂尔酒店，推荐伊万沃蒂尔三道式晚宴套餐。
夜宿：伊万沃蒂尔酒店或同等5星级酒店
重要提醒：
1、根据团期排列情况，部分团期的行程游览顺序或将前后调整，行程往返次序相反，但游览内容一致，行程改变不影响全程体验，具体行程安排以出团通知书为准。
2、 莫奈花园故居冬季关闭，每年自四月初起至十月末参观，具体开放时间以莫奈花园故居官网通知为准。

accommodation.text_en: Ivan Vautier Michelin Hotel or an equivalent 5-star hotel. Created by Michelin-starred chef Ivan Vautier, this Spa hotel is a five-star property with a unique classical courtyard landscape, featuring a Michelin-starred restaurant, a gourmet tea room, and a spa center with a Turkish bath and body therapy services. Located in the old town of Caen, it is within walking distance of the famous landmarks Saint-Ouen Church, the old Saint-Étienne Church, and the Men's Abbey of Caen. The rooms are designed in a contemporary Normandy art style, with some rooms featuring the arched windows characteristic of Normandy.
accommodation.text_zh: 伊万沃蒂尔米其林酒店或同等5星级酒店 由米其林星级主厨伊万沃捷创建的这间Spa酒店，是一所拥有独特的古典庭院景观的五星级酒店，配有米其林星级餐厅、美食茶室和土耳其浴室、身体理疗服务的spa中心，位于卡昂古城区、比邻著名景点圣旺教堂、圣艾蒂安老教堂和卡昂男子修道院均可步行距离到达。房间设计充满的当代诺曼底艺术风格，部分房间内饰有诺曼底特有拱形窗。

highlights.text_en:
Ivan Vautier Michelin Restaurant
The debut work in his hometown by renowned Normandy chef Ivan Vautier; the refined, oil-painting-like brilliance is also a key reason for the restaurant's success. The collision of Normandy seafood with fresh truffle, seasonal vegetables, and stunning desserts—imaginative and ingenious combinations—present a double art of taste and form. "I only choose ingredients from Normandy, because I only understand the characteristics of Normandy's farm produce."—Ivan Vautier.
The restaurant is closed for lunch and dinner on Mondays and for dinner on Sundays, and does not take reservations
highlights.text_zh:
伊万沃蒂尔米其林餐厅
诺曼底知名主厨——伊万沃蒂尔（Ivan Vautier）在家乡的出山之作，精致、如同油画般的绚丽也是餐厅菜品获得成功的重要理由，诺曼底的海产与清松露的碰撞、当季的蔬菜与惊艳的甜品，奇思妙想的创意组合呈现味蕾与造型的双重艺术。“我只选择诺曼底的食材，因为我只懂得诺曼底的农产品的特性”——伊万沃蒂尔。
餐厅每周一午晚餐、周日晚餐休息，不接受预定

attractions.text_en: Honfleur lies at the gateway of the Côte Fleurie (Flower Coast). With its flower-filled harbor, the old bell-tower district, and a labyrinthine old town, it is a magnificent scene captured by many Impressionist painters; this ancient thousand-year-old fishing port is an ideal holiday destination. Honfleur is both a historic city dating back to the Norman Middle Ages and an important maritime port. From Honfleur you can gaze upon the spectacular Normandy Bridge, and strolling through the quaint streets and lanes of the town center, you can experience the refined romance and charm of this seaside city on the Flower Coast.
attractions.text_zh: 翁弗勒尔位于鲜花海岸的门户地带，鲜花海港、古钟楼区和迷宫般的老城，是诸多印象派画师的笔下盛景、这个古老的千年渔港是理想的度假地。翁弗勒尔既是诺曼底中世纪以来历史悠久的城市和重要的航海港口。从翁弗勒尔可以眺望壮观的诺曼底大桥，漫步于市中心的古色古香街道和小巷，可以体会这座鲜花海岸的海滨城市的精致浪漫和迷人之处。

attractions.text_en: Deauville, a city that appears again and again in travel and architecture magazines, possesses the most completely preserved Norman-Anglo architectural ensemble to this day. Along Deauville's coastal areas, old-fashioned Normandy-style, timber-framed mansions can be seen everywhere; it is a popular upscale summer resort.
attractions.text_zh: 多维尔 (Deauville)这座在旅游杂志和建筑杂志上反复出现的城市，拥有至今保留最完整的诺曼-盎格鲁建筑群，多维尔沿岸地区，处处可见老式的诺曼底样式、木质骨架结构的宅邸，是个热门的夏季高级度假胜地。

attractions.text_en: The Normandy town of Trouville, set at the mouth of the Touques River, neighbors Deauville, yet the two cities have rather different styles. Deauville, the work of masters and a gathering place of celebrities, exudes courtly nobility, while Trouville offers elegance, seaside scenery, and fairytale-like colorful châteaux. Together the two cities form the protected zone of the Norman-Anglo architectural ensemble.
attractions.text_zh: 坐落在图克河入海口的诺曼底小镇特鲁维尔，毗邻多维尔Deauville，但是两座城市的风格不尽相同。多维尔是大师手笔名流云集，显得宫廷贵气，而特鲁维尔的优雅、海滨景致，童话般的彩色城堡。两城共同构成了诺曼-盎格鲁建筑群保护区。

attractions.text_en: Monet's Garden is located 88 kilometers northwest of Paris, in the province of Upper Normandy. In 1883, when Monet passed by here on a train, he was captivated by the place and so moved here to live. Over 43 years, Monet spent half his life here and created countless works. Monet himself called "the garden my most beautiful work." Today, 85 years after Monet's passing, the place is still maintained in the original state of Monet's life back then. From the tulips when the garden opens in April, to the most famous water lilies of midsummer, to the chrysanthemums before it closes in October, here you can find the colors of Monet's paintings.
attractions.text_zh: 莫奈花园位于巴黎西北方向88公里，属于上诺曼底省。1883年，莫奈坐火车经过这里时被这里所吸引，于是搬来此居住。43年的时间，莫奈一半的人生在这里度过，创作了无数著作。莫奈自称“花园是我最美的作品”。莫奈走了85年后的今天，这里依旧按照莫奈当年生活的原状维护着。从4月开园时的郁金香，到盛夏最著名的睡莲，10月闭馆前的菊花，你在这里可以找到莫奈画中的色彩。

attractions.text_en: The Normandy Bridge stretches 2 kilometers, spanning both banks of the Seine near its estuary and connecting Le Havre with Honfleur. The two "V"-shaped guard rails of the bridge are very eye-catching, and the whole bridge looks like a giant work of art.
attractions.text_zh: 诺曼底大桥长达2公里，横跨入海口附近的塞纳河左右两岸，将勒阿弗尔和翁弗勒尔连接起来。桥身的两个“V”形护栏非常引人瞩目，整个桥就像一件巨大的艺术品。

overview.text_en:
On the morning of the day we head to Mont Saint-Michel, an isolated island on the Normandy beach, to tour the Mont Saint-Michel scenic area, and—depending on the tides—visit the mirror-like shallow tidal flats of the Normandy sea at the foot of the mount. Afterwards we go to the Devil's City, Saint-Malo, to tour the old town of Saint-Malo and its seaside city district, then proceed to the Loire Valley region to check in at the hotel.
Overnight: Château de la Tortinière Hotel or an equivalent 5-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
当天上午前往诺曼底海滩的独立小岛——圣米歇尔山，游览圣米歇尔山景区，根据潮汐情况游览位于山脚下如同镜片的诺曼底海水浅水滩涂，之后前往魔鬼城——圣马洛，游览圣马洛老城及海滨城中区，随后前往卢瓦河谷大区入住酒店。
夜宿：达赫蒂涅城堡酒店 或同等5星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Château de la Tortinière Hotel or an equivalent 5-star hotel. The Château de la Tortinière Hotel is set in 25 hectares of French-style gardens, neighboring the Château de Chenonceau in the Loire Valley. One can easily see from afar this majestic artistic château built of white stone, with Doric granite columns and several Roman-style wall lanterns mounted on the walls, presenting a resplendent and elegantly luxurious appearance. The main body of the château was designed by the famous 17th-century architect Jean-Michel Chevotet. The château once received Queen Elizabeth of England. The hotel rooms retain the style and antique furniture of the François era, with a conference salon and a hunting hall, and the restaurant features Louis-era style dishes and banquet customs; the château offers an ultra-luxurious aristocratic experience.
(Our agency selects elegant king-bed rooms for guests, which may be distributed across the château's three areas—the banquet hall, the attic, and the pavilion. If guests have specific requirements regarding room type or area, please contact customer service to upgrade the room type before registering.)
accommodation.text_zh:
达赫蒂涅城堡酒店或同等5星级酒店 达赫蒂涅城堡酒店坐落在25公顷的法式花园中，毗邻卢瓦尔河谷舍农索城堡，人们可以轻易从远处看到这座雄伟的由白色石头堆砌的艺术城堡，陶立克式花岗石立柱及嵌挂于壁上的数盏罗马式风灯，金碧辉煌和典雅华丽的风貌。城堡的主体部分为十七世纪著名建筑师Jean-Michel Chevotet设计，城堡曾经接待过英国伊丽莎白女王，酒店房间保留弗朗索瓦时期的风格和古董家具，会议沙龙及狩猎厅，餐厅为路易时期风格菜品和宴会习俗，城堡提供极致奢华的贵族体验。
（我社为宾客选择典雅大床房，可能分布在城堡的宴会、阁楼、凉亭三个区域，如宾客对房型或区域有指定要求、敬请在报名前联系客服升级房型）

highlights.text_en:
Old Town of Saint-Malo
This ancient Brittany city, built in the Middle Ages, is a renowned European holiday destination. It is famous not only because the old town is encircled by towering pirate walls and was a transit station for the slave trade; today, Saint-Malo is a city of gastronomy. The old buildings filling the four square kilometers of the old town center are all manner of gourmet restaurants, each with its own distinctive character, each appearing to do brisk business, and each filled at all hours with gourmands from every nation. Naval spirit, the red-topped lighthouse, all kinds of cafés, bars, gourmet restaurants, and vivid, lively specialty shops are everywhere. "The fish-market wharf is where Brittany's outstanding atmosphere truly lies; travel is to be done with your eyes and your stomach."—the world-renowned travel program Faut pas Rêver.
highlights.text_zh:
圣马洛古城
这座建设于中世纪的布列塔尼古城，作为欧洲知名的度假胜地。不仅仅是由于老城区被高耸的海盗城墙环绕和贩卖奴隶的中转站，今天、圣马洛是一所美食之城，古城中心四平方公里的古建筑屋内全部是各种各样的美食餐厅，每一家餐厅都各具特色，每一家餐厅看着都生意很好，每一家餐厅无论何时都填充着各国的饕餮们，海军魂、红顶灯塔、各种咖啡、酒吧、美食餐厅、活色生香的特色店铺比比皆是。“鱼市码头才是布列塔尼的卓越气氛，旅游是要带着眼睛和肚子。”——世界知名旅游节目Faut pas Rêver。

attractions.text_en: Mont Saint-Michel sits on an isolated island on the Normandy beach, two kilometers from the coast, with the remarkable phenomenon of being a sea island at high tide and dry land at low tide; it has been inscribed by UNESCO on the World Heritage of Mankind list. Mont Saint-Michel is a famous French historic monument and a Christian holy site, located on a small island in the Manche department, two kilometers from the coast. The small island is cone-shaped, 900 meters in circumference, formed of towering granite. At an altitude of 88 meters, it is often surrounded by vast stretches of sandy shore and becomes an island only at high tide. In ancient times this was a place where the Celts worshipped their gods. In the 8th century AD, the cardinal Aubert built a small chapel-fortress at the highest point of the island and dedicated it to the Archangel Michael; today it has become a pilgrimage center, hence the name Mont Saint-Michel, a "World Cultural and Natural Heritage" site.
attractions.text_zh: 圣米歇尔山位于诺曼底海滩上的一座孤岛上，距海岸两公里，涨潮时为海岛，退潮时为陆地的奇特景观，被联合国教科文组列入世界人类遗产。圣米歇尔山是法国著名古迹和基督教圣地，位于芒什省一小岛上，距海岸两公里。小岛呈圆锥形，周长900米，由耸立的花岗石构成。海拔88米，经常被大片沙岸包围，仅涨潮时才成为岛。古时这里是凯尔特人祭神的地方。公元8世纪，红衣主教奥贝在岛上最高处修建一座小教堂城堡，奉献给天使长米歇尔，如今成为朝圣中心，故称圣米歇尔山，是“世界文化与自然遗产”景点。

attractions.name_zh: 圣米歇尔山修道院（外观）
attractions.text_en: The Mont Saint-Michel Abbey is located on Mont Saint-Michel. Shaped by the wonders of nature, Mont Saint-Michel is one of the great wonders of the world, and the abbey and cathedral atop the mount hold a supreme place in the hearts of Christians. Aubert built a small chapel at the highest point of the island and dedicated it to the Archangel Michael, making it a pilgrimage center. During Napoleon's rule, the abbey also served as a national prison. To this day, although the abbey has been designed and rebuilt by many architects, it still maintains a plain, unadorned, quaint character.
attractions.text_zh: 圣米歇尔山修道院位于圣米歇尔山上。圣米歇尔山经大自然的造化，是世界的一大奇观，山上的修道院和大教堂更在基督教徒的心目中有着至高无上的地位。奥伯特在岛上最高处修建一座小教堂，奉献给大天使米歇尔，成为朝圣中心。拿破仑执政期间，修道院也曾作为国家监狱。到如今，修道院虽然经诸多建筑师设计改建，但依旧保持着朴实无华、古色古香的格调。

attractions.text_en: Saint-Malo is a well-preserved medieval-style town. Because it once had to defend against pirate raids, it is also called the "Pirate City," and many ancient sailing ships are still moored in the harbor today. Strolling through the old town, the narrow alleys and ancient buildings make you feel as if you are in a medieval old city. You can also climb the city walls to gaze over the vast beach, lie on the beach to sunbathe, play in the waves, or visit the distant reefs. Because this is an estuary, and it faces the old town across the sea, there are local ferries dedicated to shuttling between the two cities. As a tourist city, Saint-Malo not only has a profound sense of history; its various souvenir shops, supermarkets, and hotels provide very convenient modern services to visitors, so it is absolutely the best choice for a holiday.
attractions.text_zh: 圣马洛是保存完好的中世纪风格，这里曾经因为要抵御海盗的袭击，故又称为“海盗城”，今天在港口中还停靠着很多古代帆船。漫步在老城中，狭窄的小巷，古老的建筑让人仿佛置身中世纪的古城。还可以登上城墙眺望辽阔的海滩，也可以躺在海滩上晒太阳，踏浪玩耍，还可以去探访远处的礁石。因为这里是入海口，并且和老城隔海相望，当地还有专门的游轮在两个城之间摆渡。作为旅游城市，圣马洛不仅有厚重的历史感，各种纪念品商店超市酒店为游人提供非常方便的现代服务，所以这里绝对是度假的最佳选择。

attractions.name_zh: 圣马洛海滩和海防工事
attractions.text_en: The coastal defenses form a long ring; the well-preserved medieval coastal military fortress encircles the old town, looking out toward the Devil's Reef and England's Jersey island, the old slave prison, with great numbers of seabirds circling and sailing ships surging one after another. Coming from the city of Saint-Malo into the pedestrian street within the city walls, and then arriving at the beach here, is very pleasant; not far from the beach lies a French national defense line, a square fortress that can be reached on foot at low tide. The whole city of Saint-Malo gives a very comfortable feeling—a medieval pirate city that lives up to its name.
attractions.text_zh: 海防工事环形的长长的一片，保持完整的中世纪海防军事要塞、环绕古城、眺望魔鬼导和英国的泽西岛屿，奴隶古监狱，大量的海鸟盘旋和一艘艘帆船涌动，从圣马洛市里进入到城墙中的步行街，再来到海滩这边，非常舒服，离海滩不远处有法国国土防线，为方形堡垒，可以在退潮的时候步行前往，整个圣马洛城给人的感觉很舒服，名副其实中世纪海盗城。

overview.text_en: In the morning we visit the Château de Chenonceau, a château built on the water in the Loire Valley, then head north, visiting along the way the refined and quaint old town of Blois, and finally visit the Château de Chambord in the Loire Valley. Along the D952 riverside avenue, in the pristine wilds of the Loire Valley region, untamed roe deer and wild boar hide in the woods, and the most magnificent château in all of France—the Château de Chambord—stands majestically, its layout also a typical medieval château layout, serving as a hunting palace for the kings of France. Afterwards we return to Paris, concluding this wonderful trip.
overview.text_zh: 上午前往游览卢瓦尔河谷里一座建在水上的城堡——舍农索城堡，之后北上沿途参观精致古朴的布洛瓦老城，最后参观卢瓦尔河谷香波堡，沿着D952河畔大道在原生态卢瓦河谷地区的丛林里隐藏着从未被驯服的獐鹿、野猪，巍然耸立着全法兰西最恢弘的城堡--香波堡，布局也是中世纪典型的古堡布局，是法国君王狩猎的行宫，之后返回巴黎，结束美好旅行。

accommodation.text_en: No accommodation that night
accommodation.text_zh: 当晚无住宿

highlights.text_en:
World Cultural Heritage—the Loire Valley Château Region
The châteaux of the Loire Valley display the most classical and traditional charm of France. As France's largest tourist region: from Sully-sur-Loire in the Loiret to Chalonnes-sur-Loire in Anjou, the Loire Valley offers you a tourist route stretching 280 kilometers. Harmony is perhaps the most striking feature here—whether the châteaux built over the river or the gardens hidden in deep woods, they shine in mutual splendor along the banks of the Loire, with lush green vineyards on both banks of the valley, quaint towns, and châteaux as brilliant as the stars. "The Loire is another galaxy, and the châteaux are those stars."—Anjelica Huston
highlights.text_zh:
世界文化遗产——卢瓦尔河谷城堡区
卢瓦尔河谷城堡群，展现着法兰西最古典与传统的风情，卢瓦尔河谷作为法国最大的旅游景区：从卢瓦雷省（leLoiret）的叙利（SullysurLoire）到安茹（Anjou）的沙洛那（ChalonnessurLoire），卢瓦尔河谷为您提供了一条长达280公里的旅游线路。和谐也许是这里最显著的一个特征，无论是建筑在河流上的城堡，还是躲藏在深林中的花园，在卢瓦河沿岸交相辉映，河谷两岸郁郁葱葱的葡萄树，古朴的小镇，还有灿若星辰的城堡。“卢瓦河是另一个银河，而城堡是那些星星。”——蕙兰·休斯顿

attractions.text_en: Although the old town of Blois was almost completely destroyed during World War II, the restored city architecture is still well worth seeing. Especially the church's bell-and-drum tower, which dazzles brilliantly under the light projections at night. Opposite the church is the House of the Acrobats, decorated with wooden carvings of clowns from medieval farces; it is one of the few 15th-century old houses that survived the war.
attractions.text_zh: 尽管布洛瓦老城区在二战时几乎被毁于一旦，但修复后的城市建筑依然非常值得一看。尤其是教堂的钟鼓楼，在晚上的灯光投影下光彩熠熠。教堂对面是杂技演员之家，装饰着中世纪滑稽戏中的小丑木雕，是战争中幸存下来的为数不多的15世纪古屋。

attractions.text_en: Architecture of the 15th and 16th centuries, with gardens planted full of Mediterranean plants and two large knights' towers. Linked together by the main keep, a gallery, a terrace, and round towers, it spans the surface of the Cher, a tributary of the Loire, and is the most romantic "château on the water" among the palace-château group of the Loire Valley, likened to a ship moored on the Cher. The Château de Chenonceau is also known as the "Ladies' Château," because the château's owners over several generations were all women—both noblewomen and heroines among women. This is a three-story château whose greatest feature is that it straddles the river. This perfectly matches the tender, water-like sentiment of Chenonceau as the Ladies' Château, and from here one can admire the magnificent scenery along the Loire.
attractions.text_zh: 15世纪和16世纪的建筑，种满地中海植物的花园和两座庞大的骑士塔楼。由主堡垒、长廊、平台和圆塔串联而成，横跨卢瓦尔河支流希尔河河面，是卢瓦尔河谷宫堡群中最富有浪漫情调的"水上城堡"，被喻为停泊在希尔河上的航船。舍农索城堡又被称为“女人堡”。因为这座城堡的几代主人全是女的，既是贵妇又是女中豪杰。这是一座三层的城堡，其最大特色是城堡是横跨河上的。这正好与舍农梭堡是女人堡的柔情似水相吻合，从这里可以观赏到卢瓦尔河畔的壮丽景色。

attractions.text_en: The largest of the Loire Valley châteaux, with a fairly typical medieval château layout, it served as a hunting palace for the kings of France. The Château de Chambord was built during the reign of François I. In its layout, form, and decorative style, it reflects France's traditional architectural art while also being influenced by the Italian Renaissance, becoming one of the representative works of the French Renaissance and regarded by the French as a national treasure worthy of pride. In 1981, the Château de Chambord was inscribed on the World Heritage List.
attractions.text_zh: 卢瓦尔河谷城堡群中最大的一个，较为典型的中世纪古堡布局，是法国君王狩猎的行宫。香波堡兴建于弗朗斯瓦一世时期。它在布局、造型、风格装饰上反映了法国传统的建筑艺术，同时又受到意大利文艺复兴的影响，成为法国文艺复兴时期的代表作之一，被法国人视为值得炫耀的国宝。1981年，香博堡列入了世界遗产名录。

overview.text_en:
On this day, take the French TGV high-speed train on your own to the South of France (no guide accompanies you on the train); the train journey lasts about 2 to 3 hours. After arrival, gather together and begin the tour of the Provence villages, visiting in turn: Fontaine-de-Vaucluse, the ancient town of Gordes, and Sénanque Abbey (exterior), then check in to the hotel.
Overnight: Novotel Avignon Nord or an equivalent 4-star hotel
Important terms:
1. The itinerary of the last day and the first day of this product may be adjusted according to the train schedule; in that case the entire itinerary will be shifted by one day, the touring content will be exactly the same, only the order of visits will be adjusted. This is regarded as an equivalent itinerary and is not regarded as an itinerary change.
2. Because high-speed train seats in the Provence region are in tight supply during summer and are subject to cancellation risks such as suspension due to high temperatures, strikes, and delays, the itinerary of the French rail operator SNCF may, depending on availability, be adjusted to the Pont-du-Gard station or the Montpellier Sud de France station; in that case a shuttle bus will be provided to connect the different train stations in the South of France, and the order of the first-day and last-day itineraries may be adjusted. This is regarded as an equivalent itinerary and is not regarded as an itinerary change.
3. Some departure dates of this product may include the Marne-la-Vallée train station, which is a 38-minute ride from Paris Gare de Lyon (Paris light rail Line A); please consult sales before purchase.
4. During the Avignon Theatre Festival from July 4 to July 25, 2026, the hotel location may be adjusted; the actual details are subject to the departure notice.
5. There is no guide on the high-speed train; please board the train with your ticket on your own. Train tickets are issued under real names, so you need to carry your passport and an electronic version of the train ticket.
overview.text_zh:
当天自行乘坐法国高铁TGV前往南法（高铁上无导游陪同），高铁时长约2至3小时。 抵达后集合，开启普罗旺斯小镇之旅，依次游览：泉水小镇、高德古城、塞南克修道院（外观），随后入住酒店。
夜宿：阿维尼翁北部诺富特酒店或同等4星酒店
重要条款：
1.本产品的最后一天和第一天的行程，可能会根据火车班次调整，届时所有行程将调整一天，游览内容完全一致，游览先后顺序将会调整，视为同等行程，不视为行程调整。
2.由于普罗旺斯地区的夏季高铁位置紧张、受到高温停运、罢工、延期等取消风险，法国铁路运输公司SNCF的行程，根据可用性可能会调整到嘉尔站（Pont-du-Gard）或蒙彼利埃（Montpellier Sud de France）站，届时将提供穿梭巴士衔接南法不同火车站，可能会调整第一天和最后一天的行程的先后顺序，视为同等行程，不视为行程调整。
3.本产品的部分团期可能会包含马恩河谷火车站， 距离巴黎里昂火车站38分钟车程（巴黎轻轨A线）敬请 购买前咨询销售。
4.2026年7月4日至7月25日阿维尼翁戏剧节期间，酒店位置可能会有调整，具体以出团通知书为准。
5.高铁无导游陪同，请自行持票乘坐高铁，火车票为实名制，需要携带护照及电子版火车票。

accommodation.text_en: Novotel Avignon Nord or an equivalent 4-star hotel. The Novotel Avignon Nord is set in the green heart of Provence, about a 15-minute drive from Avignon's historic city center, making it an ideal base for exploring the City of the Popes and the Provençal countryside. The hotel adopts an overall modern minimalist style blended with Provence's natural atmosphere, in a quiet setting, with spacious and bright guest rooms and family rooms, fully equipped facilities; the restaurant features fresh local ingredients and French cuisine, while the bar and terrace area are an ideal space to relax over a drink and enjoy the sunshine of the South of France.
accommodation.text_zh: 阿维尼翁城北诺富特酒店或同等4星酒店 阿维尼翁城北诺富特酒店坐落于绿意环绕的普罗旺斯腹地，距离阿维尼翁历史城区约15分钟车程，是探索教皇之城与普罗旺斯乡村的理想下榻之选。酒店整体采用现代简约风格，融合普罗旺斯自然气息，环境宁静，拥有宽敞明亮的客房与家庭房，房间设施齐全，餐厅主打当地新鲜食材与法式料理，酒吧及露台区域是放松小酌、享受南法阳光的理想空间。

highlights.text_en:
Visit the ancient town of Gordes — the prototype of Hayao Miyazaki's "Castle in the Sky"
The town's buildings were all built in the Middle Ages; winding cobblestone paths climb upward, ivy-wrapped stone benches sit before doorways, fresh flowers stand before the abbey. With its unique style, this tranquil and rustic town is like a history book, vividly displaying the look and feel of the Middle Ages.
Avignon Street Art and Theatre Festival
Every July, Avignon transforms into the capital of theatre and street art, with brilliant puppet shows, operas, contemporary street art performances, and concerts; all-night street theatre performances light up the entire Avignon night.
highlights.text_zh:
拜访宫崎骏笔下《天空之城》的原型——高德古城
城中建筑均建于中世纪，蜿蜒而上的碎石路，青藤环绕的门前石凳，修道院前的鲜花，独特的风格，宁谧古朴的小镇仿佛一部史书，将中世纪的风貌活灵活现的展示。
阿维尼翁街头艺术戏剧节
每年的7月份阿维尼翁摇身一变成为了戏剧及街头艺术的首都，精彩绝伦的木偶剧，歌剧，当代街头艺术表演及音乐会，通宵的街头戏剧表演点亮整个阿维尼翁的夜晚。

attractions.text_en: Fontaine-de-Vaucluse in Provence is about half an hour from Avignon. It is a well-known spring resort village in the South of France, with a distinctive Provençal charm. The town is rustic and small, nestling quietly by the spring. In the scorching summer, the residents here do not feel the unbearable heat; the cool spring water flowing down from the mountains carries away the burning air and brings wave upon wave of refreshing coolness.
attractions.text_zh: 普罗旺斯泉水小镇（Fontaine de vaucluse），离 Avignon 大约半小时的路程，它是南法知名的泉水度假小村，具有别致的普罗旺斯风情，小镇古朴而小巧，静静的依偎在泉水之畔。炎炎夏日，这里的居民却体会不到那份酷暑难当，从山中流淌来的清凉泉水，带走了炙热的空气，送来了一波波爽人清凉。

attractions.text_en: In the valley opposite the Luberon mountains stands an ancient town built against the hillside; stone walls, houses, slopes, and a castle set off against the blue sky and white clouds — this is the very famous tourist destination in Provence, Gordes (also translated as "Gaode"). This hilltop ancient town once drew many artists to stay here; at the summit, the 16th-century Château de Gordes stands prominently, housing the works of many artists. In French towns, the artistic atmosphere is everywhere — a signboard, a shop window, all appear so exquisite. Colorful handicrafts and postcards catch the children's eyes; what a joyful thing it is to browse the little shops.
attractions.text_zh: 在吕贝隆山区对面的山谷里，有一座依山而建的古城，石壁、房屋、山坡、城堡，映衬着蓝天白云，这就是普罗旺斯地区非常著名的旅游胜地——勾禾德，也有译作“高德”。这座山丘古城曾经吸引了许多艺术家在此停留，山顶上16世纪的高德城堡卓然矗立，里面收藏了许多艺术家的作品。法国的小镇，艺术气息无处不在，一个招牌，一个橱窗，都显得那么的精致。色彩绚丽的手工艺品和明信片吸引着孩子们的眼球，逛小店是件多么开心的事情啊。

attractions.text_en: Sénanque Abbey is located 2 kilometers north of the stone town. It was built by the monks of Mazan Abbey in 1148; the entire abbey is hidden in a tranquil valley, and it is also the backdrop of the book "A Year in Provence." This place is called one of "the most beautiful valleys in all of France," and most postcards are shot here. Even so, the lavender fields here are relatively small in scale, and sometimes there are quite a lot of tourists, so please try to keep quiet when visiting.
attractions.text_zh: 塞南克修道院位于石头城小镇北方 2 公里处, 它是由 Mazan 修道院的僧侣们修建于 1148 年，整个修道院隐藏在宁静的山谷中，也是《山居岁月》一书的故事背景。这里被称为“全法国最美丽的山谷”之一，大部分明信片都取景于此。尽管如此，这里的薰衣草花田规模却相对较小，有时候游客较为密集，参观的时候请尽量保持安静。

overview.text_en:
After breakfast, tour the old town of Avignon on your own: the Pont d'Avignon (the broken bridge over the Rhône) (exterior), the Palais des Papes (Popes' Palace) (exterior), then head to the Pont de Gau Ornithological Park and the South-of-France town of Aigues-Mortes, and ride the Aigues-Mortes sightseeing train to tour the pink salt lake. In the afternoon, head to the city of Marseille for sightseeing; Marseille gives one a sense of unadorned, wild charm. You may choose to visit Palais Longchamp park, the Basilica of Notre-Dame de la Garde, and the Old Port of Marseille. Afterward, check in to the hotel.
Overnight: Novotel Marseille or Crowne Plaza, an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
早餐后，自行参观阿维尼翁古城，罗纳河断桥（外观），阿维尼翁教皇宫（外观），随后前往蓬德高鸟类公园和南法小镇艾格莫尔特、随后乘坐艾格莫尔特观光火车游览粉红盐湖，下午前往马赛市区游览，马赛让人有一种没有过多修饰的野性风情感，可选择参观隆尚宫公园，守护圣母圣殿，马赛旧港。之后入住酒店。
夜宿：马赛诺富特酒店或皇冠酒店同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en: Novotel Marseille or Crowne Plaza, an equivalent 4-star hotel. The hotel is located in a prime spot in the center of Marseille, with easy access to the Old Port, the city center, and the major attractions of the Côte d'Azur. The hotel has an overall modern and comfortable style, with spacious and bright guest rooms and complete facilities. The hotel has an in-house restaurant and bar offering an abundant breakfast and light-meal options, making it an ideal choice for exploring the urban charm of Marseille and the Mediterranean ambiance.
accommodation.text_zh: 马赛诺富特酒店或皇冠假日酒店同等4星级酒店 酒店位于马赛市中心优越地段，轻松前往老港、市中心及蔚蓝海岸各大景点。酒店整体风格现代舒适，客房宽敞明亮，设施齐全。酒店内设餐厅与酒吧，提供丰富早餐及轻食选择，是探索马赛城市魅力与地中海风情的理想之选。

highlights.text_en:
The Camargue wetlands are a protected delta region where the southern French coast meets the rivers, and are also an important habitat for flamingos. Together with the rustic Aigues-Mortes and the algae-rich pink lake waters, they form a rosy-hued Mediterranean coast holiday paradise.
Dreamy pink salt lake
Thanks to salt-loving algae and high salinity, a natural pink landscape forms; rich in layers under the sunlight, with white salt mounds up to several meters high, it is extremely visually striking. The pink lake surface, blue sky, and white salt mountains make for highly photogenic shots — a popular, Instagram-style check-in spot. Along the way you can see flamingos, wetland vegetation, and the salt-pan ecosystem — a unique attraction combining nature, industrial heritage, and regional culture.
Pont de Gau Ornithological Park
Flocks of flamingos can be seen all year round; they are the most representative birds of the Camargue. Lakes, reed beds, and salt marshes interweave, fully presenting the natural wetland ecosystem of the Camargue. It is a habitat for 300+ bird species such as egrets, gray herons, pelicans, and white ibises, with wild birds frequently appearing. Visits follow pristine-ecology trails, with boardwalks and loop paths that are gentle throughout, suitable for all ages — it is a renowned European holy land for bird photography and nature observation.
highlights.text_zh:
卡马格湿地是南法海滨和河流交接的三角洲保护区，也是火烈鸟的重要栖息地，与古朴的艾格莫尔特，富含藻类的粉红湖水，一共构成的玫瑰色的地中海海岸的度假圣地。
梦幻粉色盐湖
因嗜盐藻与高盐度形成天然粉色景观，阳光下层次丰富，高达数米的白色盐丘，极具视觉冲击力；粉色湖面 、 蓝天 、白盐山，出片率极高，网红ins风打卡地， 沿途可见火烈鸟、湿地植被、盐田生态系统， 结合自然、工业遗产与地域文化的独特景点。
蓬格高鸟类公园
全年可见成群的火烈鸟，是卡马格最具代表性的鸟类；湖泊、芦苇荡、盐沼交错，完整呈现卡马格自然 湿地生态系统 ；鹭鸟、苍鹭、鹈鹕、白鹮等 300+种鸟类栖息地， 野生鸟类频繁出没；原生态步道参观，木栈道与环形步道，全程平缓，适合各年龄段，是欧洲知名鸟类 摄影与自然观察圣地 。

attractions.text_en: The Pont de Gau Ornithological Park is located in the heart of the Camargue wetlands. It is an important flamingo habitat and is famous around the world for flamingo viewing. The flamingos near the salt lake feed on the algae and shrimp in the lake, and their feathers turn a faint pink, lively and beautiful. The withered yellow reed fields, the white herds of horses, the pink salt marshes and flamingos, and the dark marsh lakes are all worth stopping for, lingering amid this unique natural scenery.
attractions.text_zh: 蓬德高鸟类公园位于卡马格湿地中心地带，是重要的火烈鸟栖息地，也因火烈鸟观赏而闻名于世界。盐湖附近的火烈鸟以湖中的藻类和虾为食，羽毛也会变成淡淡的粉红色，灵动唯美。枯黄的芦苇地、白色的马群、粉红色的盐沼和火烈鸟、深色的沼泽湖泊，都值得我们停下脚步，流连于这独特的自然风光。

attractions.text_en: Board the sightseeing little train of the pink salt lake for a tour of more than an hour in the central area of the Aigues-Mortes salt lake. The pink lake water blends with the snow-white quartz sand beaches along the shore, like strawberry ice cream. Prolonged sunlight and the high salt content of the lake water produce a large quantity of the β-carotene-rich Dunaliella salina algae in the lake, making the surface of the salt lake appear pink.
attractions.text_zh: 登上粉红盐湖的观光小火车，在艾格莫尔盐湖的中心地区进行一个多小时的游览。粉红的湖水与岸边雪白的石英沙滩相交融，如同草莓雪糕。长期光照和高含盐量湖水，令湖中产生大量丰富的β-胡萝卜素的杜氏盐藻，使得盐湖表面呈现粉红色。

attractions.text_en: Aigues-Mortes is a town that lies between "salt" and "sea," named for the marshes and stagnant pink lake waters that surround it. Aigues-Mortes is a traditional pink-salt-producing place in France, and also one of France's earliest representative attractions of agricultural civilization. The ancient town, blue sky, and pink salt lake complement one another; humanity and nature together paint this fairy-tale-like picture.
attractions.text_zh: 艾格莫尔特是处于“盐”与“海”之间的小镇，因其四周环布沼泽与不流动的粉红湖水而得名。艾格莫尔是法国传统的粉盐生产的地，也是法国最早的农业文明代表景点。古城、蓝天，粉红盐湖相映相成，人与自然共同描绘了这幅童话般的画面。

attractions.text_en: The Old Port of Marseille is one of the most iconic and historically significant places in this Mediterranean city. Ever since the ancient Greeks founded Marseille in 600 BC, the Old Port has been the heart of this city. Today, the Old Port is not only a mooring place for fishing boats and yachts, but also a popular gathering spot for locals and tourists. The two sides of the Old Port are surrounded by beautiful seaside promenades, lined with cafés, restaurants, and bars — an excellent place to enjoy the flavors of Marseille cuisine and leisure time. Whether it is the morning fish market, the bustling market, or the lights and music at night, this place is full of unique charm and vitality.
attractions.text_zh: 马赛老港是这座地中海城市最具标志性和历史意义的地点之一。自古希腊人于公元前600年建立马赛以来，老港一直是这座城市的心脏。如今，老港不仅是渔船和游艇的停泊地，也是当地居民和游客的热门聚集地。老港两侧环绕着美丽的滨海大道，沿岸布满了咖啡馆、餐馆和酒吧，是享受马赛风味美食和休闲时光的绝佳场所。无论是清晨的渔市、热闹的市场，还是夜晚的灯光与音乐，这里都充满了独特的魅力和活力。

attractions.name_en: Basilica of Notre-Dame de la Garde, Marseille
attractions.text_en: There are countless churches in Europe, but Marseille's Basilica of Notre-Dame de la Garde is absolutely one not to be missed. The golden statue of the Madonna and Child atop the church is the symbol of Marseille, and at the same time the patron protector of sailors, fishermen, and all the people of Marseille. The Basilica of Notre-Dame de la Garde sits on a small hill 154 meters high, with an observation deck outside, making it an excellent spot to view Marseille and the islands of the Mediterranean.
attractions.text_zh: 欧洲的教堂数不胜数，马赛的守护圣母教堂是绝对不能错过的一座。教堂顶上的圣母圣子金像是马赛的象征，同时也是水手、渔民和所有马赛人的保护神。守护圣母教堂座落在一座154米高的小山丘上，外设有观景台，是观赏马赛和地中海小岛的绝佳地点。

attractions.text_en: The Palais Longchamp is an arc-shaped building, combining Baroque, Roman, and Oriental styles in one, and is very magnificent. At its center is a group of sculptures and a fountain themed "Ode to Water," with a colonnade extending out to each side. Newlyweds often come here to take wedding photos; ladies who like to travel with wedding dresses may well pay a visit.
attractions.text_zh: 隆尚宫是一座弧形的建筑，集巴洛克、罗马及东方风格为一体，十分宏伟。它的中央是以“水之赞歌”为主题的群雕和喷泉，两边各延伸出去一段回廊，经常有新人来此拍摄婚纱照，喜欢带婚纱旅游的MM不妨一游。

attractions.text_en: Avignon is a world-famous historical and cultural city, the heart of Provence, and is also known as the "City of the Popes." It is also the venue of the world-famous Avignon Theatre Festival; every July this place becomes a holy land for theatre lovers. The old town of Avignon is encircled by city walls; within the city are the Palais des Papes (Popes' Palace) and the square, while outside the city is the Pont d'Avignon (broken bridge). These are all historical buildings from the medieval period, full of cultural weight and a sense of history!
attractions.text_zh: 阿维尼翁Avigon，是世界历史文化名城，普罗旺斯的心脏，还被称为“教皇之城”。这里还是世界著名戏剧节阿维尼翁戏剧节的举办地，每年的7月这里就成为了戏剧爱好者的圣地。阿维尼翁老城由城墙环绕，城内有阿维尼翁教皇宫、广场，城外有阿维尼翁断桥，都是中世纪时期的历史建筑，充满了文化的厚重感与历史感！

overview.text_en:
After breakfast, set off for the lavender fields of Valensole and the D907 road (during the lavender flowering season); immerse yourself in the romantic sea of flowers and leave behind purple memories. In the afternoon, head to Cannes, the film capital and seaside town of the South of France, to visit the Palais des Festivals and the Walk of Fame, and stroll freely along the Cannes seaside promenade. Then head to Saint-Paul-de-Vence, a medieval art village perched on a hilltop. In the evening, head to Antibes and tour the old town of Antibes on your own. Afterward, check in to the hotel.
Overnight: Novotel Antibes Sophia Antipolis or an equivalent 4-star hotel
Note: Starting from mid-to-late May each year, Provence blooms with a large quantity of purple lupines (Lupinus Violet); depending on temperature differences, the lavender will bloom in mid-to-late June, varying by altitude and cultivated variety, and is generally harvested by late July. If the lavender cannot be visited within the tour dates, it will be changed to a visit to the ceramics town.
overview.text_zh:
早餐后出发前往瓦朗索勒及D907公路的薰衣草花田（薰衣草花期期间），置身浪漫花海，留下紫色记忆；下午 前往南法电影重镇及海滨小城-戛纳，参观影节宫、星光大道，自由漫步戛纳海滨大道，随后 前往坐落在山顶上的中世纪艺术村庄圣保罗德旺斯。傍晚前往昂提布，自行游览昂提布老城。之后入住酒店。
夜宿：诺富特安提比斯索非亚安蒂波利斯或同等4星酒店
备注：每年5月中下旬开始、普罗旺斯盛开大量的紫色鲁冰花（Lupinus Violet），根据不同的气温薰衣草将会在6月中下旬绽放，不同海拔高度和种植品种、一般截止到7月下旬收割。如团期内无法参观薰衣草，则更改为参观陶瓷小镇。

accommodation.text_en: Novotel Antibes or an equivalent 4-star hotel. The hotel is located in the core heart of the Côte d'Azur, surrounded by greenery, in a quiet and tranquil setting. The hotel offers very convenient access to the old town of Antibes and the Mediterranean coastline. The hotel has an overall modern and elegant style, integrating Mediterranean natural elements, with spacious and bright guest rooms. The hotel restaurant LE Fedor and the bar area provide an abundant breakfast, Mediterranean-style lunch/dinner, and relaxing drink service; guests may choose to dine in the restaurant, on the terrace, or in their rooms — it is a high-quality hotel combining modern style with the natural scenery of the Mediterranean.
accommodation.text_zh: 昂提布诺富特酒店或同等4星酒店 酒店坐落于蔚蓝海岸核心腹地，绿意环绕、环境静谧。酒店前往昂提布老城及地中海海岸线也十分便捷，酒店整体风格现代雅致，融入地中海自然元素，客房空间宽敞明亮，酒店餐厅 LE Fedor 和酒吧区域提供丰盛的早餐、地中海风味午餐/晚餐及轻松饮品服务，宾客可选择在餐厅、露台或客房内用餐，是一处兼具现代格调与地中海自然风光的高品质酒店。

highlights.text_en:
Flower fields stitched into a sea, pursuing the romantic flower language of lavender
Every summer, the lavender fields of Provence bloom in vast expanses, and the whole air is filled with the faint fragrance of lavender. Check in at the romantic and beautiful filming location of Chiung Yao's "Dream Behind the Curtain Again," pursue lavender's flower language of waiting for love, and immerse yourself in the sea-like flower fields…
highlights.text_zh:
花田连缀成海，追寻薰衣草浪漫花语
每年入夏，普罗旺斯的薰衣草花田就会大片盛开，整个空气里都弥漫着薰衣草淡淡的花香，打卡琼瑶《又见一帘幽梦》浪漫唯美的拍摄地，追寻着薰衣草等待爱情的花语，沉浸如海花田……
