attractions.text_en: An ancient historic city from the ancient Roman period, Nîmes brings together so many astonishing fruits of ancient Roman ingenuity: the well-preserved ancient Roman arena; the historic courtyard spring-side park (le Jardin de la Fontaine), as if hinting that Nîmes is a warm city living off its springs; and the ancient Roman watchtower on the hill, the Tour Magne (la Tour de Magne) — climb to the heights and gaze afar, and you can take in the boundless scenery.
attractions.text_zh: 古罗马时期的历史古城，尼姆汇集了太多古罗马人令人惊叹的智慧结晶：保存完好的古罗马竞技场；古迹庭院泉边公园(le Jardin de la Fontaine)，像在暗示尼姆即是一座以泉为生的暖城；还有丘陵上的古罗马瞭望塔马涅塔(la Tour de Magne)，登高远望，可将无限风光尽收眼底。

overview.text_en:
After breakfast, set off for Valensole and the lavender fields along the D907 road (during the lavender season), immersing yourself in the romantic sea of flowers and leaving a purple memory. In the afternoon, visit the European canyon — the Verdon Gorge and the Lac de Sainte-Croix. Then proceed to the southern French film hub and seaside city of Cannes, visit the Palais des Festivals and the Walk of Fame, and freely stroll along the Cannes seaside promenade. Arrive in Nice in the evening.
Overnight: B&B Nice Arenas hotel or an equivalent 3-star hotel
Note: Depending on the temperature, the lavender will bloom in mid-to-late June; depending on altitude and the cultivated variety, it is generally harvested by late July. If the lavender cannot be visited during the tour period, it will be changed to a visit to the ceramic town.
overview.text_zh:
早餐后出发前往瓦朗索勒及D907公路的薰衣草花田（薰衣草花期期间），置身浪漫花海，留下紫色记忆；下午前往游览欧洲峡谷——凡尔登大峡谷以及圣十字湖。随后前往南法电影重镇及海滨小城-戛纳，参观影节宫、星光大道，自由漫步戛纳海滨大道。傍晚抵达尼斯。
夜宿：B B尼斯竞技场酒店或同等3星级酒店
备注：根据不同的气温薰衣草将会在6月中下旬绽放，不同海拔高度和种植品种、一般截止到7月下旬收割。如团期内无法参观薰衣草，则更改为参观陶瓷小镇。

accommodation.text_en: B&B Nice Arenas hotel or an equivalent 3-star hotel. The hotel enjoys an excellent location, adjacent to the Phoenix Park and the Museum of Asian Art, close to the beach and the old town of Nice; the Promenade des Anglais and the beach are just a few minutes away by transport, letting you fully enjoy the charming scenery. The hotel's overall decor is modern and minimalist, with a clean and bright environment; all rooms are equipped with Bultex bedding to ensure you a comfortable sleep. There is a restaurant serving French-style cuisine where you can enjoy local specialties; the hotel's buffet breakfast is plentiful and delicious, not to be missed.
accommodation.text_zh: B B尼斯竞技场酒店或同等3星级酒店 酒店地理位置优越，毗邻凤凰园和亚洲艺术博物馆，靠近海滩、尼斯老城区，距离盎格鲁大道，只需几分钟的交通即可抵达海滩，尽享迷人景色。酒店整体装修风格现代简约，环境整洁明亮，所有客房均配备 Bultex 床上用品，确保您拥有舒适睡眠。拥有一间供应法式风味美食的餐厅，可以享用当地的特色美食；酒店的自助早餐丰盛美味，不容错过。

highlights.text_en:
Flower fields joining into a sea, in pursuit of the romantic floral language of lavender
Every year as summer begins, the lavender fields of Provence bloom in vast stretches, and the whole air is filled with the faint fragrance of lavender. Check in at the romantic, beautiful filming location of Chiung Yao's "Deep in the Clouds Once More," pursue the floral language of lavender awaiting love, and immerse yourself in the sea-like flower fields……
highlights.text_zh:
花田连缀成海，追寻薰衣草浪漫花语
每年入夏，普罗旺斯的薰衣草花田就会大片盛开，整个空气里都弥漫着薰衣草淡淡的花香，打卡琼瑶《又见一帘幽梦》浪漫唯美的拍摄地，追寻着薰衣草等待爱情的花语，沉浸如海花田……

attractions.text_en: Valensole has the most beautiful lavender fields in the Provence region. Driving from the Valensole lavender ocean (Valensole Lavande) to the Lac de Sainte-Croix takes about 40 minutes. It was selected by National Geographic magazine as one of the most beautiful places in the world, and at the same time it is the filming location of Chiung Yao's novels of the same name, "Deep in the Clouds" and "Deep in the Clouds Once More."
attractions.text_zh: 瓦朗索勒拥有普罗旺斯地区美丽的薰衣草花田。开车从瓦朗索勒薰衣草海洋Valensole Lavande 到Lac de Sainte-Croix圣十字湖，大约需要40分钟左右。国家地理杂志评选为世界上美丽的地方之一，同时，这里也是琼瑶同名小说《一帘幽梦》和《又见一帘幽梦》的拍摄地。

attractions.name_en: Verdon Gorge and Lac de Sainte-Croix
attractions.name_zh: 凡尔登大峡谷和圣十字湖
attractions.text_en: The Verdon Gorge is the world's second-largest canyon. This gorge, 25 kilometres long and 700 metres deep, lies in the Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur region and is famous throughout Europe for its magnificent scenery. From a commanding, distinctive vantage point, the Lac de Sainte-Croix is like a smooth piece of emerald set among the mountains. Here there are towering sheer cliffs, gurgling streams, lake water so clear you can see the bottom, and stretching ranges of mountains. Sitting on the cliff-edge viewing platform between the gorge and the lake surface, in that moment you will forget the entire world.
attractions.text_zh: 凡尔登大峡谷是世界第二大峡谷，这座25公里长，700米深的峡谷就在普罗旺斯-蔚蓝海岸大区里，因其壮美的景色而闻名于欧洲。以居高临下独特的视角，圣十字湖仿佛一片平整的翡翠，镶嵌在群山之中。这里有万丈的绝壁，潺潺的小溪，清可见底的湖水，更有连绵的山峦。坐在峡谷于湖面的悬崖景观台上，这一刻会忘记整个世界。

attractions.name_en: Palais des Festivals and the Walk of Fame
attractions.text_en: Built in 1982, it is an important venue of the Cannes Film Festival, where the much-watched Palme d'Or is awarded. The Palais des Festivals currently has a total of 44,000 square metres of exhibition space, containing 15 concert/auditorium halls. The Walk of Fame is one of the not-to-be-missed sights in Cannes; located beside the Palais des Festivals, here you can see the handprints pressed into the pavement by many stars, now totalling more than 300.
attractions.text_zh: 建于 1982 年，是戛纳影展的重要会议地点，备受注目的金棕榈奖即在此颁发。电影宫目前总共有 44000 平方米的展览面积，内含 15 个音乐厅星光大道是到戛纳不可错过的景点之一，位于电影宫旁，可以在这里看到许多明星在这里的人行道上按下的手印，现在已经累计了有300 多个了。

overview.text_en: After breakfast, each honoured guest may choose to sleep in until they wake naturally and check out and leave on their own, or join the group to disperse in the city centre of Nice, ending this wonderful journey!
overview.text_zh: 早餐后，各位贵宾可选择睡到自然醒自行退房离开，或者可跟团到尼斯市区解散，结束美好旅行！

accommodation.text_en:
None. No accommodation on this day
Fee description
accommodation.text_zh:
无 当天无住宿
费用说明

overview.text_en:
After gathering on the day, we set off for Monet's Garden in the small town of Giverny, then cross the Pont de Normandie to Honfleur, the classic Impressionist town, to tour the quaint fishing port the painters depicted. Afterwards we visit the twin cities of Deauville and Trouville, which preserve the most complete Norman-Anglo architectural ensembles, discovering the origins of Norman civilization from the perspective of architectural aesthetics. In the evening we head to Caen, the gastronomic capital of Normandy, and check in at the Ivan Vautier Hotel, where the Ivan Vautier three-course dinner set is recommended.
Overnight: Ivan Vautier Hotel or an equivalent 5-star hotel
Important notice:
1. Depending on the arrangement of departure dates, the touring order of some departures may be adjusted forward or backward, with the outbound and return sequence reversed, but the touring content remains the same. The change of itinerary does not affect the overall experience; the specific itinerary arrangement is subject to the departure notice.
2. Monet's Garden and former residence is closed in winter, open for visits from early April to the end of October each year; the specific opening times are subject to the notice on the official website of Monet's Garden and former residence.
overview.text_zh:
当天集合后出发前往吉维尼小镇的莫奈花园游览，随后横跨诺曼底大桥前往印象派经典小镇——翁弗勒尔，游览画家笔下古色古香的渔村城市。之后前往游览城市保留完整的诺曼-盎格鲁建筑群的双子之城——多维尔和特鲁维尔，从建筑美学的角度发现诺曼底的文明起源，当晚前往诺曼底的美食之都——卡昂，入住伊万沃蒂尔酒店，推荐伊万沃蒂尔三道式晚宴套餐。
夜宿：伊万沃蒂尔酒店或同等5星级酒店
重要提醒：
1、根据团期排列情况，部分团期的行程游览顺序或将前后调整，行程往返次序相反，但游览内容一致，行程改变不影响全程体验，具体行程安排以出团通知书为准。
2、莫奈花园故居冬季关闭，每年自四月初起至十月末参观，具体开放时间以莫奈花园故居官网通知为准。

accommodation.text_en: Ivan Vautier Michelin Hotel or an equivalent 5-star hotel. This Spa hotel, created by Michelin-starred chef Ivan Vautier, is a five-star hotel with a unique classical courtyard setting, featuring a Michelin-starred restaurant, a gourmet tearoom, and a spa center with a Turkish bath and body therapy services. Located in the old town of Caen, it is within walking distance of famous sights such as the Church of Saint-Ouen, the old Church of Saint-Étienne, and the Abbaye aux Hommes (Men's Abbey) of Caen. The rooms are designed in a contemporary Norman art style, and some rooms are decorated with arched windows characteristic of Normandy.
accommodation.text_zh: 伊万沃蒂尔米其林酒店或同等5星级酒店 由米其林星级主厨伊万沃捷创建的这间Spa酒店，是一所拥有独特的古典庭院景观的五星级酒店，配有米其林星级餐厅、美食茶室和土耳其浴室、身体理疗服务的spa中心，位于卡昂古城区、比邻著名景点圣旺教堂、圣艾蒂安老教堂和卡昂男子修道院均可步行距离到达。房间设计充满的当代诺曼底艺术风格，部分房间内饰有诺曼底特有拱形窗。

highlights.text_en:
Ivan Vautier Michelin Restaurant
The homecoming masterpiece of renowned Norman chef Ivan Vautier in his hometown. The refinement and oil-painting-like brilliance are also key reasons for the success of the restaurant's dishes. The collision of Norman seafood with fresh truffle, seasonal vegetables and stunning desserts, in imaginative creative combinations, presents a dual art of taste and presentation. "I only choose ingredients from Normandy, because I only understand the characteristics of Norman farm produce." — Ivan Vautier.
The restaurant is closed for lunch and dinner on Mondays and for dinner on Sundays, and does not accept reservations
highlights.text_zh:
伊万沃蒂尔米其林餐厅
诺曼底知名主厨——伊万沃蒂尔（Ivan Vautier）在家乡的出山之作，精致、如同油画般的绚丽也是餐厅菜品获得成功的重要理由，诺曼底的海产与清松露的碰撞、当季的蔬菜与惊艳的甜品，奇思妙想的创意组合呈现味蕾与造型的双重艺术。“我只选择诺曼底的食材，因为我只懂得诺曼底的农产品的特性”——伊万沃蒂尔。
餐厅每周一午晚餐、周日晚餐休息，不接受预定

attractions.text_en: Honfleur lies at the gateway of the Côte Fleurie (Flower Coast). The flower-filled harbor, the old bell-tower district, and the maze-like old town form the magnificent scenery painted by many Impressionist masters; this ancient thousand-year-old fishing port is an ideal vacation spot. Honfleur has been a historic city and an important maritime port of Normandy since the Middle Ages. From Honfleur you can gaze upon the spectacular Pont de Normandie, and strolling through the quaint streets and alleys of the town center, you can appreciate the exquisite romance and charming character of this seaside town on the Flower Coast.
attractions.text_zh: 翁弗勒尔位于鲜花海岸的门户地带，鲜花海港、古钟楼区和迷宫般的老城，是诸多印象派画师的笔下盛景、这个古老的千年渔港是理想的度假地。翁弗勒尔既是诺曼底中世纪以来历史悠久的城市和重要的航海港口。从翁弗勒尔可以眺望壮观的诺曼底大桥，漫步于市中心的古色古香街道和小巷，可以体会这座鲜花海岸的海滨城市的精致浪漫和迷人之处。

attractions.text_en: Deauville is a city that appears again and again in travel and architecture magazines, possessing the most completely preserved Norman-Anglo architectural ensemble to this day. Along the coastal areas of Deauville, old-style Norman timber-framed mansions can be seen everywhere; it is a popular high-end summer vacation resort.
attractions.text_zh: 多维尔 (Deauville)这座在旅游杂志和建筑杂志上反复出现的城市，拥有至今保留最完整的诺曼-盎格鲁建筑群，多维尔沿岸地区，处处可见老式的诺曼底样式、木质骨架结构的宅邸，是个热门的夏季高级度假胜地。

attractions.text_en: The Norman town of Trouville sits at the mouth of the Touques River, adjacent to Deauville, but the styles of the two cities differ. Deauville, the work of masters and a gathering place of celebrities, appears courtly and noble, while Trouville offers elegance, seaside scenery, and fairy-tale-like colorful castles. Together the two cities form the protected zone of the Norman-Anglo architectural ensemble.
attractions.text_zh: 坐落在图克河入海口的诺曼底小镇特鲁维尔，毗邻多维尔Deauville，但是两座城市的风格不尽相同。多维尔是大师手笔名流云集，显得宫廷贵气，而特鲁维尔的优雅、海滨景致，童话般的彩色城堡。两城共同构成了诺曼-盎格鲁建筑群保护区。

attractions.text_en: Monet's Garden is located 88 kilometers northwest of Paris, in the Upper Normandy province. In 1883, Monet was captivated by this place as he passed by on the train, so he moved here to live. Over 43 years, Monet spent half his life here, creating countless works. Monet called "the garden my most beautiful work." Today, 85 years after Monet's passing, the place is still maintained in the original state of Monet's day. From the tulips when the garden opens in April, to the most famous water lilies in midsummer, to the chrysanthemums before it closes in October, here you can find the colors from Monet's paintings.
attractions.text_zh: 莫奈花园位于巴黎西北方向88公里，属于上诺曼底省。1883年，莫奈坐火车经过这里时被这里所吸引，于是搬来此居住。43年的时间，莫奈一半的人生在这里度过，创作了无数著作。莫奈自称“花园是我最美的作品”。莫奈走了85年后的今天，这里依旧按照莫奈当年生活的原状维护着。从4月开园时的郁金香，到盛夏最著名的睡莲，10月闭馆前的菊花，你在这里可以找到莫奈画中的色彩。

attractions.text_en: The Pont de Normandie is 2 kilometers long, spanning the left and right banks of the Seine near the river mouth, connecting Le Havre and Honfleur. The two "V"-shaped guardrails of the bridge are very eye-catching, making the whole bridge look like a giant work of art.
attractions.text_zh: 诺曼底大桥长达2公里，横跨入海口附近的塞纳河左右两岸，将勒阿弗尔和翁弗勒尔连接起来。桥身的两个“V”形护栏非常引人瞩目，整个桥就像一件巨大的艺术品。

overview.text_en:
In the morning we head to the isolated island off the coast of Normandy — Mont Saint-Michel, to tour the Mont Saint-Michel scenic area. Depending on the tides, we view the mirror-like shallow tidal flats of the Norman seawater at the foot of the mount. Afterwards we head to the Devil's City — Saint-Malo, to tour the old town of Saint-Malo and the seaside city district, then head to the Loire Valley region to check in at the hotel.
Overnight: Château de la Tortinière or an equivalent 5-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
当天上午前往诺曼底海滩的独立小岛——圣米歇尔山，游览圣米歇尔山景区，根据潮汐情况游览位于山脚下如同镜片的诺曼底海水浅水滩涂，之后前往魔鬼城——圣马洛，游览圣马洛老城及海滨城中区，随后前往卢瓦河谷大区入住酒店。
夜宿：达赫蒂涅城堡酒店 或同等5星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Château de la Tortinière or an equivalent 5-star hotel. The Château de la Tortinière is set in 25 hectares of French-style gardens, adjacent to the Château de Chenonceau in the Loire Valley. People can easily see this majestic art château built of white stone from afar, with Doric granite columns and several Romanesque wall lamps embedded on the walls, presenting a resplendent and elegantly magnificent appearance. The main part of the château was designed by the famous 17th-century architect Jean-Michel Chevotet. The château once received Queen Elizabeth of England. The hotel rooms preserve the style of the François era and antique furniture, with conference salons and a hunting hall, and the restaurant offers Louis-era style cuisine and banquet customs. The château provides an ultimate luxurious aristocratic experience.
(Our agency selects elegant double rooms for guests, which may be distributed in three areas of the château: the banquet hall, the attic, and the gazebo. If guests have specific requirements regarding room type or area, please contact customer service to upgrade the room type before registration.)
accommodation.text_zh:
达赫蒂涅城堡酒店或同等5星级酒店 达赫蒂涅城堡酒店坐落在25公顷的法式花园中，毗邻卢瓦尔河谷舍农索城堡，人们可以轻易从远处看到这座雄伟的由白色石头堆砌的艺术城堡，陶立克式花岗石立柱及嵌挂于壁上的数盏罗马式风灯，金碧辉煌和典雅华丽的风貌。城堡的主体部分为十七世纪著名建筑师Jean-Michel Chevotet设计，城堡曾经接待过英国伊丽莎白女王，酒店房间保留弗朗索瓦时期的风格和古董家具，会议沙龙及狩猎厅，餐厅为路易时期风格菜品和宴会习俗，城堡提供极致奢华的贵族体验。
（我社为宾客选择典雅大床房，可能分布在城堡的宴会、阁楼、凉亭三个区域，如宾客对房型或区域有指定要求、敬请在报名前联系客服升级房型）

highlights.text_en:
The Old City of Saint-Malo
This ancient Breton city, built in the Middle Ages, is a renowned European vacation resort. Not only because the old town is surrounded by towering pirate walls and was a transit point for the slave trade, today Saint-Malo is a city of gastronomy. The ancient buildings within the four square kilometers of the old town center are all filled with all sorts of gourmet restaurants, each with its own character, each looking like good business, each filled at any time with gourmands from various countries. The naval spirit, the red-topped lighthouse, all kinds of cafés, bars, gourmet restaurants, and vivid specialty shops are everywhere. "The fish-market quay is the truly outstanding atmosphere of Brittany; travel is about bringing your eyes and your stomach." — Faut pas Rêver, the world-famous travel program.
highlights.text_zh:
圣马洛古城
这座建设于中世纪的布列塔尼古城，作为欧洲知名的度假胜地。不仅仅是由于老城区被高耸的海盗城墙环绕和贩卖奴隶的中转站，今天、圣马洛是一所美食之城，古城中心四平方公里的古建筑屋内全部是各种各样的美食餐厅，每一家餐厅都各具特色，每一家餐厅看着都生意很好，每一家餐厅无论何时都填充着各国的饕餮们，海军魂、红顶灯塔、各种咖啡、酒吧、美食餐厅、活色生香的特色店铺比比皆是。“鱼市码头才是布列塔尼的卓越气氛，旅游是要带着眼睛和肚子。”——世界知名旅游节目Faut pas Rêver。

attractions.text_en: A pilgrimage site for Catholics, with the famous Abbey of Saint-Michel built on the summit. In the 8th century, the cardinal Aubert built it dedicated to the Archangel Michael, making it a pilgrimage center, hence the name Mont Saint-Michel. The small island where Mont Saint-Michel is located is conical in shape, 900 meters in circumference, formed of towering granite, and is often surrounded by vast sandy shores, becoming an island only at high tide.
attractions.text_zh: 天主教徒的朝圣地，山顶建有著名的圣弥额尔山隐修院。公元8世纪，红衣主教奥贝为奉献给天使长米歇尔所建，成为朝圣中心，故称米歇尔山。圣米歇尔山所处的小岛呈圆锥形，周长900米，由耸立的花岗岩构成，经常被大片沙岸包围，仅涨潮时才成为岛。

attractions.text_en: The Abbey of Mont Saint-Michel is located on Mont Saint-Michel. Shaped by nature, Mont Saint-Michel is one of the great wonders of the world, and the abbey and great cathedral on the mount hold a supreme status in the hearts of Christians. Aubert built a small chapel on a high point of the island, dedicated to the Archangel Michael, making it a pilgrimage center. During Napoleon's reign, the abbey also served as a state prison. To this day, although the abbey has been designed and rebuilt by many architects, it still maintains a plain, unadorned, quaint and antique style.
attractions.text_zh: 圣米歇尔山修道院位于圣米歇尔山上。圣米歇尔山经大自然的造化，是世界的一大奇观，山上的修道院和大教堂更在基督教徒的心目中有着无上的地位。奥伯特在岛上高处修建一座小教堂，奉献给大天使米歇尔，成为朝圣中心。拿破仑执政期间，修道院也曾作为国家监狱。到如今，修道院虽然经诸多建筑师设计改建，但依旧保持着朴实无华、古色古香的格调。

attractions.text_en: Saint-Malo is well preserved in medieval style. Because it once had to defend against pirate attacks, it is also called the "Pirate City," and today many ancient sailing ships are still moored in the harbor. Strolling through the old town, the narrow alleys and ancient buildings make one feel as if in a medieval city. You can also climb the city walls to gaze upon the vast beach, lie on the beach to sunbathe, play in the waves, and explore the reefs in the distance. Because this is the river mouth, separated from the old town by the sea, there are special cruise boats that ferry between the two cities. As a tourist city, Saint-Malo not only has a profound sense of history, but its various souvenir shops, supermarkets, and hotels provide very convenient modern services for travelers, so this is absolutely the best choice for a vacation.
attractions.text_zh: 圣马洛是保存完好的中世纪风格，这里曾经因为要抵御海盗的袭击，故又称为“海盗城”，今天在港口中还停靠着很多古代帆船。漫步在老城中，狭窄的小巷，古老的建筑让人仿佛置身中世纪的古城。还可以登上城墙眺望辽阔的海滩，也可以躺在海滩上晒太阳，踏浪玩耍，还可以去探访远处的礁石。因为这里是入海口，并且和老城隔海相望，当地还有专门的游轮在两个城之间摆渡。作为旅游城市，圣马洛不仅有厚重的历史感，各种纪念品商店超市酒店为游人提供非常方便的现代服务，所以这里绝对是度假的最佳选择。

attractions.name_en: The Beach and Coastal Fortifications of Saint-Malo
attractions.name_zh: 圣马洛海滩和海防工事
attractions.text_en: The coastal fortifications form a long ring, a completely preserved medieval coastal military fortress, encircling the old town, gazing toward the Devil's Isle and the British island of Jersey, the old slave prison, with large numbers of seabirds circling and sailing ships surging one after another. Going from the city of Saint-Malo into the pedestrian street within the city walls, then coming to the beach side, is very pleasant. Not far from the beach is the French national defense line, a square fortress, which can be walked to on foot at low tide. The whole city of Saint-Malo gives a very comfortable feeling, a medieval pirate city worthy of its name.
attractions.text_zh: 海防工事环形的长长的一片，保持完整的中世纪海防军事要塞、环绕古城、眺望魔鬼导和英国的泽西岛屿，奴隶古监狱，大量的海鸟盘旋和一艘艘帆船涌动，从圣马洛市里进入到城墙中的步行街，再来到海滩这边，非常舒服，离海滩不远处有法国国土防线，为方形堡垒，可以在退潮的时候步行前往，整个圣马洛城给人的感觉很舒服，名副其实中世纪海盗城。

overview.text_en: In the morning we visit the Château de Chenonceau, a château built on the water in the Loire Valley. Afterwards we head north, visiting along the way the exquisite and quaint old town of Blois, and finally visit the Château de Chambord in the Loire Valley. Along the D952 riverside avenue, in the pristine Loire Valley region, untamed roe deer and wild boar hide in the woods, and the most magnificent château in all of France — the Château de Chambord — rises majestically. Its layout is also the typical medieval château layout, a hunting palace of the kings of France. Afterwards we return to Paris and check in at the hotel.
overview.text_zh: 上午前往游览卢瓦尔河谷里一座建在水上的城堡——舍农索城堡，之后北上沿途参观精致古朴的布洛瓦老城，最后参观卢瓦尔河谷香波堡，沿着D952河畔大道在原生态卢瓦河谷地区的丛林里隐藏着从未被驯服的獐鹿、野猪，巍然耸立着全法兰西最恢弘的城堡--香波堡，布局也是中世纪典型的古堡布局，是法国君王狩猎的行宫，之后返回巴黎，入住酒店。

accommodation.text_en: Mercure Paris Gare de Lyon or an equivalent 4-star hotel. The hotel is located next to the Gare de Lyon railway station. The Mercure Paris Gare de Lyon TGV is an ideal choice for business travelers, with five meeting rooms and a Coworking Station collaborative space. You can work out in the gym or relax at the Corner Station café and its private terrace. Enjoy a rich breakfast, either buffet or in-room dining. In the center of Paris, start a colorful city tour!
accommodation.text_zh: 巴黎里昂车站美居酒店或同等4星级酒店 酒店位于里昂火车站旁，Mercure Paris Gare de Lyon TGV 是商务旅客的理想选择，设有五间会议室和 Coworking Station 协作空间。您可以在健身房锻炼，或在 Corner Station 咖啡厅及其私人露台放松身心。享用丰富的早餐，自助或客房送餐均可。在巴黎市中心，开启多彩的城市之旅！

highlights.text_en:
World Cultural Heritage — The Loire Valley Château District
The Loire Valley châteaux display the most classical and traditional charm of France. As one of France's larger tourist regions, the Loire Valley offers you a tourist route of 280 kilometers, from Sully-sur-Loire in the Loiret department to Chalonnes-sur-Loire in Anjou. Harmony is perhaps the most notable feature here, whether the châteaux built upon the rivers or the gardens hidden deep in the forests, all reflecting one another along the banks of the Loire — the lush green grapevines on both banks of the valley, the quaint towns, and the châteaux as brilliant as the stars. "The Loire is another galaxy, and the châteaux are those stars." — Anjelica Huston.
highlights.text_zh:
世界文化遗产——卢瓦尔河谷城堡区
卢瓦尔河谷城堡群，展现着法兰西最古典与传统的风情，卢瓦尔河谷作为法国较大的旅游景区：从卢瓦雷省（leLoiret）的叙利（SullysurLoire）到安茹（Anjou）的沙洛那（ChalonnessurLoire），卢瓦尔河谷为您提供了一条长达280公里的旅游线路。和谐也许是这里最显著的一个特征，无论是建筑在河流上的城堡，还是躲藏在深林中的花园，在卢瓦河沿岸交相辉映，河谷两岸郁郁葱葱的葡萄树，古朴的小镇，还有灿若星辰的城堡。“卢瓦河是另一个银河，而城堡是那些星星。”——蕙兰·休斯顿

attractions.text_en: Although the old town of Blois was almost completely destroyed during World War II, the restored city architecture is still well worth seeing. Especially the bell-and-drum tower of the church, which glows brilliantly under the light projection at night. Across from the church is the House of the Acrobats, decorated with wood carvings of clowns from medieval farces, one of the few 15th-century old houses that survived the war.
attractions.text_zh: 尽管布洛瓦老城区在二战时几乎被毁于一旦，但修复后的城市建筑依然非常值得一看。尤其是教堂的钟鼓楼，在 晚上的灯光投影下光彩熠熠。教堂对面是杂技演员之家，装饰着中世纪滑稽戏中的小丑木雕，是战争中幸存下来 的为数不多的15世纪古屋。

attractions.text_en: Architecture of the 15th and 16th centuries, gardens planted full of Mediterranean plants, and two huge knight's towers. Linked together by the main keep, the gallery, the terrace, and the round tower, it spans the surface of the Cher River, a tributary of the Loire, and is the most romantic "water château" among the Loire Valley châteaux, likened to a ship moored on the Cher River. The Château de Chenonceau is also called the "Ladies' Château," because the owners of this château over several generations were all women, both noblewomen and heroines. This is a three-story château, whose great feature is that it spans the river. This happens to match the tender, water-like gentleness of Chenonceau as the Ladies' Château. Here you can admire the magnificent scenery along the Loire.
attractions.text_zh: 15世纪和16世纪的建筑, 种满地中海植物的花园和两座庞大的骑士塔楼。由主堡垒 、长廊 、平台和圆塔串联而 成，横跨卢瓦尔河支流希尔河河面，是卢瓦尔河谷宫堡群中最富有浪漫情调的"水上城堡"，被喻为停泊在希尔河 上的航船。舍农索城堡又被称为“女人堡”。因为这座城堡的几代主人全是女的，既是贵妇又是女中豪杰。这是 一座三层的城堡，其大特色是城堡是横跨河上的。这正好与舍农梭堡是女人堡的柔情似水相吻合。这里可以观 赏到卢瓦尔河畔的壮丽景色。

attractions.text_en: One of the Loire Valley châteaux, with a relatively typical medieval château layout, a hunting palace of the kings of France. The Château de Chambord was built during the reign of François I. In its layout, form, and style of decoration, it reflects the traditional architectural art of France, while also being influenced by the Italian Renaissance, becoming one of the representative works of the French Renaissance period. It is regarded by the French as a national treasure worth showing off. In 1981, the Château de Chambord was inscribed on the World Heritage List.
attractions.text_zh: 卢瓦尔河谷城堡群中的一个，较为典型的中世纪古堡布局，是法国君王狩猎的行宫。香博堡兴建于弗朗斯瓦 一世时期。它在布局 、造型 、风格装饰上反映了法国传统的建筑艺术，同时又受到意大利文艺复兴的影响，成 为法国文艺复兴时期的代表作之一。被法国人视为值得炫耀的国宝。1981年，香博堡列入了世界遗产名录。

overview.text_en:
On the day, take the French high-speed train TGV to Southern France on your own (no tour guide accompanying on the train), with a journey of about 2 to 3 hours. After arrival, gather and begin the tour of Provençal towns, visiting in turn: Fontaine-de-Vaucluse, the old town of Gordes, and the Abbaye de Sénanque (exterior), then check in at the hotel.
Overnight: Novotel Avignon Nord or an equivalent 4-star hotel
Important terms:
1. Due to tight high-speed train availability in summer in the Provence region, subject to cancellation risks from high-temperature shutdowns, strikes, and delays, the itineraries of the French railway company SNCF may, depending on availability, be adjusted to the Pont-du-Gard station or the Montpellier Sud de France station, in which case shuttle buses will be provided to connect the different train stations in Southern France. The order of the first and last days of the itinerary may be adjusted; this is regarded as an equivalent itinerary and not as an itinerary change.
2. Some departures of this product may include the Marne-la-Vallée train station, 38 minutes by car from the Gare de Lyon in Paris (Paris RER Line A); please consult sales before purchase.
3. During the Avignon Theatre Festival from July 4 to July 25, 2026, hotel locations may be adjusted; the specifics are subject to the departure notice.
4. There is no tour guide accompanying on the high-speed train; please board the train with your ticket on your own. Train tickets are issued under real names, requiring you to carry your passport and an electronic version of the train ticket.
overview.text_zh:
当天自行乘坐法国高铁TGV前往南法（高铁上无导游陪同），高铁时长约2至3小时。 抵达后集合，开启普罗旺斯小镇之旅，依次游览：泉水小镇、高德古城、塞南克修道院（外观），随后入住酒店。
夜宿：阿维尼翁北部诺富特酒店或同等4星酒店
重要条款：
1. 由于普罗旺斯地区的夏季高铁位置紧张、受到高温停运、罢工、延期等取消风险，法国铁路运输公司SNCF的行程，根据可用性可能会调整到嘉尔站（Pont-du-Gard）或蒙彼利埃（Montpellier Sud de France）站，届时将提供穿梭巴士衔接南法不同火车站，可能会调整第一天和最后一天的行程的先后顺序，视为同等行程，不视为行程调整。
2.本产品的部分团期可能会包含马恩河谷火车站， 距离巴黎里昂火车站38分钟车程（巴黎轻轨A线）敬请 购买前咨询销售。
3.2026年7月4日至7月25日阿维尼翁戏剧节期间，酒店位置可能会有调整，具体以出团通知书为准。
4.高铁无导游陪同，请自行持票乘坐高铁，火车票为实名制，需要携带护照及电子版火车票。

accommodation.text_en: Novotel Avignon Nord or an equivalent 4-star hotel. The Novotel Avignon Nord is set in the green-surrounded heartland of Provence, about 15 minutes by car from the historic city center of Avignon, making it an ideal place to stay for exploring the city of the popes and the Provençal countryside. The hotel adopts an overall modern minimalist style, blending the natural atmosphere of Provence, with a tranquil environment, spacious and bright guest rooms and family rooms, fully equipped room facilities, a restaurant featuring local fresh ingredients and French cuisine, and a bar and terrace area that are ideal spaces to relax over a drink and enjoy the Southern French sunshine.
accommodation.text_zh: 阿维尼翁城北诺富特酒店或同等4星酒店 阿维尼翁城北诺富特酒店坐落于绿意环绕的普罗旺斯腹地，距离阿维尼翁历史城区约15分钟车程，是探索教皇之城与普罗旺斯乡村的理想下榻之选。酒店整体采用现代简约风格，融合普罗旺斯自然气息，环境宁静，拥有宽敞明亮的客房与家庭房，房间设施齐全，餐厅主打当地新鲜食材与法式料理，酒吧及露台区域是放松小酌、享受南法阳光的理想空间。

highlights.text_en:
Visit the prototype of Miyazaki's "Castle in the Sky" — the old town of Gordes
The buildings in the town were all built in the Middle Ages, with winding gravel paths leading up, stone benches in front of doors wreathed in green vines, and flowers in front of the abbey. Its unique style, and the tranquil, quaint town, are like a history book, vividly displaying the medieval scene.
Avignon Street Art Theatre Festival
Every July, Avignon transforms into the capital of theatre and street art, with spectacular puppet shows, operas, contemporary street art performances, and concerts. All-night street theatre performances light up the entire night of Avignon.
highlights.text_zh:
拜访宫崎骏笔下《天空之城》的原型——高德古城
城中建筑均建于中世纪，蜿蜒而上的碎石路，青藤环绕的门前石凳，修道院前的鲜花，独特的风格，宁谧古朴的小镇仿佛一部史书，将中世纪的风貌活灵活现的展示。
阿维尼翁街头艺术戏剧节
每年的7月份阿维尼翁摇身一变成为了戏剧及街头艺术的首都，精彩绝伦的木偶剧，歌剧，当代街头艺术表演及音乐会，通宵的街头戏剧表演点亮整个阿维尼翁的夜晚。

attractions.text_en: The Provençal spring town of Fontaine-de-Vaucluse, about half an hour's journey from Avignon, is a renowned spring resort village in Southern France with a distinctive Provençal charm. The town is quaint and small, nestling quietly beside the spring. In the scorching summer, the residents here do not experience the unbearable heat; the cool spring water flowing down from the mountains carries away the burning air and brings wave after wave of refreshing coolness.
attractions.text_zh: 普罗旺斯泉水小镇（Fontaine de vaucluse），离 Avignon 大约半小时的路程，它是南法知名的泉水度假小村，具有别致的普罗旺斯风情，小镇古朴而小巧，静静的依偎在泉水之畔。炎炎夏日，这里的居民却体会不到那份酷暑难当，从山中流淌来的清凉泉水，带走了炙热的空气，送来了一波波爽人清凉。

attractions.text_en: In the valley facing the Luberon mountains, there is an ancient city built against the mountain, with stone walls, houses, hillsides, and a castle, set off against the blue sky and white clouds — this is the very famous tourist destination of the Provence region, Gordes, also translated as "Gaode." This hilltop ancient city once attracted many artists to stay here, and the 16th-century Château de Gordes stands prominently on the hilltop, housing many works by artists. In the towns of France, the artistic atmosphere is everywhere; a signboard, a shop window, all appear so exquisite. The brightly colored handicrafts and postcards attract children's eyes — what a delightful thing it is to browse the small shops.
attractions.text_zh: 在吕贝隆山区对面的山谷里，有一座依山而建的古城，石壁、房屋、山坡、城堡，映衬着蓝天白云，这就是普罗旺斯地区非常著名的旅游胜地——勾禾德，也有译作“高德”。这座山丘古城曾经吸引了许多艺术家在此停留，山顶上16世纪的高德城堡卓然矗立，里面收藏了许多艺术家的作品。法国的小镇，艺术气息无处不在，一个招牌，一个橱窗，都显得那么的精致。色彩绚丽的手工艺品和明信片吸引着孩子们的眼球，逛小店是件多么开心的事情啊。

attractions.text_en: The Abbaye de Sénanque is located 2 kilometers north of the stone-town of Gordes. It was built in 1148 by the monks of the Mazan Abbey. The entire abbey is hidden in a tranquil valley and is also the story setting of the book "A Year in Provence." This place is known as one of "the most beautiful valleys in all of France," and most postcards are photographed here. Even so, the lavender fields here are relatively small in scale, and sometimes tourists are quite dense; please try to keep quiet during the visit.
attractions.text_zh: 塞南克修道院位于石头城小镇北方 2 公里处, 它是由 Mazan 修道院的僧侣们修建于 1148 年，整个修道院隐藏在宁静的山谷中，也是《山居岁月》一书的故事背景。这里被称为“全法国最美丽的山谷”之一，大部分明信片都取景于此。尽管如此，这里的薰衣草花田规模却相对较小，有时候游客较为密集，参观的时候请尽量保持安静。

overview.text_en:
After breakfast, tour the old city of Avignon on your own, the Pont d'Avignon (the Broken Bridge) (exterior), and the Palais des Papes (Palace of the Popes) (exterior), then head to the Pont de Gau Ornithological Park and the Southern French town of Aigues-Mortes, then take the Aigues-Mortes sightseeing train to tour the pink salt lake. In the afternoon we head to the city center of Marseille for sightseeing; Marseille gives a sense of unembellished wild charm. You can choose to visit the Palais Longchamp park, the Basilica of Notre-Dame de la Garde, and the Old Port of Marseille. Afterwards check in at the hotel.
Overnight: Novotel Marseille or Crowne Plaza, an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
早餐后，自行参观阿维尼翁古城，罗纳河断桥（外观），阿维尼翁教皇宫（外观），随后前往蓬德高鸟类公园和南法小镇艾格莫尔特、随后乘坐艾格莫尔特观光火车游览粉红盐湖，下午前往马赛市区游览，马赛让人有一种没有过多修饰的野性风情感，可选择参观隆尚宫公园，守护圣母圣殿，马赛旧港。之后入住酒店。
夜宿：马赛诺富特酒店或皇冠酒店同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en: Novotel Marseille or Crowne Plaza, an equivalent 4-star hotel. The hotel is located in a prime location in the center of Marseille, with easy access to the Old Port, the city center, and the major sights of the Côte d'Azur. The hotel's overall style is modern and comfortable, with spacious and bright guest rooms and complete facilities. The hotel has a restaurant and bar, offering a rich breakfast and light meal options, making it an ideal choice for exploring the urban charm of Marseille and the Mediterranean ambiance.
accommodation.text_zh: 马赛诺富特酒店或皇冠假日酒店同等4星级酒店 酒店位于马赛市中心优越地段，轻松前往老港、市中心及蔚蓝海岸各大景点。酒店整体风格现代舒适，客房宽敞明亮，设施齐全。酒店内设餐厅与酒吧，提供丰富早餐及轻食选择，是探索马赛城市魅力与地中海风情的理想之选。

highlights.text_en:
The Camargue wetlands are a delta conservation area where the Southern French coast meets the rivers, and are an important habitat for flamingos. Together with the quaint Aigues-Mortes and the algae-rich pink lake water, they form a rose-colored Mediterranean coast vacation paradise.
Dreamy Pink Salt Lake
A natural pink landscape formed by salt-loving algae and high salinity, rich in layers under the sun, with white salt mounds up to several meters high, extremely visually striking; the pink lake surface, blue sky, and white salt mountains have an extremely high photogenic rate, a popular Instagram check-in spot. Along the way you can see flamingos, wetland vegetation, and the salt-field ecosystem — a unique scenic spot combining nature, industrial heritage, and regional culture.
Pont de Gau Ornithological Park
Flocks of flamingos can be seen all year round, the most representative birds of the Camargue; lakes, reed beds, and salt marshes interweave, fully presenting the natural wetland ecosystem of the Camargue; a habitat for 300+ bird species such as egrets, gray herons, pelicans, and white ibises, with wild birds frequently appearing; visit on pristine trails, with boardwalks and circular paths, gentle throughout, suitable for all ages, a renowned European holy land for bird photography and nature observation.
highlights.text_zh:
卡马格湿地是南法海滨和河流交接的三角洲保护区，也是火烈鸟的重要栖息地，与古朴的艾格莫尔特，富含藻类的粉红湖水，一共构成的玫瑰色的地中海海岸的度假圣地。
梦幻粉色盐湖
因嗜盐藻与高盐度形成天然粉色景观，阳光下层次丰富，高达数米的白色盐丘，极具视觉冲击力；粉色湖面 、 蓝天 、白盐山，出片率极高，网红ins风打卡地， 沿途可见火烈鸟、湿地植被、盐田生态系统， 结合自然、工业遗产与地域文化的独特景点。
蓬格高鸟类公园
全年可见成群的火烈鸟，是卡马格最具代表性的鸟类；湖泊、芦苇荡、盐沼交错，完整呈现卡马格自然 湿地生态系统 ；鹭鸟、苍鹭、鹈鹕、白鹮等 300+种鸟类栖息地， 野生鸟类频繁出没；原生态步道参观，木栈道与环形步道，全程平缓，适合各年龄段，是欧洲知名鸟类 摄影与自然观察圣地 。

attractions.text_en: The Pont de Gau Ornithological Park is located in the heart of the Camargue wetlands and is an important flamingo habitat, also famous worldwide for flamingo viewing. The flamingos near the salt lake feed on the algae and shrimp in the lake, and their feathers turn a faint pink, lively and beautiful. The withered yellow reed beds, the white herds of horses, the pink salt marshes and flamingos, and the dark marsh lakes are all worth stopping for, lingering in this unique natural scenery.
attractions.text_zh: 蓬德高鸟类公园位于卡马格湿地中心地带，是重要的火烈鸟栖息地，也因火烈鸟观赏而闻名于世界。盐湖附近的火烈鸟以湖中的藻类和虾为食，羽毛也会变成淡淡的粉红色，灵动唯美。枯黄的芦苇地、白色的马群、粉红色的盐沼和火烈鸟、深色的沼泽湖泊，都值得我们停下脚步，流连于这独特的自然风光。

attractions.text_en: Board the sightseeing train of the pink salt lake for a tour of over an hour in the central area of the Aigues-Mortes salt lake. The pink lake water blends with the snow-white quartz-sand beach on the shore, like a strawberry ice cream. Long-term sunlight and the high-salinity lake water cause the lake to produce large amounts of the β-carotene-rich Dunaliella salina algae, making the surface of the salt lake appear pink.
attractions.text_zh: 登上粉红盐湖的观光小火车，在艾格莫尔盐湖的中心地区进行一个多小时的游览。粉红的湖水与岸边雪白的石英沙滩相交融，如同草莓雪糕。长期光照和高含盐量湖水，令湖中产生大量丰富的β-胡萝卜素的杜氏盐藻，使得盐湖表面呈现粉红色。

attractions.text_en: Aigues-Mortes is a town between "salt" and "sea," named for the marshes and the still pink lake water surrounding it on all sides. Aigues-Mortes is a traditional pink-salt production place in France, and also one of France's earliest representative sights of agricultural civilization. The ancient city, blue sky, and pink salt lake set each other off, with people and nature jointly depicting this fairy-tale-like scene.
attractions.text_zh: 艾格莫尔特是处于“盐”与“海”之间的小镇，因其四周环布沼泽与不流动的粉红湖水而得名。艾格莫尔是法国传统的粉盐生产的地，也是法国最早的农业文明代表景点。古城、蓝天，粉红盐湖相映相成，人与自然共同描绘了这幅童话般的画面。

attractions.text_en: The Old Port of Marseille is one of the most iconic and historically significant places in this Mediterranean city. Since the Greeks founded Marseille in 600 BC, the Old Port has been the heart of the city. Today, the Old Port is not only a mooring place for fishing boats and yachts, but also a popular gathering place for local residents and tourists. Beautiful seaside avenues surround both sides of the Old Port, lined with cafés, restaurants, and bars, making it an excellent place to enjoy the flavorful cuisine of Marseille and leisure time. Whether the early-morning fish market, the lively market, or the lights and music at night, this place is full of unique charm and vitality.
attractions.text_zh: 马赛老港是这座地中海城市最具标志性和历史意义的地点之一。自古希腊人于公元前600年建立马赛以来，老港一直是这座城市的心脏。如今，老港不仅是渔船和游艇的停泊地，也是当地居民和游客的热门聚集地。老港两侧环绕着美丽的滨海大道，沿岸布满了咖啡馆、餐馆和酒吧，是享受马赛风味美食和休闲时光的绝佳场所。无论是清晨的渔市、热闹的市场，还是夜晚的灯光与音乐，这里都充满了独特的魅力和活力。

attractions.name_en: Basilica of Notre-Dame de la Garde, Marseille
attractions.text_en: Europe's churches are countless, but Marseille's Basilica of Notre-Dame de la Garde is one absolutely not to be missed. The gilded statue of the Madonna and Child atop the church is the symbol of Marseille, and also the patron saint of sailors, fishermen, and all Marseille people. The Basilica of Notre-Dame de la Garde sits atop a small hill 154 meters high, with an observation deck outside, making it an excellent place to view Marseille and the Mediterranean islands.
attractions.text_zh: 欧洲的教堂数不胜数，马赛的守护圣母教堂是绝对不能错过的一座。教堂顶上的圣母圣子金像是马赛的象征，同时也是水手、渔民和所有马赛人的保护神。守护圣母教堂座落在一座154米高的小山丘上，外设有观景台，是观赏马赛和地中海小岛的绝佳地点。

attractions.text_en: The Palais Longchamp is an arc-shaped building, integrating Baroque, Roman, and Oriental styles, and is very magnificent. At its center is a group of sculptures and a fountain on the theme of "Hymn to Water," with a gallery extending out on each side. Newlyweds often come here to take wedding photos, so young ladies who enjoy traveling in wedding dresses might as well take a tour.
attractions.text_zh: 隆尚宫是一座弧形的建筑，集巴洛克、罗马及东方风格为一体，十分宏伟。它的中央是以“水之赞歌”为主题的群雕和喷泉，两边各延伸出去一段回廊，经常有新人来此拍摄婚纱照，喜欢带婚纱旅游的MM不妨一游。

attractions.text_en: Avignon is a world-famous historic and cultural city, the heart of Provence, and is also called the "City of the Popes." It is also the venue of the world-famous Avignon Theatre Festival, and every July it becomes a holy land for theatre lovers. The old city of Avignon is surrounded by city walls, within which are the Palais des Papes (Palace of the Popes) and the square, and outside the city is the Pont d'Avignon (the Broken Bridge of Avignon) — all medieval historical buildings, full of cultural weight and a sense of history!
attractions.text_zh: 阿维尼翁Avigon，是世界历史文化名城，普罗旺斯的心脏，还被称为“教皇之城”。这里还是世界著名戏剧节阿维尼翁戏剧节的举办地，每年的7月这里就成为了戏剧爱好者的圣地。阿维尼翁老城由城墙环绕，城内有阿维尼翁教皇宫、广场，城外有阿维尼翁断桥，都是中世纪时期的历史建筑，充满了文化的厚重感与历史感！

overview.text_en:
After breakfast, set off for the lavender fields of Valensole and the D907 road (during the lavender blooming season), immersing yourself in the romantic sea of flowers and leaving behind purple memories; in the afternoon head to the Southern French film hub and seaside town of Cannes, visiting the Palais des Festivals and the Walk of Fame, and freely strolling the Cannes seaside avenue, then head to the medieval art village of Saint-Paul-de-Vence sitting atop a mountain. In the evening head to Antibes and tour the old town of Antibes on your own. Afterwards check in at the hotel.
Overnight: Novotel Antibes Sophia Antipolis or an equivalent 4-star hotel
Note: Each year from mid-to-late May, large amounts of purple lupines (Lupinus Violet) bloom in Provence. Depending on the varying temperatures, the lavender will bloom in mid-to-late June, and depending on the different altitudes and cultivated varieties, it is generally harvested by late July. If the lavender cannot be visited during the departure period, the visit will be changed to the ceramic town.
overview.text_zh:
早餐后出发前往瓦朗索勒及D907公路的薰衣草花田（薰衣草花期期间），置身浪漫花海，留下紫色记忆；下午 前往南法电影重镇及海滨小城-戛纳，参观影节宫、星光大道，自由漫步戛纳海滨大道，随后 前往坐落在山顶上的中世纪艺术村庄圣保罗德旺斯。傍晚前往昂提布，自行游览昂提布老城。之后入住酒店。
夜宿：诺富特安提比斯索非亚安蒂波利斯或同等4星酒店
备注：每年5月中下旬开始、普罗旺斯盛开大量的紫色鲁冰花（Lupinus Violet），根据不同的气温薰衣草将会在6月中下旬绽放，不同海拔高度和种植品种、一般截止到7月下旬收割。如团期内无法参观薰衣草，则更改为参观陶瓷小镇。

accommodation.text_en: Novotel Antibes or an equivalent 4-star hotel. The hotel is set in the core heartland of the Côte d'Azur, surrounded by greenery, in a tranquil environment. The hotel offers very convenient access to the old town of Antibes and the Mediterranean coastline. The hotel's overall style is modern and elegant, incorporating Mediterranean natural elements, with spacious and bright guest rooms. The hotel restaurant LE Fedor and the bar area offer a rich breakfast, Mediterranean-flavored lunch/dinner, and relaxing drink service. Guests can choose to dine in the restaurant, on the terrace, or in their rooms — a high-quality hotel combining modern style with the natural scenery of the Mediterranean.
accommodation.text_zh: 昂提布诺富特酒店或同等4星酒店 酒店坐落于蔚蓝海岸核心腹地，绿意环绕、环境静谧。酒店前往昂提布老城及地中海海岸线也十分便捷，酒店整体风格现代雅致，融入地中海自然元素，客房空间宽敞明亮，酒店餐厅 LE Fedor 和酒吧区域提供丰盛的早餐、地中海风味午餐/晚餐及轻松饮品服务，宾客可选择在餐厅、露台或客房内用餐，是一处兼具现代格调与地中海自然风光的高品质酒店。

highlights.text_en:
Flower fields stretching into a sea, pursuing the romantic flower language of lavender
Every year at the start of summer, the lavender fields of Provence bloom in vast stretches, and the whole air is suffused with the faint fragrance of lavender. Check in at the romantic and beautiful filming location of Chiung Yao's "Dream Behind the Curtain II," pursuing the lavender's flower language of waiting for love, immersed in the sea-like flower fields……
highlights.text_zh:
花田连缀成海，追寻薰衣草浪漫花语
每年入夏，普罗旺斯的薰衣草花田就会大片盛开，整个空气里都弥漫着薰衣草淡淡的花香，打卡琼瑶《又见一帘幽梦》浪漫唯美的拍摄地，追寻着薰衣草等待爱情的花语，沉浸如海花田……

attractions.text_en: Valensole has the beautiful lavender fields of the Provence region. It was selected by National Geographic magazine as one of the most beautiful places in the world, and it is also the filming location of Chiung Yao's eponymous novels "Dream Behind the Curtain" and "Dream Behind the Curtain II."
attractions.text_zh: 瓦朗索勒拥有普罗旺斯地区美丽的薰衣草花田。国家地理杂志评选为世界上美丽的地方之一，同时，这里也是琼瑶同名小说《一帘幽梦》和《又见一帘幽梦》的拍摄地。

attractions.name_en: Palais des Festivals and the Walk of Fame
attractions.text_en: Built in 1982, it is an important meeting venue of the Cannes Film Festival, where the much-watched Palme d'Or is awarded. The Palais des Festivals currently has a total exhibition area of 44,000 square meters, containing 15 concert halls. The Walk of Fame is one of the sights not to be missed in Cannes; located beside the Palais des Festivals, here you can see the handprints pressed into the pavement by many stars, now totaling more than 300.
attractions.text_zh: 建于 1982 年，是戛纳影展的重要会议地点，备受注目的金棕榈奖即在此颁发。电影宫目前总共有 44000 平方米的展览面积，内含 15 个音乐厅星光大道是到戛纳不可错过的景点之一，位于电影宫旁，可以在这里看到许多明星在这里的人行道上按下的手印，现在已经累计了有300 多个了。

attractions.text_en: Antibes was honored as the European City of Tourism and Culture in 2007. The old town's fish market, the coastal fortress on the beach, and the countless small vendors and bistros within the old city make it not only a seaside paradise but also a city with an excellent humanistic atmosphere. The old town market and fish market, together with this city, were inscribed in the UNESCO heritage of humanity. Many shops and eateries are spread on both sides of the cobblestone streets, and the Provençal market in the city is a famous fresh-produce market. Provençal charm and the vitality of the Côte d'Azur blend here.
attractions.text_zh: 昂蒂布在2007年获得欧洲旅游文化之城的美誉，老城鱼市及位于海滩上的城防堡垒，以及古城内琳琳总总的小商贩，小酒馆，不仅是海滨的天堂也是人文气息极好的一个城市，老城集市和鱼市与这个城市一起载入联合国人类保护遗产，很多商铺和食肆遍布在石板路两侧，城中的普罗旺斯市场是著名生鲜市场。普罗旺斯风情和蔚蓝海岸的活力在这里融合。

attractions.text_en: Saint-Paul-de-Vence is one of the most artistic medieval hill towns on the French Côte d'Azur, set on the highlands between Nice and Antibes. It is famous for its well-preserved stone city walls, winding narrow alleys, and the galleries spread throughout, and once attracted many artists such as Marc Chagall and Pablo Picasso to live and create here for long periods. The town blends history, art, and natural scenery; from the city walls one can overlook the Mediterranean and the Provençal hills — a classic destination both romantic and full of cultural depth.
attractions.text_zh: 圣保罗德旺斯是法国蔚蓝海岸最具艺术气息的中世纪山城之一，坐落在尼斯与昂提布之间的高地上。这里以保存完好的石砌城墙、蜿蜒狭窄的小巷和遍布的画廊而闻名，曾吸引 Marc Chagall 、 Pablo Picasso 等众多艺术家长期居住与创作。小镇融合了历史、艺术与自然风光，从城墙远眺可俯瞰地中海与普罗旺斯丘陵，是一个既浪漫又充满文化底蕴的经典目的地。

overview.text_en:
In the morning we set off from Antibes to tour Menton, the "Lemon Town," then head to the beautiful scenic route of the Côte d'Azur, the Avenue Princesse Grace of Monaco. Driving along the Moyenne Corniche, the famous cliff road of Southern France, admire Villefranche-sur-Mer, known as the city of beautiful seaside scenery, and visit Monaco and the yacht harbor. In the afternoon we head to the cliff town of Èze to overlook the Mediterranean, visit the perfume museum to learn about the production and blending process of perfume, then return to Nice to freely visit the Baie des Anges (Bay of Angels) beach and the Promenade des Anglais in Nice. Afterwards check in at the hotel.
Overnight: Novotel Antibes Sophia Antipolis or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
早上从昂提布出发前往 芒通游览“柠檬小镇”，随后 前往蔚蓝海岸美丽的风景线摩纳哥格雷斯公主大道。随车行走在Moyenne Corniche南法出名的峭壁之路，欣赏有海滨美景城之称的海滨自由城，参观摩纳哥及游艇码头。 下午前往 悬崖小镇-埃兹俯眺地中海，拜访香水博物馆了解香水的生产调配过程，随后返回尼斯，自由参观尼斯天使湾沙滩、尼斯英格兰海滨大道。随后入住酒店。
夜宿： 诺富特 昂提布斯索非亚安蒂波利斯或同等4星 酒店

accommodation.text_en: Novotel Antibes or an equivalent 4-star hotel. The hotel is set in the core heartland of the Côte d'Azur, surrounded by greenery, in a tranquil environment. The hotel offers very convenient access to the old town of Antibes and the Mediterranean coastline. The hotel's overall style is modern and elegant, incorporating Mediterranean natural elements, with spacious and bright guest rooms. The hotel restaurant LE Fedor and the bar area offer a rich breakfast, Mediterranean-flavored lunch/dinner, and relaxing drink service. Guests can choose to dine in the restaurant, on the terrace, or in their rooms — a high-quality hotel combining modern style with the natural scenery of the Mediterranean.
accommodation.text_zh: 昂提布诺富特酒店或同等4星酒店 酒店坐落于蔚蓝海岸核心腹地，绿意环绕、环境静谧。酒店前往昂提布老城及地中海海岸线也十分便捷，酒店整体风格现代雅致，融入地中海自然元素，客房空间宽敞明亮，酒店餐厅 LE Fedor 和酒吧区域提供丰盛的早餐、地中海风味午餐/晚餐及轻松饮品服务，宾客可选择在餐厅、露台或客房内用餐，是一处兼具现代格调与地中海自然风光的高品质酒店。

highlights.text_en:
Driving the cliff road, seeking out beautiful photo spots
This cliff road named after Princess Grace of Monaco, AV.PRINCESSE DE GRACE, passes through the beautiful scenery of the Côte d'Azur at Villefranche-sur-Mer and the top of the seaside town of Villefranche. Driving along the coastline of the cliff road, stopping and going along the seaside, seeks out beautiful seaside photo spots for you.
Visit the perfume museum to learn the past and present of perfume
Visit the distillation process of perfume, the perfume laboratory, and the manufacturing workshop. These places will lift the mysterious veil of perfume-making, showing everyone the "secrets" of making perfume, toilet water, and soap.
highlights.text_zh:
行车峭壁公路，找寻美丽拍摄点
这条以摩纳哥格蕾丝公主命名的峭壁公路 AV.PRINCESSE DE GRACE 途径蔚蓝海岸美丽风景Villefranche sur mer以及海滨自由城的顶端，行车在峭壁公路海岸线上的海滨测停停走走，为你找寻美丽海滨的拍摄点。
探访香水博物馆，了解香水的前世今生
参观香水的蒸馏过程、香水实验室和制造车间，这些场所将揭开香水制作的神秘面纱，向大家展示制造香水、化妆水以及香皂的“秘密”。

attractions.text_en: The old town of Nice, which completely preserves various styles of ancient buildings since the 18th century, such as Baroque-style churches and Italian-style structures. Walking into the maze-like old town, strolling through the high-and-low, winding, twisting alleys, admiring the brightly colored buildings of various styles, treasure-hunting in the distinctive small shops. If you walk to the Cours Saleya square market, all kinds of brightly colored fruits, candies, and fresh flowers immediately come into view, dazzling the eye.
attractions.text_zh: 尼斯的老城区，这里完好地保留了18世纪以来的各种风格的古老建筑，如巴洛克风格的教堂，意大利风格的建筑物等。走进迷宫般的老城区，在高低蜿蜒，纵横曲折的小巷中漫步，欣赏颜色鲜明，风格各异的建筑，在各具特色的小店中淘宝。如果走到萨雷雅的广场集市(CoursSaleya)，各种鲜艳的水果、糖果、鲜花立刻映入眼帘，令人目不暇接。

attractions.name_en: Baie des Anges (Bay of Angels), Nice
attractions.text_en: The Bay of Angels lies next to the Promenade des Anglais, named for its resemblance to angel's wings. The sea here is very azure, a good place to spend the summer. The beaches of Nice are very special, all paved with pebbles, which are a bit prickly to step on, yet have a special charm. Climbing up the castle and overlooking from the east is an advantageous angle for admiring the Bay of Angels.
attractions.text_zh: 天使湾紧邻英国人漫步大道，因形似天使的翅膀而得名，这里的海十分湛蓝，是消夏的好地方 。尼斯的海滩很特别，都是由鹅卵石铺成的，踩上去有些扎脚，却别有一番趣味。 爬上城堡从东面俯瞰是欣赏天使湾的有利角度。

attractions.text_en: Like the citrus fruits produced abundantly here, Menton is wrapped in lemon tones. Whether the long beaches, the diverse architecture, or the stretches of citrus orchards, all seem to become nature's palette, dyeing this seaside town a special yellow in the height of summer. Get lost at the crossroads of the old town of Menton, walking the narrow and quiet streets between light and shadow, admiring the Baroque-style architecture, feeling the sea breeze passing through the houses, and setting foot on the "Lemon Route" will make you linger and forget to leave.
attractions.text_zh: 和当地盛产的柑橘类水果一样，芒东被柠檬色调所包裹。无论是修长的海滩，各式各样的建筑，还是成片的柑橘果园，仿佛都成为了自然的调色板，在盛夏时节为这座海滨小镇染上了特别的黄色。迷失在芒东老城区的十字路口，走过光与影之间狭窄而安静的街道，欣赏巴洛克式风格的建筑，感受穿梭在房屋之间的海风，踏上“柠檬之路”将会让你流连忘返。

attractions.text_en: As one of the world's most densely populated countries and a classic microstate, Monaco has a national territory of only 2 square kilometers. Benefiting from city sightseeing and seaside tourism income, Monaco is also one of the wealthiest countries, of which Monaco's yacht harbor and Monte Carlo are the most representative touring areas.
attractions.text_zh: 作为世界上人口稠密的国家和经典的微型国家，摩纳哥国土面积仅有2平方公里，得利于城市观光及海滨观光收入，摩纳哥也是最富裕的国家之一、其中摩纳哥的游艇海港和蒙特卡洛为最具有代表性的游览区域。

attractions.text_en: The distinctive Mediterranean-charm "eagle's nest" town — the Èze exotic garden, a town in pure classical Monaco style. A Mediterranean garden is planted on the hilltop, which is also an excellent spot for viewing the cliff scenery, and is at the same time the back garden of France's famous Château de la Chèvre d'Or (Golden Goat) hotel, as well as a wonderful position for a bird's-eye view of the Mediterranean scenery. Various Mediterranean-characteristic plants correspond with the classical town.
attractions.text_zh: 特有的地中海风情“鹫巢”小镇——埃兹异国风情花园，纯古典摩纳哥风格的小镇，山顶种植有地中海花园，也坐落着观看悬崖美景的佳位，同时是法国有名的金羊酒店的后花园，也是鸟瞰地中海美景的美妙位置。各种地中海特色植物与古典小镇相应。

attractions.text_en: The perfume museum, set at the foot of the Èze mountain, tranquilly and serenely tells people the story of perfume. The museum was completed in 1983 and is full of the flavor of the Mediterranean. The perfume museum aims to preserve France's renowned perfume industry and promote the international development of its perfume industry. The museum has exhibition halls in 18th-century architectural style, mainly divided into three principal areas: the production-process area, the perfume-history area, and the fragrance-collection area. Here, people can not only learn about the historical development of perfume, the blending process of perfume, and the production methods, but also discover rare perfume varieties found nowhere else in the world.
attractions.text_zh: 坐落在埃兹山下的香水博物馆，宁静安详的向人们诉说着香水的故事。该馆于1983年落成，充满了地中海的味道。香水博物馆，旨在保存法国享有盛名的香水工业和促进其香水工业在国际上的发展。馆中有着十八世纪建筑风格的展览厅，主要分三个主要区域：生产过程区，香水历史区和香料收藏品区。在这里，人们不仅可以了解香水的历史发展，香水的调配过程和生产方式，还可以发现世界上少有的香水品种。

overview.text_en:
After breakfast, set off from Antibes on the Côte d'Azur, sailing along the Mediterranean toward the charming Cassis, and take a cruise to admire the steep cliffs, azure waters, and the unique coastal landforms. Afterwards head to the historic city of Arles, exploring the ancient Roman amphitheater and the classic landscapes painted by Van Gogh. In the afternoon arrive at Nîmes, stroll the old city, and feel the well-preserved Roman ruins and Southern French charm, then check in at the Nîmes hotel.
Overnight: Best Western Hotel L'Orangerie or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
早餐后，从蔚蓝海岸的昂提布出发，沿地中海驶向迷人的卡西斯，乘坐游轮欣赏险峻悬崖、碧蓝海水与海岸独特地貌。随后前往历史名城阿尔勒，探索古罗马竞技场与梵高笔下的经典景观。下午抵达尼姆，漫步古城，感受保存完好的罗马遗迹与南法风情，随后入住尼姆酒店。
夜宿：贝斯特韦斯特橘园酒店或同等4星酒店

accommodation.text_en: Best Western Hotel L'Orangerie or an equivalent 4-star hotel. The hotel is set within a private garden in the historic city of Nîmes, France, in a quiet and elegant environment, just a few minutes by car from the old city of Nîmes and the Roman amphitheater. The hotel cleverly avoids the city's hustle and bustle while maintaining an ideal distance from the core sights. The hotel was converted from an elegant historic building, with an overall style blending traditional French charm with modern comfortable design. The hotel's dining mainly features fresh, healthy Mediterranean flavors, and the terrace dining experience is especially pleasant, making it an ideal place to stay for exploring Nîmes's ancient Roman heritage and Southern French charm.
accommodation.text_zh: 贝斯特韦斯特橘园酒店或同等4星酒店 酒店坐落于法国历史名城尼姆的一片私密花园之中，环境安静优雅，距离尼姆古城与罗马竞技场仅数分钟车程。酒店巧妙避开城市喧嚣，同时又与核心景点保持理想距离，酒店由典雅的历史建筑改造而成，整体风格融合传统法式韵味与现代舒适设计。酒店餐饮以新鲜、健康的地中海风味为主，露台用餐体验尤为惬意，是探索尼姆古罗马遗产与南法风情的理想下榻之选。

highlights.text_en:
Calanques Boat Cruise
Along the French Côte d'Azur, take a boat to enjoy the most classic calanque (inlet) scenery of the French Côte d'Azur, admiring along the way the tranquil waters of the Port-Miou calanque, the pink limestone cliffs of the Port-Pin calanque, and the magnificent azure waters and steep cliffs of the most famous Calanque d'En-Vau. You can both photograph the stunning coastal scenery and experience the natural wonders of the Mediterranean — an essential highlight route for touring Cassis.
highlights.text_zh:
卡朗格峡湾游船
沿着法国蔚蓝海岸，乘船畅法国蔚蓝海岸最经典的峡湾景观，沿途欣赏 Port-Miou 港口峡湾的宁静水面、Port-Pin 峡湾的粉色石灰岩悬崖，以及最著名的Calanque En-Vau 峡湾的壮丽碧水与峭壁。既能拍摄绝美海岸风光，又能体验地中海自然奇观，是卡西斯游览的必选精华路线。

attractions.text_en: Arles is one of the important destinations of Provence tourism, quaint and full of an artistic atmosphere. Apart from a series of sights related to Van Gogh, it is also a city where the ancient Roman ruins of Southern France are concentrated, hailed as the "Little Rome of the Gauls." Arles flourished due to Caesar's occupation, and became world-famous due to Van Gogh's paintings. Van Gogh is the symbol and pride of this small town. He not only painted here, but also walked the final journey of his life here. Most of the originals of his paintings originate from here. Everywhere here you can feel Van Gogh's footsteps.
attractions.text_zh: 阿尔勒是普罗旺斯旅游的重要目的地之一，古朴而充满着艺术气息，这里除了一系列与梵高有关的景点以外，还是南法古罗马遗迹集中的城市，被誉为“高卢人的小罗马”。Arles因凯撒大帝的占领，而得到繁荣；因梵高的画作，而蜚声世界。梵高是这个小镇的象征和骄傲。他不仅仅在这里作画，人生的终途也是在这里走过的。他画作的大部分原型都是源于这里。在这里随处都能感受到梵高的足迹。

attractions.text_en: The Calanques are located in the southeastern part of the French Côte d'Azur, a group of natural inlets composed of limestone cliffs and the azure waters of the Mediterranean. The calanques here are long, narrow, and deep, with steep cliffs, the water clear as gemstones, and the scenery magnificent, hailed as the "secret realm of the Mediterranean." Visitors can take a boat to explore the hidden coves and caves up close, admiring the pristine natural scenery along the way, and can also experience Southern French charm and local cuisine in the coastal town of Cassis.
attractions.text_zh: 卡朗格峡湾位于法国蔚蓝海岸东南部，是一片由石灰岩峭壁和碧蓝地中海水域组成的天然峡湾群。这里的峡湾狭长幽深、悬崖险峻，水色清澈如宝石，景色壮丽，被誉为“地中海的秘境”。游客可乘船近距离探索隐秘小湾和岩洞，沿途欣赏原始自然风光，也可在岸边小镇卡西斯体验南法风情与当地美食。

attractions.text_en: Set in the Côte d'Azur national park, Cassis is a colorful fishing village embraced by mountains and sea, a seaside vacation spot beloved by the French. Cassis is surrounded by mountains on three sides and faces the sea on one, with colorful houses built by the water and a small harbor where fishing boats and yachts are moored — a landscape unique to the Provence region. This is a long, narrow valley eroded by rivers and then partly submerged by seawater, forming the now-towering cliffs and hidden amphibious coves. A national park integrating the three major features of land, sea, and city surroundings, it has more than 900 species of wild plants and rich marine life.
attractions.text_zh: 坐落于蔚蓝海岸国家公园的卡西斯 是一个山海相拥的彩色渔村， 法国人喜爱的海滨度假地。卡西斯三面环山，一面临海，五彩缤纷的房屋临水而建，小巧的港口停泊着渔船和游艇，是普罗旺斯地区的特有景观，这里是被河流侵蚀后又部分被海水淹没的狭长山谷，形成了现在耸立的峭壁和隐蔽海陆两栖的小海湾，集陆地、海洋和城市周边三大特点于一身的国家公园，拥有900多种野生植物和丰富的海洋生物。

overview.text_en:
On the day, tour the old city of Nîmes, the City of Water Spirits, on foot, exploring the glory and mystery of ancient Rome and the Mysterious Garden, then depart from the Nîmes or Avignon train station and take the French TGV high-speed train on your own (no tour guide accompanying on the train). After arrival, the Southern France journey ends.
Important terms:
Due to tight high-speed train availability in summer in the Provence region, subject to cancellation risks from high-temperature shutdowns, strikes, and delays, the itineraries of the French railway company SNCF may, depending on availability, be adjusted to the Gare Avignon station or the Montpellier Sud de France station, in which case shuttle buses will be provided to connect the different train stations in Southern France. The order of the first and last days of the itinerary may be adjusted; this is regarded as an equivalent itinerary and not as an itinerary change.
overview.text_zh:
当天徒步参观水精灵之城尼姆古城，探索古罗马的辉煌和神秘花园，随后从尼姆或阿维尼翁火车站出发，自行乘坐法国TGV高铁抵达后（高铁上无导游陪同），结束南法旅程。
重要条款：
由于普罗旺斯地区的夏季高铁位置紧张、受到高温停运、罢工、延期等取消风险，法国铁路运输公司SNCF的行程，根据可用性可能会调整到阿维尼翁站（Gare Avignon）或蒙彼利埃（Montpellier Sud de France）站，届时将提供穿梭巴士衔接南法不同火车站，可能会调整第一天和最后一天的行程的先后顺序，视为同等行程，不视为行程调整。

accommodation.text_en: No accommodation on the day
accommodation.text_zh: 当天无住宿

highlights.text_en:
Explore the City of Water Spirits
Starting from the Avenue Feuchères water-spring avenue at the Nîmes train station, learn about the architectural structure of the ancient Roman aqueduct bridge, then head to the Mysterious Garden, exploring the glory of ancient Rome on foot.
highlights.text_zh:
探索水精灵之城
从尼姆火车站的水泉大道Avenue feucheres了解古罗马时期水渠桥的建筑结构开始前往神秘花园，徒步探索古罗马的辉煌。

attractions.text_en: A historic ancient city of the ancient Roman period, Nîmes gathers all too many astonishing crystallizations of ancient Roman wisdom: the well-preserved ancient Roman amphitheater; the Jardin de la Fontaine, a garden by the spring of the ancient site, as if hinting that Nîmes is a warm city living on its spring; and the ancient Roman watchtower on the hill, the Tour de Magne, from whose heights one can take in boundless scenery.
attractions.text_zh: 古罗马时期的历史古城，尼姆汇集了太多古罗马人令人惊叹的智慧结晶：保存完好的古罗马竞技场；古迹庭院泉边公园(le Jardin de la Fontaine)，像在暗示尼姆即是一座以泉为生的暖城；还有丘陵上的古罗马瞭望塔马涅塔(la Tour de Magne)，登高远望，可将无限风光尽收眼底。

attractions.text_en: The architectural feature of the Maison Carrée is its Corinthian columns. This building is about 17 meters high and 26 meters deep, built in the 1st century BC during the era of Emperor Augustus, preserving the Roman-period temple form exactly as it was. After the temple was built, it once served as a city hall and a church, and is now the Museum of Antiquities (Musée des Antiques).
attractions.text_zh: 方形神殿的建筑特色是科林斯式的圆柱。这座建筑高约17米，深26米，建于公元前1世纪的奥古斯都大帝(Auguste)时代，它把罗马时期的神殿形式原原本本的保留了下来。神殿建成后曾作为市政府大楼和教堂，现在则为古代博物馆(Musee des Antigues)。

attractions.text_en: The Mysterious Garden, built more than a thousand years ago — the Jardin de la Fontaine, a garden by the spring of the ancient site — can be called a great architectural miracle; the well-preserved ancient Roman architectural ensemble and forest-park landscape. Because the Nîmes of that time was a city developed centered on the spring water, people firmly believed the spring water had spirits, and the garden by the spring was the garden built by people of that time to dedicate to the spirits of the spring water.
attractions.text_zh: 建于一千多年前的神秘花园——古迹庭院泉边公园，堪称一大建筑奇迹；保存完好的古罗马建筑群和林园景观，因当时的尼姆是以泉水为中心发展而成的都市，所以人们深信泉水是有精灵的，而泉边公园就是当时人们为了奉献给泉水的精灵而建造出来的庭园。

overview.text_en:
After gathering on the day, tour Rome, the world-famous historic and cultural city. This is the birthplace of the ancient Roman Empire, and because of its long history it is called the "Eternal City." Visit the Colosseum (exterior) and the Pantheon (exterior) standing on the site of the ancient Roman capital, and tour the Spanish Steps and the Trevi Fountain (exterior). After 14:00 on the day you may check into the hotel on your own with your order, or leave your luggage at the hotel front desk in advance.
Overnight: Rome Hotel San Martino or Hotel Moderno, or an equivalent 4-star hotel
[The main attractions in Rome's ancient city area are all within Rome's vehicle restricted zone (ZTL). The hotel is conveniently located for exploring each attraction on foot. Rome will be toured on foot on the day, with a round-trip walking distance of about 5 kilometers; please dress lightly and comfortably.]
overview.text_zh:
当天集合后游览世界著名的历史文化名城罗马，这里是古罗马帝国的发祥地，因历史悠久而被称为“永恒之城“ 。参观罗马古都遗址上矗立着的斗兽场（外观）、万神殿（外观），游览西班牙广场和特莱维喷泉（外观），当天14点后可凭订单自行入住酒店或提前寄存行李在酒店前台。
夜宿：罗马圣马丁酒店或现代酒店 或同等4星级酒店
【罗马古城区内的主要景点，均在罗马车辆禁行区内（ZTL）。酒店所在位置方便步行游览各个景点，罗马当天为步行游览，往返步行行程约为5公里，请穿着轻便舒适。】

accommodation.text_en:
Rome Hotel San Martino or Hotel Moderno, or an equivalent 4-star hotel
This elegant hotel enjoys a superb location, with the metro or train conveniently reaching downtown Rome or the airport. The hotel's stylish guest rooms all feature original and reproduction Art Deco-style furniture, decorated in warm tones. The hotel serves a hearty buffet breakfast every day. The restaurant and bar serve classic Italian cuisine and Roman specialties, with vegetarian and gluten-free options available.
accommodation.text_zh:
罗马圣马丁酒店或现代酒店 或同等4星级酒店
这间典雅的酒店地理位置优越，地铁或火车方便前往罗马市区或机场，酒店时尚的客房均设有原创的和复制的装饰艺术风格家具，采用暖色调装饰。酒店每天供应丰盛的自助早餐。餐厅和酒吧供应经典的意大利风味美食和罗马特色佳肴，可提供素食和无麸质美食。

highlights.text_en:
An in-depth visit to Rome, an important cradle of world culture
Seek out a historical civilization that has settled over thousands of years amid the ancient ruins that occupy roughly half of the city. Whether it is the world-famous architectural ruins formed by the Imperial Senate, the triumphal arches, the commemorative columns, the Pantheon, and the great amphitheater, or the many exquisite Renaissance buildings and art treasures housed in hundreds of museums, or even the city's many fountains of myriad postures represented by the Trevi Fountain, and the vast roads, aqueducts, bridges, squares, public baths, and other public buildings—all freeze art in that wonderful moment. Someone said, "Architecture is flowing music"; the architecture of ancient Rome must then play a magnificent and timeless movement.
highlights.text_zh:
深度探访世界文化重要发源地罗马
在占据城区面积约一半的古代遗迹中去寻找沉淀了数千年的历史文明。无论是帝国元老院、凯旋门、纪功柱、万神殿和大竞技场等组成世界闻名的建筑遗址，还是上百座博物馆所藏的众多文艺复兴时期的精美建筑和艺术精品，甚至以特莱维喷泉为代表的、姿态万千的城中众多喷泉，还有规模浩大的道路、水道、桥梁、广场、公共浴池等公共建筑，都将艺术凝固在美妙的那一刻，有人说“建筑是流动着的音乐”那古罗马的建筑演奏出的必然是一首雄浑隽永的乐章。

attractions.text_en: The magnificent Colosseum located in the center of Rome was built by the ancient Romans to please the generals and soldiers returning in triumph and to glorify the great Roman Empire. It was a place exclusively for slave owners, nobles, and free citizens to watch animal fights or slave gladiatorial combat, and is Rome's most famous historic relic. The Colosseum is a model masterpiece and marvel in architectural history, renowned throughout the world for being huge, majestic, and spectacular. Although only most of the skeleton remains, its heroic spirit and magnificent momentum still endure.
attractions.text_zh: 位于罗马中心的壮观的斗兽场是古罗马当时为取悦凯旋而归的将领士兵和赞美伟大的古罗马帝国而建造的，是古罗马帝国专供奴隶主、贵族和自由民观看斗兽或奴隶角斗的地方,是罗马最著名的历史遗迹。斗兽场在建筑史上堪称典范的杰作和奇迹，以庞大、雄伟、壮观著称于世。虽只剩下大半个骨架，但其雄伟之气魄、磅礴之气势犹存。

attractions.text_en: The Pantheon is a well-preserved building of ancient Rome, with a history of more than 2,000 years. The artist Raphael, the Roman kings Vittorio Emanuele II and Umberto I, and others rest here. The Pantheon was built by Agrippa, son-in-law of Octavian, the first emperor of the Roman Empire, to enshrine the gods of Mount Olympus. It can be called a classic building of the Augustan period, a model of ancient Rome's exquisite construction techniques, and was praised by Michelangelo as "the design of angels."
attractions.text_zh: 万神殿是古罗马保存完好的建筑，距今已有2000多年的历史，艺术家拉斐尔、罗马皇帝维托里奥﹒埃曼努埃尔二世和温布尔一世等长眠于此。万神殿由罗马帝国首任皇帝屋大维的女婿阿戈利巴建造，用以供奉奥林匹亚山上诸神，可谓奥古斯都时期的经典建筑，是古罗马精湛建筑技术的典范，被米开朗基罗赞叹为“天使的设计”。

attractions.text_en: The Piazza di Spagna once appeared in scenes of the film "Roman Holiday," becoming a calling card of Rome known to everyone. Audrey Hepburn's fresh and beautiful figure seems to have merged into one with the Piazza di Spagna and lovely Rome, becoming a memory people can never shake off. The Spanish Steps—the entire Piazza di Spagna is not large in area, and the crowds mainly gather near the Spanish Steps. The whole staircase has 138 steps in total and is the widest staircase in Europe.
attractions.text_zh: 西班牙广场曾经出现在电影《罗马假日》的场景中，成为了所有人都知道的罗马名片。赫本那清新亮丽的倩影似乎已经与西班牙广场以及美丽的罗马合为一体，成为了人们永远挥之不去的记忆。西班牙台阶整个西班牙广场面积不大，人群主要集中在西班牙台阶附近。整个台阶共138级，是欧洲最宽的台阶。

attractions.name_zh: 特莱维喷泉(许愿池)（外观）
attractions.text_en: Also called the "Fountain of the Maiden," or the "Wishing Pool," it takes as its theme the victorious return of Neptune, the sea god of Roman mythology, with an overall momentum that is magnificent and grand. It is said that if you turn your back to the fountain and toss a coin over your shoulder, and it lands in the water, your dream will come true.
attractions.text_zh: 又称“少女喷泉”，或者“许愿池”，以罗马神话中海神尼普勒战胜归来为题材，整气势磅礴、大气恢宏。据说背对着喷泉、从肩上投出一枚硬币，如果能投进水中，就能梦想成真。

overview.text_en:
Depart in the morning to tour Florence. Visit the world's third-largest cathedral—the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore, the Piazza della Signoria, the Old Bridge (Ponte Vecchio), as well as Florence's Piazza Santa Croce and the Basilica of Santa Croce (exterior). Afterward, check into a hotel in the Tuscany region.
Overnight: Tuscany Montecatini SPA Hotel, or an equivalent 5-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
上午出发游览佛罗伦萨，参观世界第三大教堂-圣母百花大教堂、市政广场，老桥以及佛罗伦萨-圣十字广场，圣十字教堂（外观）。之后入住托斯卡纳地区酒店。
夜宿：托斯卡纳蒙特卡蒂尼SPA酒店 或同等5星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Tuscany Montecatini SPA Hotel, or an equivalent 5-star hotel
The hotel is located in Montecatini Terme, Tuscany's famous wellness, rest, and holiday resort. The hotel has been renovated, with a unique design and elegantly decorated rooms blending the modern and the ancient—very comfortable and charming. The spa area is very modern, with 2 swimming pools (indoor and outdoor), and the sauna enjoys a unique forest view. The hotel's private park and circular garden are a natural continuation of the Terme Tettuccio park—the same trees, picturesque scenery, hot springs, and a wide variety of flora and fauna—covering 40,000 square meters: as if in a corner of a natural paradise. The hotel's NO|MORE Bistrot restaurant changes its menu with the seasons, with dishes varying according to climate and temperature, richly aromatic, and offering varied and abundant flavors.
accommodation.text_zh:
托斯卡纳蒙特卡蒂尼SPA酒店 或同等5星级酒店
酒店位于托斯卡纳著名的康养休息旅游度假地-蒙特卡蒂尼泰尔梅，酒店经过重新装修，设计独特，房间装潢典雅，融合了现代与古老，非常舒适和别致。 水疗区非常现代化，设有 2 个泳池（室内和室外），桑拿浴室享有独特的森林景观。酒店的私人公园和环形花园是 Terme Tettuccio 公园的自然延续，同样的树木、如画的景色、温泉、种类繁多的动植物，占地 40,000 平方米：仿佛置身于自然天堂的一隅。酒店的NO|MORE Bistrot 餐厅随季节变化菜单，菜肴根据气候和温度而变化，香气浓郁浓郁，食物口感丰富多样。

highlights.text_en:
Florence's glorious prime, the shining brilliance of the Renaissance
In Florence, the world's capital of art and the birthplace of the Renaissance, enjoy a stunning visual feast! Among the blue sky and white clouds, the brightly colored walls, the dark green shutters, and the deep red roofs, seek out the soul of the Renaissance; in the streets and lanes, the squares and churches, the museums and galleries, feel the agelessness of the Renaissance. As the writer Chen Yunhe said, "The poetic spirit of Dante Alighieri and the painting spirit of Da Vinci still drift over the skies of Florence, still continuing to pursue the people and events of the European Renaissance..."
highlights.text_zh:
佛罗伦萨的辉煌鼎盛，文艺复兴的星芒闪耀
在世界艺术之都、文艺复兴的发源地佛罗伦萨，享受一场震撼的视觉盛宴！在蓝天白云，彩色鲜艳的墙壁，深绿色的百叶窗，深红色的屋顶之间寻找文艺复兴的灵魂，在大街小巷、广场教堂，博物馆、美术馆之中感受文艺复兴不老。正如作家陈运和所说“阿利盖利．但丁的诗魂、达．芬奇的画魂，仍在佛罗伦萨上空飘荡，仍继续追寻欧洲文艺复兴时期那些人与事.....”

attractions.name_en: Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore
attractions.text_en: There are many solemn and majestic churches in the world, but few churches are so enchanting. This beautiful church, faced with white, red, and green granite, interprets to the fullest the classicism, elegance, and freedom esteemed by the Renaissance era—no wonder it was named "Saint Mary of the Flowers." The original site of the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore was the Church of Santa Reparata, built in the 4th century. In 1296, Giovanni de' Medici funded the construction of the new church, which took 175 years to finally complete.
attractions.text_zh: 世界上庄严雄伟的教堂很多，但很少有教堂能如此妩媚。这座使用白、红、绿三色花岗岩贴面的美丽教堂将文艺复兴时代所推崇的古典、优雅、自由诠释得淋漓尽致，难怪会被命名为“花之圣母”。圣母百花大教堂原址是建于4世纪的圣·雷帕拉塔教堂。1296年，乔凡尼·美第奇出资建造新的教堂，花了175年时间才最终建成。

attractions.text_en: The Piazza della Signoria has the reputation of an open-air sculpture museum, and has also been the center of the city's political life for several centuries. On the square stand the Palazzo Vecchio (Old Palace), a replica of Michelangelo's sculpture "David," and the Fountain of Neptune. The open Piazza della Signoria is surrounded by the Uffizi Gallery, the Loggia dei Lanzi (Mercenaries' Loggia), and many cafés and bars. The famous Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore is located directly to its north.
attractions.text_zh: 市政广场有露天雕塑博物馆的美誉，也是该城数个世纪以来政治生活中心，广场上坐落着维琪奥宫（旧宫）、米开朗基罗雕塑作品《大卫》的复制品以及海神喷泉。开放式的市政广场，周围环绕着乌菲兹美术馆、佣兵凉亭和众多的咖啡厅、酒吧。著名的圣母百花大教堂就位于它的正北方。

attractions.text_en: Located on the Arno River, the Ponte Vecchio is also known as the Old Bridge. Built in 1345, it is one of Europe's earlier long-span circular-arch bridges. It is said that Dante met the maiden Beatrice here, and later poured his longing into "The Divine Comedy." Over several centuries, it has stood firm through the floods, social upheavals, and wars it has experienced. It is one of Florence's famous landmark structures.
attractions.text_zh: 位于阿诺河(Arno)上的维奇奥桥，又被称为老桥。建于1345年，是欧洲较早的大跨度圆弧拱桥，据说但丁在这里邂逅了少女比阿特丽丝，后来将思慕之情倾注到《神曲》之中。几百年间，它经历过的水灾、社会动乱、战争而屹立不倒。是佛罗伦萨的著名地标建筑之一。

attractions.text_en: Piazza Santa Croce is located in the center of Florence, Italy, and is an important public space that has continued from the Renaissance to the present. The heart of the square is the magnificent Basilica of Santa Croce. This Gothic building is the resting place of Italian celebrities such as Michelangelo and Galileo, and its interior frescoes and sculptures are worth savoring carefully. Around the square there are many cafés and restaurants offering authentic Italian cuisine—an ideal place to rest and taste local flavors. Piazza Santa Croce is also a venue for various cultural activities and festivals; especially in summer, open-air concerts and theatrical performances attract many spectators. The square's open space is suitable for strolling and admiring the surrounding architecture, feeling the unique atmosphere of Florence.
attractions.text_zh: 圣十字广场位于意大利佛罗伦萨市中心，是文艺复兴时期延续至今的重要公共空间 ， 广场的核心是宏伟的圣十字大教堂这座哥特式建筑是米开朗基罗和伽利略等意大利名人的安息地，内部的壁画和雕塑值得细细品味。广场周围有多家咖啡馆和餐厅，提供地道的意大利美食，是休憩和品尝当地风味的理想之地。圣十字广场也是举办各种文化活动和节庆的场所，尤其在夏季，露天音乐会和戏剧表演吸引众多观众。广场的开放空间适合漫步和观赏周围的建筑，感受佛罗伦萨的独特氛围。

overview.text_en:
Depart in the morning for Cinque Terre. Along the Ligurian coastline, tour the five beautiful fishing villages on the cliffs. In the afternoon, head to Pisa to tour the Leaning Tower of Pisa (exterior) and the Piazza dei Miracoli in Pisa's historic and cultural center.
Overnight: Tuscany Montecatini SPA Hotel, or an equivalent 5-star hotel
Note: If Cinque Terre cannot be visited due to factors such as bad weather or a railway company strike, the itinerary will automatically be changed to touring the coastal cities by coach or other means.
overview.text_zh:
上午出发前往游览五渔村，沿利古里亚海岸线，游览悬崖上的五座美丽渔村，下午前往比萨,游览比萨斜塔（外观）和比萨历史文化中心的奇迹广场。
夜宿：托斯卡纳蒙特卡蒂尼SPA酒店 或同等5星级酒店
备注：如遇恶劣天气或者铁路公司罢工等因素导致无法游览五渔村，行程将自动更改为乘坐大巴车或其它形式游览海岸线城市。

accommodation.text_en:
Tuscany Montecatini SPA Hotel, or an equivalent 5-star hotel
The hotel is located in Montecatini Terme, Tuscany's famous wellness, rest, and holiday resort. The hotel has been renovated, with a unique design and elegantly decorated rooms blending the modern and the ancient—very comfortable and charming. The spa area is very modern, with 2 swimming pools (indoor and outdoor), and the sauna enjoys a unique forest view. The hotel's private park and circular garden are a natural continuation of the Terme Tettuccio park—the same trees, picturesque scenery, hot springs, and a wide variety of flora and fauna—covering 40,000 square meters: as if in a corner of a natural paradise. The hotel's NO|MORE Bistrot restaurant changes its menu with the seasons, with dishes varying according to climate and temperature, richly aromatic, and offering varied and abundant flavors.
accommodation.text_zh:
托斯卡纳蒙特卡蒂尼SPA酒店 或同等5星级酒店
酒店位于托斯卡纳著名的康养休息旅游度假地-蒙特卡蒂尼泰尔梅，酒店经过重新装修，设计独特，房间装潢典雅，融合了现代与古老，非常舒适和别致。 水疗区非常现代化，设有 2 个泳池（室内和室外），桑拿浴室享有独特的森林景观。酒店的私人公园和环形花园是 Terme Tettuccio 公园的自然延续，同样的树木、如画的景色、温泉、种类繁多的动植物，占地 40,000 平方米：仿佛置身于自然天堂的一隅。酒店的NO|MORE Bistrot 餐厅随季节变化菜单，菜肴根据气候和温度而变化，香气浓郁浓郁，食物口感丰富多样。

highlights.text_en:
Italy's beautiful fishing villages, a paradise on the cliffs
Along the Mediterranean's long coastline, stop at each beautiful fishing village. Watch the sun-bathed beaches, the waves quietly lapping the rocks, and the colorful houses approaching from afar; the curiosity of gazing at the beautiful fishing villages from a distance reaches its peak at the moment of arrival. Disembarking from the boat, walk on foot through the alleys of the fishing villages—the closer you walk, the more surprises there are. It is like savoring a visual feast of five colors and flavors, slowly tasting the flavors within, a scene so beautiful it stirs the heart.
highlights.text_zh:
意大利美丽渔村，悬崖上的世外桃源
沿地中海的绵长海岸线在每个美丽渔村停靠，眼看被阳光笼罩的沙滩，海浪静静地拍打着岩石，五彩斑斓的房子由远及近，远眺美丽渔村的好奇心在到达的一刻达到至高点，下得船来，徒步行走于渔村的小巷之间，越走近越惊喜。像是细细品味五色美味的视觉盛宴，一点点细品个中滋味，此情此景美好得让人心动。

attractions.text_en: Cinque Terre is located in the coastal area of the Province of La Spezia in Italy's Liguria region, built along the winding Mediterranean coastline. It is the collective name for five cliffside villages and towns: Monterosso al Mare, Vernazza, Corniglia, Manarola, and Riomaggiore. What is special is the hiking trail that strings the five villages together, built along the coast—one of the world's beautiful hiking routes, about 15-20 kilometers, requiring around 5 hours. On one side is the Mediterranean, on the other are the mountains, and ahead lie the Italian fishing hamlets—a destination that many hiking enthusiasts flock to. In 1997, it was inscribed on UNESCO's World Cultural Heritage List.
attractions.text_zh: 五渔村位于意大利利古里亚大区(Liguria)拉斯佩齐亚省海沿岸地区，沿着蜿蜒的地中海海岸线而建，是蒙特罗索（Monterosso al Mare）、韦尔纳扎（Vernazza）、科尔尼利亚（Corniglia）、马纳罗拉（Manarola）及里奥马焦雷（Riomaggiore）这五个悬崖边上的村镇的统称。特别的是把五个村庄串起的徒步线路，沿着海岸而建，是世界上美丽的徒步路线，约15-20公里，需5小时左右，一边是地中海，另一边是山脉，而前面则是意大利渔庄，是诸多徒步爱好者趋之若鹜的胜地。1997年被联合国教科文组织列入世界文化遗产名录。

attractions.text_en: The Leaning Tower of Pisa is the freestanding bell tower of the cathedral in the city of Pisa, Italy, located on the Piazza dei Miracoli on the north side of the city of Pisa in Tuscany Province, Italy. It is a world-famous sight and one of Italy's symbols, designated a World Heritage Site by UNESCO. Legend has it that in 1590 AD, Galileo conducted a free-fall experiment on the Leaning Tower of Pisa and overturned Aristotle's views.
attractions.text_zh: 比萨斜塔是意大利比萨城大教堂的独立式钟楼，位于意大利托斯卡纳省比萨城北面的奇迹广场上，是世界著名的景观，也是意大利标志之一，被联合国教育科学文化组织评选为世界遗产。相传在公元1590年，伽利略曾经在比萨斜塔上做了一个自由落体实验，并推翻了亚里士多德的观点

attractions.text_en: Also known as the Cathedral Square, it is a walled area, partly grassland, in the center of the city of Pisa in the Tuscany region of Italy. The Piazza dei Miracoli is the center of the city of Pisa, with four major buildings on the square: the Pisa Cathedral, the Leaning Tower of Pisa (bell tower), the Baptistery of St. John, and the Pisa Camposanto (cemetery). Around the square, ancient city walls and gates are still preserved. In April 1987, the International Council on Monuments and Sites nominated the Piazza dei Miracoli in the city of Pisa, Italy (including the cathedral, baptistery, Leaning Tower of Pisa, and cemetery) as a World Heritage Site.
attractions.text_zh: 又名主教座堂广场，是意大利托斯卡纳大区比萨市中心一片围墙包围的区域，部分为草地。奇迹广场是比萨城的中心，广场上有四大建筑：比萨主教座堂、比萨斜塔（钟楼）、圣乔瓦尼洗礼堂、比萨墓园。广场周围还保留着古代的城墙和城门。1987年4月，国际古迹遗产理事会提名意大利比萨城的奇迹广场（包括大教堂、洗礼堂、比萨斜塔和墓园）为世界遗产。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, head to Venice and visit at leisure St. Mark's Basilica (exterior), St. Mark's Square, the Bridge of Sighs (exterior), and the magnificent Doge's Palace (exterior). These beautiful buildings constructed on the water, together with the winding water lanes, make Venice's romantic charm linger long and refuse to fade.
Overnight: Venice voco Hotel or Hilton Garden Inn (Hilton Ambassador), or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
上午前往威尼斯，自由参观圣马可大教堂（外观），圣马可广场，叹息桥（外观），华丽的总督宫（外观），这些建造在水上的美丽建筑和蜿蜒的水巷一起，让威尼斯的浪漫风情久久挥之不去。
夜宿：威尼斯洲际VOCO酒店或希尔顿大使酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Venice voco Hotel or Hilton Garden Inn (Hilton Ambassador), or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is one of Venice's newly renovated hotels, with a superb location, stylish modern design, and guest rooms with natural tones and modern interior décor, offering you a comfortable and warm stay. The hotel offers a hearty breakfast and a well-equipped gym; the lounge bar serves wine and cocktails, and the hotel's Ludico Venice restaurant serves Italian cuisine and international fare.
accommodation.text_zh:
威尼斯洲际VOCO酒店或希尔顿大使酒店 或同等4星级酒店
酒店是威尼斯新装修的酒店之一，酒店地理位置优越，拥有时尚的现代设计，客房自然的色调和现代化的内饰，提给您舒适温馨的入住体验。酒店提供丰盛的早餐，设备齐全的健身房，酒廊酒吧提供葡萄酒和鸡尾酒，酒店的Ludico Venice 餐厅供应意大利佳肴和国际美食。

highlights.text_en:
The world's beautiful Venice, the "Pearl of the Adriatic" still dazzling and resplendent
As one of the important towns of the Renaissance, Venice is composed of 118 small islands, linked together by 177 waterways and 401 bridges. It is known as the "City on Water," the "City of a Hundred Islands," and the "City of Bridges." Here is one of the world's most magnificent squares, "St. Mark's Square," the beautiful Grand Canal, the Phoenix Opera House reborn from fire, the melancholy Bridge of Sighs of Xu Zhimo's writing, the breathtakingly beautiful arcades. This is the birthplace of the Venetian school of painting, and also the filming location for many movie scenes. Her unique and incomparable temperament makes every visitor intoxicated and reluctant to leave.
highlights.text_zh:
世上美丽的威尼斯，“亚得里亚海明珠”依旧璀璨夺目
威尼斯作为文艺复兴时期的重镇之一，由118个小岛组成，并以177条水道、401座桥梁连成一体。有“水上都市”、“百岛城”、“桥城”之称。这里有世界上壮丽的广场之一“圣马可广场”，有美丽的大运河，浴火重生的凤凰歌剧院，徐志摩笔下忧伤的叹息桥，美得令人窒息的回廊，这里是威尼斯画派的发源地，还是多部电影片段的拍摄地，她独特的无与伦比的气质让每一个到访的人都如痴如醉，不舍离去。

attractions.text_en: It is the central square of Venice, once called by Napoleon "the most beautiful drawing room in Europe." The square is surrounded on three sides by magnificent palaces, while to the east rise the tall bell tower and St. Mark's Basilica. Since ancient times, it has been the center of public activities for Venice's politics, religion, and traditional festivals.
attractions.text_zh: 是威尼斯的中心广场，曾被拿破仑称作“欧洲美丽的客厅”。广场三面被宏伟壮丽的宫殿围绕，东面耸立着高大的钟楼和圣马可教堂。自古以来，就是威尼斯政治、宗教及传统节日的公共活动中心。

attractions.name_zh: 威尼斯圣马可大教堂（外观）
attractions.text_en: Known in short as St. Mark's Basilica, it stands on St. Mark's Square in the center of Venice. First built in 829 AD and rebuilt in 1043-1071, it was once the largest church in medieval Europe—a classic work of Venetian architectural art, and also a treasure house holding a rich collection of artworks.
attractions.text_zh: 简称圣马可大教堂，是矗立于威尼斯市中心的圣马可广场上。始建于公元829年，重建于1043~1071年，它曾是中世纪欧洲大的教堂，是威尼斯建筑艺术的经典之作，它同时也是一座收藏丰富艺术品的宝库。

attractions.text_en: The Bridge of Sighs was in ancient times the necessary route for the court to escort condemned prisoners to the prison. The Bridge of Sighs is in the early Baroque style; the bridge is shaped like a house, covered with a dome on the upper part, sealed very tightly, with only two small windows on the side facing the canal. After a prisoner was tried in the Doge's Palace, the serious offender was taken to the dungeon.
