You can take a pleasure boat to appreciate the beautiful scenery along the shore of Lake Geneva, watching the lake water, snowy mountains and blue sky merge into one.
attractions.text_zh: 日内瓦湖又名莱芒湖，横跨瑞士和法国，是西欧的重要湖泊，也是著名的风景区和疗养地。白天你可以乘坐游船游览日内瓦湖，晚上陶醉于岸边闪烁的霓虹，还时常有豪华游轮在湖面上举办音乐会或舞会。可乘坐游船领略日内瓦湖岸边美景，看湖水、雪山和蓝天连成一片。

attractions.text_en: The great fountain is located on the surface of Lake Geneva near the English Garden, and is one of the more representative landmarks of Geneva. The great fountain is like a column of water spouted by a whale, 140 meters high with 500 liters of water output, and its magnificent sight can be seen from very far away in the city center. At night there is also a chance to see the great fountain under the illumination of lights, which is even more magnificent.
attractions.text_zh: 大喷泉位于英国花园附近的日内瓦湖面上，是日内瓦较具代表性的景观之一。大喷泉宛若鲸鱼喷出的水柱，有140米高、500公升喷水量，其壮观景象从市中心很远就能看见。夜晚时还有机会看到灯光照明下的大喷泉，更是宏伟。

attractions.text_en: The Flower Clock is a famous attraction in Geneva. Switzerland is known as the "land of gardens", and at the same time it is the "home of clocks and watches". What is even more wonderful is that Switzerland's skilled craftsmen ingeniously combined the beauty of flowers with the manufacturing craftsmanship of clocks and watches, originally and creatively producing the "Flower Clock".
attractions.text_zh: 花钟是日内瓦著名景点。瑞士号称"花园之国"，同时又是"钟表之乡"，而更奇妙的是瑞士的能工巧匠绝妙地将花卉之美同钟表的制造工艺完美地结合起来，别出心裁地创造出了"花钟"。

attractions.text_en: The upper town on the hillside on the right bank of the Rhône is, because of the higher terrain, also called the upper town by the local residents. This is not only a gathering place of churches and historical sites; among the winding alleys there are also many small and lovely antique shops, and the former residence of Rousseau, the thinker of the European Enlightenment, is also located in the old town.
attractions.text_zh: 在隆河右岸山坡上的上城区，因为地势较高的缘故，当地的居民又称之为上城。这里不但是教堂、古迹的聚集地，在蜿蜒的小巷弄间还有许多小巧可爱的古董商店，欧洲启蒙时代的思想家卢梭的故居也位于旧城区内。

attractions.text_en: Lake Geneva, also known as Lac Léman, straddles Switzerland and France and is an important lake of Western Europe, as well as a famous scenic area and health resort. During the day you can take a pleasure boat to tour Lake Geneva, and at night you can be enchanted by the twinkling neon lights along the shore, while luxury cruise ships often host concerts or dances on the lake. You can take a pleasure boat to appreciate the beautiful scenery along the shores of Lake Geneva, watching the lake water, the snow-capped mountains and the blue sky merge into one.
attractions.text_zh: 日内瓦湖又名莱芒湖，横跨瑞士和法国，是西欧的重要湖泊，也是著名的风景区和疗养地。白天你可以乘坐游船游览日内瓦湖，晚上陶醉于岸边闪烁的霓虹，还时常有豪华游轮在湖面上举办音乐会或舞会。可乘坐游船领略日内瓦湖岸边美景，看湖水、雪山和蓝天连成一片。

attractions.text_en: The Grand Fountain is located on the surface of Lake Geneva near the English Garden and is one of the more representative sights of Geneva. The Grand Fountain resembles a column of water spouted by a whale, standing 140 meters high with a water output of 500 liters; its spectacular sight can be seen from far away in the city center. At night there is also a chance to see the Grand Fountain illuminated by lights, which is even more magnificent.
attractions.text_zh: 大喷泉位于英国花园附近的日内瓦湖面上，是日内瓦比较具有代表性的景观之一。大喷泉宛若鲸鱼喷出的水柱，有140米高、500公升喷水量，其壮观景象从市中心很远就能看见。夜晚时还有机会看到灯光照明下的大喷泉，更是宏伟。

attractions.text_en: The Flower Clock is a famous attraction in Geneva. Switzerland is known as the "Garden Country" and also as the "Land of Watches and Clocks," and what is even more wonderful is that Switzerland's skilled craftsmen have marvelously combined the beauty of flowers with the craftsmanship of watchmaking, ingeniously creating the "Flower Clock."
attractions.text_zh: 花钟是日内瓦著名景点。瑞士号称“花园之国”，同时又是“钟表之乡”，而更奇妙的是瑞士的能工巧匠绝妙地将花卉之美同钟表的制造工艺完美地结合起来，别出心裁地创造出了“花钟”。

attractions.text_en: The upper town district on the hillside on the right bank of the Rhône is also called the upper town by the local residents because of its higher elevation. This place is not only a gathering place of churches and historic sites, but also has many small and lovely antique shops scattered among the winding alleys; the former residence of Rousseau, the thinker of the European Enlightenment era, is also located within the old town.
attractions.text_zh: 在隆河右岸山坡上的上城区，因为地势较高的缘故，当地的居民又称之为上城。这里不但是教堂、古迹的聚集地，在蜿蜒的小巷弄间还有许多小巧可爱的古董商店，欧洲启蒙时代的思想家卢梭的故居也位于旧城区内。

attractions.text_en: Höhematte is the green square in the center of Interlaken, Switzerland's famous tourist town. This green space was once the garden of a monastery, and now the construction of any buildings on it is forbidden to prevent damage to this beautiful landscape. This is one of the best places to gaze at the Jungfrau; on the vast green there is a fountain, and it is also dotted with many garden chairs, so it is a great place for a stroll. Höhematte is also a landing site for hang gliders; there is a reception point at the edge of the lawn, and after paying, staff will take visitors to the nearby mountains for free gliding, where you can enjoy the beautiful scenery of Interlaken from high in the sky.
attractions.text_zh: 荷黑马特是瑞士著名的观光小镇因特拉肯镇中心的绿地广场，这片绿地是昔日修道院的庭园，现在则禁止兴建任何建筑物，以防止破坏这片美丽的景观。这里是眺望少女峰好的场所，辽阔的绿地上建有喷泉，还点缀着很多凉椅，所以也是散步的好地方。荷黑马特还是滑翔翼的降落地，草坪边上有接待点，付费后会有工作人员把游客带到附近山上进行自由滑翔，可在高空欣赏到因特拉肯的美景。

attractions.text_en: Located at the northern foot of the Eiger, Grindelwald is home to the famous postcard photography spot of Switzerland's "dream hillside" beloved by photographers, and is also an Alpine town that must be passed through when visiting the Jungfrau. Together with First, Jungfrau, Wengen and others, it forms the more magnificent and beautiful scenic line of the Jungfrau region. In winter it is a famous snow-viewing resort, and in summer it is a paradise for hiking enthusiasts; the lakeside, green grass, waterfalls, dairy cows and snow-capped mountains together make up this enchanting town.
attractions.text_zh: 位于艾格峰(Eiger)的北麓脚下的格林德尔瓦尔德(Grindelwald) ，这里有摄影家心头较为喜爱的瑞士“梦幻山坡”著名明信片拍摄地，也是游览少女峰必经的阿尔卑斯小镇，同菲斯特(First)、少女峰(Jungfrau)、翁根(Wengen)、等一起组成了少女峰地区较为壮阔美丽的风景线。冬季是著名的观雪胜地，夏季又是徒步爱好者的天堂，湖畔、绿草青地、瀑布、奶牛、雪山共同构成让这座让人着迷的小镇。

attractions.text_en: Grindelwald First attracts visitors from all directions to come and admire the magnificent scenery of the north face of the Eiger. Standing on the famous First Cliff Walk by Tissot, anyone will immediately feel as if they are standing at the top of the world. The Cliff Walk by Tissot is located at the summit of First, where you can take in the unique panorama of the Bernese Alps.
attractions.text_zh: 格林德瓦菲斯特吸引四面八方的游客前来欣赏艾格峰北坡的壮丽风光。站在著名的菲斯特悬崖天梭巅峰栈道，任何人都会立刻感到自己站在世界之巅。悬崖天梭巅峰栈道位于菲斯特峰顶，可以一览伯尔尼兹阿尔卑斯山的独特全景。

attractions.text_en: The Jungfrau is located about twenty or thirty kilometers south of Interlaken, at an altitude of 4,158 meters, and is one of the higher peaks of the Alps. The summit is covered with ice and snow all year round, while at the foot of the mountain the grass is lush and the scenery is beautiful, making it a well-known sightseeing and outdoor sports resort in Switzerland. The Jungfrau region was listed as a World Natural Heritage Site in 2001.
attractions.text_zh: 少女峰位于因特拉肯以南二三十公里处，海拔 4158 米，是阿尔卑斯山脉的较高的山峰之一。山顶常年被冰雪覆盖，而山下却绿草茵茵、风景秀丽，是瑞士有名的观光及户外运动胜地。少女峰地区已于 2001 年被列为世界自然遗产。

attractions.text_en: Situated between Lucerne and Interlaken, the famous GoldenPass Line train passes through here. Surrounded by mountains and covered with green grass, the simple and rustic village is scattered along the shores of Lake Lungern, just like a paradise far from the hustle and bustle of the world.
attractions.text_zh: 地处卢塞恩与因特拉肯之间，著名的金色山口快车就会从这里经过。这里群山环抱，绿草茵茵，古朴的村庄散落于龙疆湖畔，俨然一座远离尘嚣的世外桃源。

attractions.text_en:
Lake Lucerne
This lake is winding in shape, and together with the surrounding mountains it forms the classic scenery of "lake and mountain views," attracting large numbers of tourists to come sightseeing. The music critic Ludwig Rellstab once described the hazy atmosphere of the first movement of Beethoven's "14th Piano Sonata" as the moonlight over Lake Lucerne, and so this piece acquired the title "Moonlight"—although this was not Beethoven's original intention.
attractions.text_zh:
卢塞恩湖
这座湖泊形状曲折，和周边的群山构成了典型的“湖光山色”景致，吸引了大量游客前来观光。音乐评论家雷尔斯塔布(Ludwig Rellstab)曾将贝多芬《第14钢琴奏鸣曲》的第1乐章的朦胧气氛形容为卢塞恩湖的月色，这首曲子因此得到了《月光》这个标题——虽然这并非贝多芬的本意。

attractions.text_en: Lucerne is located in central Switzerland and belongs to the German-speaking region of Switzerland. Nestled against the mountains and beside the water, Lucerne possesses the beauty unique to the Middle Ages: medieval churches and towers, Renaissance-era halls and mansions, as well as century-old shops and long streets and ancient lanes can be seen everywhere. The lake and mountain views of Lake Lucerne reflect the city's beautiful scenery in a dreamlike and yet real way, making it that extraordinary pearl among Switzerland's many beautiful small towns. From the 19th century onward, it has attracted numerous princes, nobles and literary figures to come and visit and reside, and artists have gained endless artistic inspiration in Lucerne.
attractions.text_zh: 卢塞恩位于瑞士中部，属瑞士德语区。依山傍水的卢塞恩具有中世纪所特有的美：中世纪的教堂、塔楼，文艺复兴时期的宫厅、邸宅以及百年老店、长街古巷，比比皆是。卢塞恩湖的湖光山色更是将城中的美景倒影的亦幻亦真，是瑞士众多美丽小城中不凡的那颗明珠。从19世纪起，就吸引了众多的王公贵族和文人墨客前来游览和居住，艺术家们在卢塞恩得到了不尽的艺术灵感。

attractions.text_en: This dying lion sculpture was carved into the natural rock in 1821 by a Danish sculptor. This lion, 10 meters long and over 3 meters high, lies on the ground in agony, with a broken spear stuck in its shoulder and beside it a shield bearing the Swiss coat of arms. This sculpture was made to commemorate the 786 Swiss mercenaries who all died in battle on August 10, 1792, to protect the safety of the Louis XVI family in the Tuileries Palace in Paris; beneath the sculpture there is text describing the course of this event. In those years, Switzerland was a poor and backward country, and men, forced by livelihood, went one after another to various European countries to serve as mercenaries. Swiss mercenaries were loyal to their employers and brave and skilled in battle, but honor and money could not cover up the cruelty of the mercenary system. After this event, Switzerland stopped exporting mercenaries, retaining only the Guard serving the Catholic Holy See, which is the famous Swiss Guard. Owing to their famous loyalty and bravery, this Swiss Guard of the Holy See has served right up to the present. Later, the American writer Mark Twain came to Lucerne and praised the "dying Lion of Lucerne" as "the most mournful and moving piece of stone in the world."
attractions.text_zh: 这只濒死的狮子雕像是1821年由丹麦雕塑家雕刻在天然岩石上的。这头长10米、高3米多的雄狮，痛苦地倒在地上，折断的长矛插在肩头，旁边有一个带有瑞士国徽的盾牌。这座雕像是为了纪念1792年8月10日，为保护巴黎杜乐丽宫(Tuileries)中的路易十六家族的安全，全部战死的786名瑞士雇佣兵，雕像下方有文字描述了此事件的经过。当年，瑞士是一个贫穷落后的国家，男子迫于生计，纷纷到欧洲各国当雇佣兵。瑞士雇佣兵忠于雇主，英勇善战，但荣誉和金钱掩盖不了雇佣兵制度的残酷，这次事件之后，瑞士停止出口雇佣兵，仅留下为天主教廷服务的近卫军，就是那支著名的瑞士卫队。由于著名的忠勇，教廷的这支瑞士近卫军一直服务到现在。后来，美国作家马克·吐温来到卢塞恩，将“濒死的琉森狮子”誉为“世界上最悲壮和最感人的雕像”。

attractions.text_en: Lake Zurich is 4 kilometers wide and about 39 kilometers long; the docks on the lake are filled with all kinds of yachts, just like a club for the rich. One end of Lake Zurich extends deep into the city center, and on the lake surface white swans and wild ducks can be seen everywhere, leisurely and carefree, a scene of harmony. The north shore of Lake Zurich is the residential area of the rich, known as the "Gold Coast," while the south shore is called the "Silver Coast." At the end of Bahnhofstrasse is Lake Zurich; as a "livable city of the world," the lives of true Zurichers are imbued everywhere with tranquility and leisure.
attractions.text_zh: 苏黎世湖宽4公里，长约39公里，湖面码头停满了各色游艇，俨然一个富人俱乐部。苏黎世湖一段的尽头深入市中心，湖面上白天鹅、野鸭随处可见，悠闲自在，一派和谐景象。苏黎世湖的北岸为富人居住地，号称“金岸”，而南岸则称之为“银岸”。班霍夫大街的尽头便是苏黎世湖，作为“世界宜居的城市”，真正的苏黎世人的生活处处渗透着宁静和悠闲。

attractions.text_en: Bahnhofstrasse (also known as Station Street) is one of Europe's longer shopping avenues and also one of the world's most expensive shopping avenues; more precisely, it is not only the truly priceless center of Zurich—luxury brands from all over the world are everywhere here, and private banks stand in rows. Walking on Zurich's Bahnhofstrasse, countless tourists will feel an inexplicable excitement, because beneath their feet are stored quantities of gold bars said to rank among the world's foremost, which makes many people too excited to move their feet; being there, you can clearly feel the air permeated with the atmosphere of wealth, opulence and indolence.
attractions.text_zh: 班霍夫大街(又称车站大街)是欧洲较长的购物大道，也是世界上昂贵的购物大道之一，更确切的说它不仅是苏黎世真正的寸土寸金的中心，这里遍布世界各地的奢侈品牌，私人银行林立。走在苏黎世的班霍夫大街上，无数游人都会产生莫名的兴奋，因为在他们脚下储藏着数量号称世界前列的金条，让很多人都激动的挪不开脚步，置身其中，你明显能感受到空气中弥漫着财富，华贵和慵懒的气息。

attractions.text_en: The Grossmünster is one of the three main churches in Zurich, Switzerland (the other two being the Fraumünster and another). The church is located near the bank of the Limmat River, with construction begun around 1100 and inaugurated around 1220. This church, facing the Fraumünster across the river, played a pivotal role in the 16th-century Swiss Reformation; the Theological Faculty of the University of Zurich and the Reformation Museum are both established here. The stained glass inside the church is a masterpiece of the modern Swiss art master Giacometti.
attractions.text_zh: 苏黎世大教堂(Grossmünster)是瑞士苏黎世的3座主要教堂之一(另外两座是苏黎世圣母大教堂和)。教堂位于利马特河河岸附近，始建于1100年前后，约1220年揭幕。这座与圣母大教堂隔河相望的教堂在16世纪瑞士宗教改革中，起到了举足轻重的作用，苏黎世大学神学院和宗教改革博物馆都设立于此。教堂内的彩画玻璃是瑞士现代艺术大师贾科梅蒂的杰作。

attractions.text_en: This is a magnificent shopping mall, although most tourists who come here are sightseeing. Under the central arcade there is a Prada boutique, whose scale and window displays are among the best in Milan, and especially its window displays are updated daily, so even just standing outside the windows to admire them is a great pleasure. The Emanuele gallery is filled with quite a few high-end restaurants, cafés and shops.
attractions.text_zh: 这是一个华丽的购物商场，不过多数来这里的游客都是来观光的。中央拱廊下有着Prada精品店，规模和橱窗布置都是米兰数一数二的，尤其橱窗布置天天更新，光是站在橱窗外欣赏也是一大乐事。埃马努埃莱长廊遍布了不少高级的餐馆、咖啡厅以及商店。

attractions.text_en: Although its name Duomo means "dome," Milan Cathedral is actually a Gothic building. Dominating the city center, Milan Cathedral was begun in 1386 and took 500 years to complete, and is hailed as a magnificent Gothic building of Italy, with hundreds of spires soaring into the clouds and thousands of statues carved on its white marble exterior walls. The interior space is vast, and sunlight enters through the beautiful stained-glass mosaics on the windows, with the light hazy and full of a solemn religious atmosphere. In the church's crypt the remains of the Church of St. Tecla that stood on the original site are also preserved.
attractions.text_zh: 虽然它的名字Duomo是“圆顶”的意思，米兰大教堂实际上却是一座哥特式建筑。雄踞在市中心的米兰大教堂始建于1386年，历经500年才完工，被誉为意大利壮丽的哥特式建筑数以百计的尖塔耸入云霄，白色大理石外墙上雕刻着数千座雕像。内部空间宽广，阳光透过窗上美丽的彩色玻璃镶嵌画射入，光线朦胧，充满庄严的宗教气氛。教堂地下室中还保留着原址上的圣·特库拉教堂的遗迹。

attractions.name_zh: 威尼斯圣马可大教堂（外观）
attractions.text_en: Abbreviated as St. Mark's Basilica, it stands on St. Mark's Square in the center of Venice. It was first built in 829 AD and rebuilt from 1043 to 1071; it was once the great church of medieval Europe, a classic work of Venetian architectural art, and at the same time it is a treasure house with a rich collection of artworks.
attractions.text_zh: 简称圣马可大教堂，是矗立于威尼斯市中心的圣马可广场上。始建于公元829年，重建于1043~1071年，它曾是中世纪欧洲大的教堂，是威尼斯建筑艺术的经典之作，它同时也是一座收藏丰富艺术品的宝库。

attractions.text_en: This is a museum located on Piazza San Marco; Venice's past glory is all here. Inside you can see not only frescoes and the like, but also medieval weapons; on the way to the dungeon you walk across the Bridge of Sighs, and you can look out through small holes, rather than having so many people on the bridge opposite looking toward you at the Bridge of Sighs. Inside you are allowed to take photos, as long as you do not use flash.
attractions.text_zh: 这是一家位于Piazza San Marco的博物馆，威尼斯过去的辉煌都在这里了。里面可以看的不仅有壁画等，还有中世纪的兵器，去地牢的时候走过叹息桥，能通过小孔看外面，而不是像对面桥上面那么多的人在往你这里看叹息桥。里面是可以拍照片的，只要你不要用闪光灯就可以了。

attractions.text_en: The Bridge of Sighs was in ancient times the route that had to be taken when escorting condemned prisoners from the court to the prison. The Bridge of Sighs is of an early Baroque style; the bridge is shaped like a house, with the upper part covered by a vault, sealed very tightly, with only two small windows facing the canal. After a prisoner was tried at the Doge's Palace, the serious offenders were taken to the dungeon, and when passing this airtight bridge, they could only look at the blue sky through the small windows; from then on they lost their freedom, and involuntarily let out sounds of sighing. It is said that if lovers kiss under the bridge they can be together forever, and the film "A Little Romance" was shot here.
attractions.text_zh: 叹息桥是古代由法院向监狱押送死囚的必经之路。叹息桥造型属早期巴洛克式风格，桥呈房屋状，上部穹隆覆盖，封闭得很严实，只有向运河一侧有两个小窗，当犯人在总督府接受审判之后，重罪犯被带到地牢中，在经过这座密不透气的的桥时，只能透过小窗看看蓝天，从此失去了自由，不自主的发出叹息之声。听说恋人们在桥下接吻就可以天长地久，而电影「情定日落桥」就在这取景的。

attractions.text_en: It is the central square of Venice, once called by Napoleon "the most beautiful drawing room in Europe." The square is surrounded on three sides by grand and magnificent palaces, and on the east side stand the tall bell tower and St. Mark's Church. Since ancient times, it has been the center for public activities of Venetian politics, religion and traditional festivals.
attractions.text_zh: 是威尼斯的中心广场，曾被拿破仑称作“欧洲美丽的客厅”。广场三面被宏伟壮丽的宫殿围绕，东面耸立着高大的钟楼和圣马可教堂。自古以来，就是威尼斯政治、宗教及传统节日的公共活动中心。

attractions.name_en: Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore (queuing required to enter)
attractions.name_zh: 圣母百花大教堂（需排队进入）
attractions.text_en: There are many solemn and majestic churches in the world, but few can be so charming. This beautiful church, faced with white, red and green granite, interprets to the fullest the classical, elegant and free qualities esteemed in the Renaissance era—no wonder it was named "Saint Mary of the Flower." The original site of the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore was the Church of Santa Reparata built in the 4th century. In 1296, Giovanni de' Medici funded the construction of the new church, which took 175 years to complete.
attractions.text_zh: 世界上庄严雄伟的教堂很多，但很少有教堂能如此妩媚。这座使用白、红、绿三色花岗岩贴面的美丽教堂将文艺复兴时代所推崇的古典、优雅、自由诠释得淋漓尽致，难怪会被命名为“花之圣母”。圣母百花大教堂原址是建于4世纪的圣·雷帕拉塔教堂。1296年，乔凡尼·美第奇出资建造新的教堂，花了175年时间才建成。

attractions.text_en: Piazza della Signoria has the reputation of being an open-air sculpture museum, and has also been the center of the city's political life for several centuries; on the square stand the Palazzo Vecchio (Old Palace), a replica of Michelangelo's sculpture "David," and the Fountain of Neptune. The open-style Piazza della Signoria is surrounded by the Uffizi Gallery, the Loggia dei Lanzi and numerous cafés and bars. The famous Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore is located directly to its north.
attractions.text_zh: 市政广场有露天雕塑博物馆的美誉，也是该城数个世纪以来政治生活中心，广场上坐落着维琪奥宫（旧宫）、米开朗基罗雕塑作品《大卫》的复制品以及海神喷泉。开放式的市政广场，周围环绕着乌菲兹美术馆、佣兵凉亭和众多的咖啡厅、酒吧。著名的圣母百花大教堂就位于它的正北方。

attractions.text_en: Located on the Arno River, the Ponte Vecchio is also called the Old Bridge. Built in 1345, it is one of Europe's earlier large-span circular-arch bridges; it is said that Dante encountered the maiden Beatrice here and later poured his feelings of longing into "The Divine Comedy." Over the centuries, it has stood unfallen through floods, social upheavals and wars. It is one of Florence's famous landmark structures.
attractions.text_zh: 位于阿诺河(Arno)上的维奇奥桥，又被称为老桥。建于1345年，是欧洲较早的大跨度圆弧拱桥，据说但丁在这里邂逅了少女比阿特丽丝，后来将思慕之情倾注到《神曲》之中。几百年间，它经历过的水灾、社会动乱、战争而屹立不倒。是佛罗伦萨的著名地标建筑之一。

attractions.text_en: Piazza Santa Croce is located in the center of Florence, Italy, and is an important public space that has continued from the Renaissance to the present. The core of the square is the magnificent Basilica of Santa Croce; this Gothic building is the resting place of Italian celebrities such as Michelangelo and Galileo, and the frescoes and sculptures inside are worth savoring carefully. Around the square there are several cafés and restaurants offering authentic Italian cuisine, making it an ideal place to rest and taste local flavors. Piazza Santa Croce is also a venue for holding all kinds of cultural events and festivals; especially in summer, open-air concerts and theatrical performances attract numerous audiences. The open space of the square is suitable for strolling and admiring the surrounding architecture, feeling the unique atmosphere of Florence.
attractions.text_zh: 圣十字广场位于意大利佛罗伦萨市中心，是文艺复兴时期延续至今的重要公共空间，广场的核心是宏伟的圣十字大教堂这座哥特式建筑是米开朗基罗和伽利略等意大利名人的安息地，内部的壁画和雕塑值得细细品味。广场周围有多家咖啡馆和餐厅，提供地道的意大利美食，是休憩和品尝当地风味的理想之地。圣十字广场也是举办各种文化活动和节庆的场所，尤其在夏季，露天音乐会和戏剧表演吸引众多观众。广场的开放空间适合漫步和观赏周围的建筑，感受佛罗伦萨的独特氛围。

attractions.text_en: Cinque Terre is located in the coastal area of the Province of La Spezia in the Liguria region of Italy, built along the winding Mediterranean coastline; it is the collective name for these five cliff-side villages and towns: Monterosso al Mare, Vernazza, Corniglia, Manarola and Riomaggiore. What is special is the hiking route that strings the five villages together, built along the coast, which is one of the most beautiful hiking routes in the world, about 15-20 kilometers and requiring about 5 hours; on one side is the Mediterranean and on the other are the mountains, while ahead are the Italian fishing villages, making it a resort that many hiking enthusiasts flock to. In 1997 it was inscribed on the UNESCO World Cultural Heritage List.
attractions.text_zh: 五渔村位于意大利利古里亚大区(Liguria)拉斯佩齐亚省海沿岸地区，沿着蜿蜒的地中海海岸线而建，是蒙特罗索（Monterosso al Mare）、韦尔纳扎（Vernazza）、科尔尼利亚（Corniglia）、马纳罗拉（Manarola）及里奥马焦雷（Riomaggiore）这五个悬崖边上的村镇的统称。特别的是把五个村庄串起的徒步线路，沿着海岸而建，是世界上美丽的徒步路线，约15-20公里，需5小时左右，一边是地中海，另一边是山脉，而前面则是意大利渔庄，是诸多徒步爱好者趋之若鹜的胜地。1997年被联合国教科文组织列入世界文化遗产名录。

attractions.text_en: The Leaning Tower of Pisa is the freestanding bell tower of the Cathedral of the city of Pisa, Italy, located on the Piazza dei Miracoli on the north side of the city of Pisa in the Province of Tuscany; it is a world-famous landmark and one of Italy's symbols, and was selected as a World Heritage Site by the United Nations Educational, Scientific and Cultural Organization. It is said that in 1590 AD, Galileo once performed a free-fall experiment on the Leaning Tower of Pisa and overturned the views of Aristotle.
attractions.text_zh: 比萨斜塔是意大利比萨城大教堂的独立式钟楼，位于意大利托斯卡纳省比萨城北面的奇迹广场上，是世界著名的景观，也是意大利标志之一，被联合国教育科学文化组织评选为世界遗产。相传在公元1590年，伽利略曾经在比萨斜塔上做了一个自由落体实验，并推翻了亚里士多德的观点

attractions.text_en: Also known as the Cathedral Square, it is a walled area in the center of the city of Pisa in the Tuscany region of Italy, partly lawn. The Piazza dei Miracoli is the center of the city of Pisa; on the square there are four major buildings: the Pisa Cathedral, the Leaning Tower of Pisa (bell tower), the Baptistery of St. John, and the Camposanto (cemetery). Around the square ancient city walls and gates are also preserved. In April 1987, the International Council on Monuments and Sites nominated the Piazza dei Miracoli of the city of Pisa in Italy (including the cathedral, baptistery, Leaning Tower of Pisa and cemetery) as a World Heritage Site.
attractions.text_zh: 又名主教座堂广场，是意大利托斯卡纳大区比萨市中心一片围墙包围的区域，部分为草地。奇迹广场是比萨城的中心，广场上有四大建筑：比萨主教座堂、比萨斜塔（钟楼）、圣乔瓦尼洗礼堂、比萨墓园。广场周围还保留着古代的城墙和城门。1987年4月，国际古迹遗产理事会提名意大利比萨城的奇迹广场（包括大教堂、洗礼堂、比萨斜塔和墓园）为世界遗产。

attractions.text_en: Siena, this medieval ancient city is full of masterpieces by art masters and medieval classical architecture; shuttling through Siena's ancient and crisscrossing stone-slab alleys and the deep courtyards hidden everywhere, you seem to find yourself in the European Middle Ages a thousand years ago, and every detail will bring you surprises. For several centuries, this city has maintained its complete classical appearance, as if time has stood still here since the 14th century. In addition to its unique scenery and art collections, Siena also maintains a series of traditions, including the cooking and making of desserts. On your trip to Siena, don't forget to taste the local specialties—almond soft cakes ricciarelli, nut tarts panforte, peppered spiced nut cakes pan pepato, rice puddings budini di riso, walnut cookies cavallucci, or walnut wafers copate!
attractions.text_zh: 锡耶纳，这座中世纪古城布满了艺术大师的杰作和中世纪古典建筑，穿梭在锡耶纳古老而纵横交错的石板小巷和隐藏在各处的幽深庭院中，您仿佛置身于千年前的欧洲中世纪，其中的每一处细节都会给您带来惊喜。这座城市在几个世纪以来，一直保持着完整的古典外貌，仿佛时间自十四世纪起便在此停滞。除了它独特的风景和艺术典藏，锡耶纳还保持着一系列的传统，包括甜品的烹饪制作。在您的锡耶纳之行中，别忘了品尝当地的特色- 杏仁软饼ricciarelli、果仁馅饼panforte、胡椒香料果仁糕pan pepato、米饭布丁budini di riso、核桃饼cavallucci、或核桃华夫copate!

attractions.text_en: Piazza del Campo (also called the Shell Square because of its shell-like shape) is the center of the city of Siena, and is one of the larger surviving medieval squares in Europe; directly opposite the square are Siena's town hall and tower. Inside the town hall is the Civic Museum, which houses numerous paintings of the Sienese School, including Ambrogio Lorenzetti's "Allegory of Good Government" and "Allegory of Bad Government." The tower's full name is the Torre del Mangia; it is the tallest building in Siena and the second tallest tower in Italy, with a vertical height reaching 102 meters, and visitors can reach the top via 55 flights of stairs to take in the beautiful scenery of the city of Siena.
attractions.text_zh: 田野广场(因形似贝壳也叫贝壳广场)是锡耶纳城市的中心，是欧洲现存较大的中世纪广场之一，广场正对面是锡耶纳市政厅和塔楼，市政厅内有市立博物馆，里面藏有锡耶纳学派的众多绘画作品，包括AmbrogioLorenzetti的《好政府寓意》和《坏政府寓意》。塔楼全名为曼贾塔TorrediMangia，它是锡耶纳较高的建筑，也是意大利第二高的塔楼，垂直高度达到102米，游客可以通过55层的阶梯达到顶端，一览锡耶纳城的美景。

attractions.text_en: The Torre del Mangia is right next to the town hall and is the tallest medieval tower in Italy. In the mid-14th century, the outbreak of the Black Death in the city claimed nearly two-thirds of the population and dealt a huge blow to the city's development. After the disaster, the survivors added a marble loggia to the tower to commemorate the Virgin Mary. Inside the tower there are a total of 332 narrow steps, by which you can climb to the top to take in the scenery of Siena.
attractions.text_zh: 曼吉亚塔楼紧邻市政厅，是意大利中世纪较高的塔楼。14世纪中期，城内黑死病的爆发夺走了近2/3的人口，也使城市发展受到巨大打击。灾难过后，幸存者们为塔楼加上一个大理石的凉廊，以此来纪念圣母玛利亚。楼内共有332级狭窄的台阶，可以攀登到顶，一览锡耶纳风光。

attractions.text_en: Pienza is a municipality in the Province of Siena in the Tuscany region of central Italy, adjacent to Montalcino; it is one of the earliest ideal towns of the Renaissance period, founded by the Roman Pope Pius II, with the purpose at the time of founding being to renovate his poor hometown and use it as the summer retreat of the Roman Pope. In 1996, it was inscribed on the UNESCO World Heritage List. The architecture here is in the Gothic style and influenced by the German style. The main square of the town is Piazza Pio II, which contains the major 15th-century buildings, such as the church (built 1459-1462), the Piccolomini Palace, the Bishop's Palace, and the town hall with the crenellated tower (built 1462).
attractions.text_zh: 皮恩扎（Pienza）是意大利中部托斯卡纳大区锡耶纳省的一个市镇，毗邻蒙塔尔奇诺，它是文艺复兴时期最早的理想小镇，由罗马教皇PiusII创立，当时创立的目的是为了翻新给他贫穷的家乡并把此作为罗马教皇的避暑地。1996年，被列入联合国世界遗产名录。这里的建筑呈哥特风，并受德式风格的影响。小镇的主要广场是PiazzaPioII，广场里包含15世纪的主要建筑，如教堂（建于1459-1462）、皮科洛米尼宫（PiccolominiPalace、主教宫、带有锯齿形塔的大会堂（建于1462）。

attractions.text_en: The winding cypress lane, a country road lined on both sides with Italian cypresses, with its uniquely shaped curves and neatly arranged cypress trees, has become one of the symbols of the Tuscan pastoral scenery. The cypresses on both sides of the road cast mottled shadows under the sunlight, creating a tranquil and poetic atmosphere that has attracted countless photography enthusiasts and tourists to come and check in.
attractions.text_zh: 蜿蜒曲折丝柏树小径、两旁种满意大利柏树的乡村道路，独特造型的弯道和整齐排列的丝柏树，成为托斯卡纳田园风光的象征之一。道路两侧的柏树在阳光的照射下投下斑驳的影子，营造出一种宁静而诗意的氛围，吸引了无数摄影爱好者和游客前来打卡。

attractions.text_en: The Val d'Orcia was inscribed on the UNESCO World Heritage List in 2004. Tuscany's Val d'Orcia is famous for its postcard-perfect scenery and hill towns; it is a unique convergence of art and nature, holding rich historical imprints, and its natural landscape was redesigned during the Renaissance, embodying the concept of "good government" of the Italian city-states.
attractions.text_zh: 奥尔恰山谷，2004年被列入联合国教科文组织世界遗产名录。托斯卡纳的 Val d'Orcia 以其明信片般的完美风景和山城而闻名，这里是艺术与自然的独特交汇，蕴藏着丰富的历史印记，其自然景观在文艺复兴时期经过重新设计，体现了意大利城邦“良政”的理念。

attractions.text_en: The magnificent Colosseum, located in the center of Rome, was built by the ancient Romans to please generals and soldiers returning in triumph and to glorify the great Roman Empire. It was the place where slave masters, nobles and freemen exclusively watched beast fights or gladiatorial combat between slaves, and is one of Rome's more famous historical relics. As a masterpiece and marvel in the history of architecture, the Colosseum is renowned throughout the world for being massive, majestic and spectacular. Although only the greater part of its skeleton remains, its grand spirit and magnificent momentum still endure.
attractions.text_zh: 位于罗马中心的壮观的斗兽场是古罗马当时为取悦凯旋而归的将领士兵和赞美伟大的古罗马帝国而建造的，是古罗马帝国专供奴隶主、贵族和自由民观看斗兽或奴隶角斗的地方,是罗马较著名的历史遗迹。斗兽场在建筑史上堪称典范的杰作和奇迹，以庞大、雄伟、壮观著称于世。虽只剩下大半个骨架，但其雄伟之气魄、磅礴之气势犹存。

attractions.text_en: The Pantheon is a well-preserved building of ancient Rome with a history of more than 2,000 years. The artist Raphael, Roman kings Vittorio Emanuele II and Umberto I, among others, rest here in eternal repose. The Pantheon was built by Agrippa, son-in-law of Octavian, the first emperor of the Roman Empire, to enshrine the gods of Mount Olympus. It can be called a classic building of the Augustan period and a model of the exquisite architectural technology of ancient Rome, praised by Michelangelo as "the design of angels."
attractions.text_zh: 万神殿是古罗马保存完好的建筑，距今已有2000多年的历史，艺术家拉斐尔、罗马皇帝维托里奥﹒埃曼努埃尔二世和温布尔一世等长眠于此。万神殿由罗马帝国首任皇帝屋大维的女婿阿戈利巴建造，用以供奉奥林匹亚山上诸神，可谓奥古斯都时期的经典建筑，是古罗马精湛建筑技术的典范，被米开朗基罗赞叹为“天使的设计”。

attractions.text_en: The Piazza di Spagna once appeared in a scene from the film "Roman Holiday" and has become a calling card of Rome known to everyone. Audrey Hepburn's fresh and lovely figure seems to have merged into one with the Piazza di Spagna and beautiful Rome, becoming a memory that people can never erase. The whole Piazza di Spagna is not large in area, and the crowds are mainly concentrated near the Spanish Steps. The entire flight of steps has 138 steps in total, and is one of the wider staircases in Europe.
attractions.text_zh: 西班牙广场曾经出现在电影《罗马假日》的场景中，成为了所有人都知道的罗马名片。赫本那清新亮丽的倩影似乎已经与西班牙广场以及美丽的罗马合为一体，成为了人们永远挥之不去的记忆。西班牙台阶整个西班牙广场面积不大，人群主要集中在西班牙台阶附近。整个台阶共138级，是欧洲较宽的台阶。

attractions.name_zh: 特莱维喷泉(许愿池)（外观）
attractions.text_en: Also known as the "Maiden Fountain" or the "Wishing Fountain," it takes as its theme the triumphant return of Neptune, the sea god of Roman mythology, with an overall majestic and grand momentum. It is said that if you turn your back to the fountain and toss a coin over your shoulder, and it lands in the water, your dreams will come true.
attractions.text_zh: 又称“少女喷泉”，或者“许愿池”，以罗马神话中海神尼普勒战胜归来为题材，整气势磅礴、大气恢宏。据说背对着喷泉、从肩上投出一枚硬币，如果能投进水中，就能梦想成真。

attractions.text_en: Val d'Orcia was inscribed on the UNESCO World Heritage List in 2004. Tuscany's Val d'Orcia is renowned for its postcard-perfect scenery and hill towns. This is a unique meeting of art and nature, holding rich historical imprints. Its natural landscape was redesigned during the Renaissance, embodying the Italian city-states' ideal of "good governance."
attractions.text_zh: 奥尔恰山谷，2004年被列入联合国教科文组织世界遗产名录。托斯卡纳的 Val d'Orcia 以其明信片般的完美风景和山城而闻名，这里是艺术与自然的独特交汇，蕴藏着丰富的历史印记，其自然景观在文艺复兴时期经过重新设计，体现了意大利城邦“良政”的理念。

attractions.text_en: The winding cypress lane, a country road lined on both sides with Italian cypresses, with its uniquely shaped curves and neatly arranged cypress trees, has become one of the symbols of Tuscany's pastoral scenery. The cypresses on both sides of the road cast mottled shadows under the sunlight, creating a tranquil and poetic atmosphere that has attracted countless photography enthusiasts and tourists to come and take pictures.
attractions.text_zh: 蜿蜒曲折丝柏树小径、两旁种满意大利柏树的乡村道路，独特造型的弯道和整齐排列的丝柏树，成为托斯卡纳田园风光的象征之一。道路两侧的柏树在阳光的照射下投下斑驳的影子，营造出一种宁静而诗意的氛围，吸引了无数摄影爱好者和游客前来打卡。

attractions.text_en: Pienza, a small town located on the hills of the Val d'Orcia in southern Tuscany, is the birthplace of Pope Pius II. The Pienza he oversaw rebuilding in 1459 is regarded as a model of the "ideal city," and it is thus praised as "the touchstone of Renaissance urban living." Unlike other Italian medieval towns, Pienza's uniqueness lies in the fact that from the city walls one can overlook the scenery of the World Heritage site "Val d'Orcia."
attractions.text_zh: 皮恩扎，位于托斯卡尼南部奥尔恰山谷山丘上的小镇，这里是教皇皮乌斯二世的出生地，1459年他主持重建的皮恩扎被视为“理想城市”的典范，因此被誉为“文艺复兴都市生活的试金石”。与其他意大利中世纪小镇不同，皮恩扎独特之处在于可以从城墙上俯瞰世界遗产-「Val D'orcia奥尔恰山谷」的景致。

attractions.text_en: Siena, this medieval old city, is filled with the masterpieces of great artists and classical medieval architecture. Wandering through Siena's ancient and crisscrossing cobblestone alleys and the deep courtyards hidden everywhere, you feel as if you have stepped into medieval Europe of a thousand years ago, and every detail brings you surprises. Over the centuries, this city has maintained its complete classical appearance, as if time has stood still here since the fourteenth century. In addition to its unique scenery and art collections, Siena also preserves a series of traditions, including the making of desserts. On your trip to Siena, don't forget to taste the local specialties - almond soft cakes ricciarelli, nut tart panforte, peppery spiced nut cake pan pepato, rice pudding budini di riso, walnut cookies cavallucci, or walnut wafers copate!

attractions.text_en: Piazza del Campo (also called the Shell Square because of its shell-like shape) is the center of the city of Siena and one of the largest surviving medieval squares in Europe. Directly opposite the square are the Siena Town Hall and tower; inside the Town Hall is the Civic Museum, which houses numerous paintings of the Sienese School, including Ambrogio Lorenzetti's "Allegory of Good Government" and "Allegory of Bad Government." The tower's full name is Torre del Mangia; it is the tallest building in Siena and the second tallest tower in Italy, with a vertical height of 102 meters. Visitors can reach the top via 55 flights of stairs and take in the beautiful views of the city of Siena.

attractions.text_en: The Leaning Tower of Pisa is the freestanding bell tower of the Cathedral of Pisa, Italy. Located on the Piazza dei Miracoli (Square of Miracles) on the north side of Pisa in the province of Tuscany, Italy, it is a world-famous sight and one of the symbols of Italy, and has been designated a World Heritage Site by UNESCO. It is said that in the year 1590 AD, Galileo conducted a free-fall experiment from the Leaning Tower of Pisa and overturned Aristotle's viewpoint.
attractions.text_zh: 比萨斜塔是意大利比萨城大教堂的独立式钟楼，位于意大利托斯卡纳省比萨城北面的奇迹广场上，是世界著名的景观，也是意大利标志之一，被联合国教育科学文化组织评选为世界遗产。相传在公元1590年，伽利略曾经在比萨斜塔上做了一个自由落体实验，并推翻了亚里士多德的观点。

attractions.text_en: Also known as the Piazza del Duomo (Cathedral Square), it is a walled area in the center of the city of Pisa in the Tuscany region of Italy, part of which is lawn. The Piazza dei Miracoli is the center of the city of Pisa, and the square holds four major buildings: the Pisa Cathedral, the Leaning Tower of Pisa (bell tower), the Baptistery of St. John, and the Camposanto (cemetery). Around the square the ancient city walls and gates are also preserved. In April 1987, ICOMOS (the International Council on Monuments and Sites) nominated the Piazza dei Miracoli of Pisa, Italy (including the cathedral, baptistery, Leaning Tower of Pisa, and cemetery) as a World Heritage Site.
attractions.text_zh: 又名主教座堂广场，是意大利托斯卡纳大区比萨市中心一片围墙包围的区域，部分为草地。奇迹广场是比萨城的中心，广场上有四大建筑：比萨主教座堂、比萨斜塔（钟楼）、圣乔瓦尼洗礼堂、比萨墓园。广场周围还保留着古代的城墙和城门。1987年4月，国际古迹遗产理事会提名意大利比萨城的奇迹广场（包括大教堂、洗礼堂、比萨斜塔和墓园）为世界遗产。

attractions.text_en: Cinque Terre is located in the coastal area of the province of La Spezia in the Liguria region of Italy, built along the winding Mediterranean coastline. It is the collective name for five cliffside villages and towns: Monterosso al Mare, Vernazza, Corniglia, Manarola, and Riomaggiore. What is special is the hiking trail that strings the five villages together: built along the coast, it is one of the world's beautiful hiking routes, about 15-20 kilometers and requiring around 5 hours. On one side is the Mediterranean, on the other side are the mountains, and ahead are Italian fishing villages, making it a destination that many hiking enthusiasts flock to. In 1997 it was inscribed on the UNESCO World Cultural Heritage List.
attractions.text_zh: 五渔村位于意大利利古里亚大区(Liguria)拉斯佩齐亚省海沿岸地区，沿着蜿蜒的地中海海岸线而建，是蒙特罗索（Monterosso al Mare）、韦尔纳扎（Vernazza）、科尔尼利亚（Corniglia）、马纳罗拉（Manarola）及里奥马焦雷（Riomaggiore）这五个悬崖边上的村镇的统称。特别的是把五个村庄串起的徒步线路，沿着海岸而建，是世界上美丽的徒步路线，约15-20公里，需5小时左右，一边是地中海，另一边是山脉，而前面则是意大利渔庄，是诸多徒步爱好者趋之若鹜的胜地。1997年被联合国教科文组织列入世界文化遗产名录。

attractions.name_en: Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore (queuing required to enter)
attractions.name_zh: 圣母百花大教堂（需排队进入）
attractions.text_en: The Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore is the indisputable symbol of Florence, its iconic red dome dominating the city skyline. The most stunning aspect of this architectural marvel is observing its facade up close - the geometric patterns formed by white, green, and pink marble are like a giant parquet carpet, with every piece of stone precisely calculated. Especially when the sunlight shines at an angle, the green serpentine stone takes on an emerald-like luster, transitioning gently with the pink marble, making it the most magnificent "stone embroidery" of the Renaissance.
attractions.text_zh: 圣母百花大教堂是佛罗伦萨无可争议的象征，其标志性的红色穹顶主宰着城市天际线。这座建筑奇迹最震撼之处在于近距离观察其外立面——白、绿、粉三色大理石组成的几何图案如同巨型拼花地毯，每一块石料都经过精密计算。尤其当阳光斜照时，绿色蛇纹石会泛出翡翠般的光泽，与粉色大理石温柔过渡，堪称文艺复兴时期最华丽的"石头刺绣"。

attractions.text_en: Located on the Arno River, the Ponte Vecchio is also called the Old Bridge. Built in 1345, it is one of the earlier long-span segmental arch bridges in Europe. It is said that Dante encountered the young maiden Beatrice here, and later poured his longing into "The Divine Comedy." Over the centuries, it has withstood floods, social unrest, and wars while standing firm. It is one of the famous landmark buildings of Florence.
attractions.text_zh: 位于阿诺河(Arno)上的维奇奥桥，又被称为老桥。建于1345年，是欧洲较早的大跨度圆弧拱桥，据说但丁在这里邂逅了少女比阿特丽丝，后来将思慕之情倾注到《神曲》之中。几百年间，它经历过的水灾、社会动乱、战争而屹立不倒。是佛罗伦萨的著名地标建筑之一。

attractions.text_en: The Piazza della Signoria has the reputation of being an open-air sculpture museum and has also been the center of the city's political life for several centuries. On the square stand the Palazzo Vecchio (Old Palace), a replica of Michelangelo's sculpture "David," and the Fountain of Neptune. The open Piazza della Signoria is surrounded by the Uffizi Gallery, the Loggia dei Lanzi (Mercenaries' Loggia), and numerous cafes and bars. The famous Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore is located directly to its north.
attractions.text_zh: 市政广场有露天雕塑博物馆的美誉，也是该城数个世纪以来政治生活中心，广场上坐落着维琪奥宫（旧宫）、米开朗基罗雕塑作品《大卫》的复制品以及海神喷泉。开放式的市政广场，周围环绕着乌菲兹美术馆、佣兵凉亭和众多的咖啡厅、酒吧。著名的圣母百花大教堂就位于它的正北方。

attractions.text_en: Piazza Santa Croce is located in the center of Florence, Italy, and is an important public space that has continued from the Renaissance to the present day. The heart of the square is the magnificent Basilica of Santa Croce; this Gothic building is the resting place of Italian celebrities such as Michelangelo and Galileo, and its interior frescoes and sculptures are worth savoring carefully. Around the square there are many cafes and restaurants offering authentic Italian cuisine, making it an ideal place to rest and taste local flavors. Piazza Santa Croce is also a venue for various cultural activities and festivals; especially in summer, open-air concerts and theatrical performances attract numerous audiences. The open space of the square is suitable for strolling and admiring the surrounding architecture, experiencing Florence's unique atmosphere.
attractions.text_zh: 圣十字广场位于意大利佛罗伦萨市中心，是文艺复兴时期延续至今的重要公共空间，广场的核心是宏伟的圣十字大教堂这座哥特式建筑是米开朗基罗和伽利略等意大利名人的安息地，内部的壁画和雕塑值得细细品味。广场周围有多家咖啡馆和餐厅，提供地道的意大利美食，是休憩和品尝当地风味的理想之地。圣十字广场也是举办各种文化活动和节庆的场所，尤其在夏季，露天音乐会和戏剧表演吸引众多观众。广场的开放空间适合漫步和观赏周围的建筑，感受佛罗伦萨的独特氛围。

attractions.text_en: Known as St. Mark's Basilica for short, it stands on St. Mark's Square in the center of Venice. First built in 829 AD and rebuilt in 1043-1071, it was once the great church of medieval Europe and is a classic work of Venetian architectural art. At the same time it is also a treasure house with a rich collection of artworks.
attractions.text_zh: 简称圣马可大教堂，是矗立于威尼斯市中心的圣马可广场上。始建于公元829年，重建于1043~1071年，它曾是中世纪欧洲大的教堂，是威尼斯建筑艺术的经典之作，它同时也是一座收藏丰富艺术品的宝库。

attractions.text_en: This is a museum located on Piazza San Marco; all of Venice's past glory is here. Inside, there is not only frescoes and the like to see, but also medieval weapons. When going to the dungeon you cross the Bridge of Sighs, where you can look outside through a small hole, rather than having so many people on the bridge opposite looking over at you at the Bridge of Sighs. You can take photos inside, as long as you don't use a flash.
attractions.text_zh: 这是一家位于Piazza San Marco的博物馆，威尼斯过去的辉煌都在这里了。里面可以看的不仅有壁画等，还有中世纪的兵器，去地牢的时候走过叹息桥，能通过小孔看外面，而不是像对面桥上面那么多的人在往你这里看叹息桥。里面是可以拍照片的，只要你不要用闪光灯就可以了。

attractions.text_en: The Bridge of Sighs was, in ancient times, the route that had to be taken when escorting condemned prisoners from the court to the prison. The Bridge of Sighs is of an early Baroque style; the bridge is shaped like a house, covered by a dome on top and sealed very tightly, with only two small windows on the side facing the canal. After a prisoner was tried at the Doge's Palace, the serious offender was taken to the dungeon, and when passing through this airtight bridge, could only look at the blue sky through the small window. From then on losing their freedom, they would involuntarily let out a sound of sighing. It is said that if lovers kiss under the bridge they can be together forever, and the film "A Little Romance" was shot here.
attractions.text_zh: 叹息桥是古代由法院向监狱押送死囚的必经之路。叹息桥造型属早期巴洛克式风格，桥呈房屋状，上部穹隆覆盖，封闭得很严实，只有向运河一侧有两个小窗，当犯人在总督府接受审判之后，重罪犯被带到地牢中，在经过这座密不透气的的桥时，只能透过小窗看看蓝天，从此失去了自由，不自主的发出叹息之声。听说恋人们在桥下接吻就可以天长地久，而电影「情定日落桥」就在这取景的。

attractions.text_en: This is the central square of Venice, once called by Napoleon "the most beautiful drawing room in Europe." Three sides of the square are surrounded by magnificent and splendid palaces, and on the east side stand the tall bell tower and St. Mark's Basilica. Since ancient times, it has been the center of public activity for Venice's political, religious, and traditional festival life.
attractions.text_zh: 是威尼斯的中心广场，曾被拿破仑称作“欧洲美丽的客厅”。广场三面被宏伟壮丽的宫殿围绕，东面耸立着高大的钟楼和圣马可教堂。自古以来，就是威尼斯政治、宗教及传统节日的公共活动中心。

attractions.text_en: Lake Geneva, also known as Lac Léman, straddles Switzerland and France. It is a major lake of Western Europe and a renowned scenic and health-resort area. By day you can take a pleasure boat to tour Lake Geneva, and by night you can lose yourself in the shimmering neon lights along the shore, while luxury cruise ships frequently host concerts or dance parties on the water. You can take a boat to appreciate the beauty of the shores of Lake Geneva, watching the lake water, the snow-capped mountains, and the blue sky merge into one.
attractions.text_zh: 日内瓦湖又名莱芒湖，横跨瑞士和法国，是西欧的重要湖泊，也是著名的风景区和疗养地。白天你可以乘坐游船游览日内瓦湖，晚上陶醉于岸边闪烁的霓虹，还时常有豪华游轮在湖面上举办音乐会或舞会。可乘坐游船领略日内瓦湖岸边美景，看湖水、雪山和蓝天连成一片。

attractions.text_en: The Upper Town, set on the hillside on the right bank of the Rhône, is also called the Upper Town by local residents because of its higher elevation. Not only is it a gathering place for churches and historic sites, but among its winding little alleys there are also many small, charming antique shops. The former residence of Rousseau, the thinker of the European Enlightenment, is also located within the old town.
attractions.text_zh: 在隆河右岸山坡上的上城区，因为地势较高的缘故，当地的居民又称之为上城。这里不但是教堂、古迹的聚集地，在蜿蜒的小巷弄间还有许多小巧可爱的古董商店，欧洲启蒙时代的思想家卢梭的故居也位于旧城区内。

attractions.text_en:
Geneva Water Fountain
The great fountain sits on the surface of Lake Geneva near the English Garden, and is one of Geneva's most iconic sights. The great fountain resembles a column of water spouted by a whale, standing 140 meters high with a discharge of 500 liters; its spectacular sight can be seen from far away in the city center. At night you may also have the chance to see the great fountain illuminated by lights, which is even more magnificent.
attractions.text_zh:
日内瓦喷泉
大喷泉位于英国花园附近的日内瓦湖面上，是日内瓦最具代表性的景观之一。大喷泉宛若鲸鱼喷出的水柱，有140米高、500公升喷水量，其壮观景象从市中心很远就能看见。夜晚时还有机会看到灯光照明下的大喷泉，更是宏伟。

attractions.text_en:
Flower Clock
The Flower Clock is located by the shore of Lake Geneva, on the west side of the English Garden. The combination of flowers and clockwork showcases Geneva's renowned reputation as the "capital of watchmaking," and for this reason it has become a symbol of Geneva. Although flower clocks can also be seen in other Swiss cities, Geneva's Flower Clock is the true progenitor of all flower clocks.
attractions.text_zh:
花钟
花钟坐落在日内瓦湖畔、英国花园的西边。鲜花与钟表的结合使得它彰显出了日内瓦“钟表之都”的美名，也因此成为了日内瓦的一个象征。虽然在瑞士的其他城市也能见到花钟的身影，但是日内瓦的花钟才是真正的花钟始祖。

attractions.text_en: Set in the Bernese Highlands, Lake Thun has deep-blue waters and is known as "the right eye of God." Lingering by the shores of Lake Thun, you see the beautiful villages before you, the solemn castle, and the Eiger, Mönch, and Jungfrau peaks gradually emerging at the far end of the lake. Your gaze shifts between telephoto and wide angle, freezing every frame of picturesque scenery in your heart.
attractions.text_zh: 坐落于伯尔尼高地上的图恩湖，拥有深蓝色的湖水，被称之为“上帝的右眼”。驻足于图恩湖畔，眼前的美丽村落，庄严的城堡，湖畔尽头的慢慢浮现的艾格峰、僧侣峰和少女峰，视线在长焦与广角之间切换，在心中定格每一帧如画风景。

attractions.text_en: At the northern foot of the Alps, Lake Brienz has waters that are blue tinged with green—called the Tiffany high-grade blue waters—and enjoys the reputation of being "the left eye of God." Lake Brienz has the purest waters in Switzerland. The book Around the Globe (Switzerland) describes it thus: "An extraordinarily charming, tranquil village, with characterful street architecture, azure lake waters, a mysterious lake, dense forests, an adorable steam locomotive, and a panorama of the Alps—the various charms of Switzerland are concentrated here."
attractions.text_zh: 阿尔卑斯山北麓的布里恩茨湖，湖水蓝中带绿，被称为Tiffany高级蓝的湖水，有着“上帝的左眼”的美誉。布里恩茨湖是瑞士最为纯净的湖水，《走遍全球（瑞士）》书上这么描述：“一个极富风情的恬静村子，富有情趣的街道建筑、蔚蓝色的湖水、神秘的湖泊、茂密的森林、可爱的蒸汽机车和阿尔卑斯全景图，瑞士的各种魅力在这里浓缩。

attractions.text_en: In German, "Bern" means "bear," and the bear is the emblem of Bern, which is therefore also fondly called "the bear city." The old town of Bern, first built in the 12th century, is not only gentle, serene, and exceedingly beautiful, but also full of unique little touches: more than 100 fountains in various forms, arcaded walkways, soaring towers, the Bear Pit where bears appear... and the ingeniously designed astronomical calendar clock. On every hour the bell sounds, the golden rooster atop the clock cranes its neck and crows, a troop of little figures emerges in response, and finally the topmost figure strikes the bronze bell—a series of performances that is especially delightful.
attractions.text_zh: 伯尔尼在德语中即是“熊”的意思，“熊”就是伯尔尼的代表，故而也有“熊城”的美誉。始建于12世纪的伯尔尼老城，不但温润静谧、风景极美，而且城中还有很多独特的小巧思：100多处形式各异的喷泉，带拱廊的走道，高耸的塔楼，熊出没的熊苑......还有设计精巧的天文日历钟，每逢整点敲响钟声，钟上的金鸡引颈长鸣，一群小人应声而出，最后，最上面的小人将铜铃敲响，一系列的表演格外有趣。

attractions.text_en: This clock tower was originally part of the western city gate; its current appearance is the form rebuilt after a fire in the 15th century. On the clock tower is a set of multifunctional astronomical clocks which, besides displaying the time, the seasons, and the astronomical phenomena, also put on a wonderful puppet time-telling show about 4 minutes before every hour.
attractions.text_zh: 这座钟楼原本是西城门的一部分，目前大家所看到的外观，是15世纪火灾之后重建的模样。钟楼上有一组多功能的天文钟，除了显示时间、季节、星象之外，每逢整点前4分钟左右，还会有精彩的玩偶报时秀。

attractions.text_en: The Jungfrau lies some twenty to thirty kilometers south of Interlaken, at an elevation of 4,158 meters, and is one of the higher peaks of the Alps. Its summit is covered in ice and snow all year round, while at its foot the grass is verdant and the scenery beautiful—a famous Swiss destination for sightseeing and outdoor sports. The Jungfrau region was listed as a World Natural Heritage Site in 2001.
attractions.text_zh: 少女峰位于因特拉肯以南二三十公里处，海拔 4158 米，是阿尔卑斯山脉的较高的山峰之一。山顶常年被冰雪覆盖，而山下却绿草茵茵、风景秀丽，是瑞士有名的观光及户外运动胜地。少女峰地区已于 2001 年被列为世界自然遗产。

attractions.text_en: The Aletsch region has been inscribed on UNESCO's World Heritage List. Also known as the "Great Aletsch Glacier," the ice here weighs over 1.1 billion tons and is the famous, spectacular glacial landscape of the Alps. The glacier extends from the northern slopes of the Eiger, Mönch, and Jungfrau toward the canton of Valais, and the glacial meltwater flows through the pristine Massa Gorge into the Rhône. Because of this, all kinds of rare plants grow in the region, which is also the habitat of many rare animals, and an excellent place for activities such as hiking and skiing—its magnificent scenery is difficult to put into words.
attractions.text_zh: 阿莱奇(Aletsch)地区已被联合国教科文组织列入世界遗产名录，又称为“大阿莱奇冰川”，这里冰重超过11亿吨，是阿尔卑斯山脉著名壮观的冰川地貌。冰川从艾格峰、僧侣峰和少女峰的北坡向瓦莱州延伸，冰川融水通过原始的马萨峡谷(Massa Gorge)流入罗纳河，因而该地区生长着各种珍稀植物，是许许多多珍稀动物的栖息地，也是徒步和滑雪等项目的绝佳地点，壮丽的风景难以用语言描述。

attractions.text_en: Located at the northern foot of the Eiger, Grindelwald is home to the famous postcard photography spot of the Swiss "dreamy hillside" that is a favorite of photographers, and is also the Alpine town one must pass through to visit the Jungfrau. Together with First, the Jungfrau, Wengen, Lauterbrunnen, and others, it forms the most magnificent and beautiful scenic line of the Jungfrau region. In winter it is a famous snow-viewing destination, and in summer it is a paradise for hiking enthusiasts; the lakeside, green grassy meadows, waterfalls, dairy cows, and snow-capped mountains together make this an enchanting town.
attractions.text_zh: 位于艾格峰(Eiger)的北麓脚下的格林德尔瓦尔德(Grindelwald) ，这里有摄影家心头最爱的瑞士“梦幻山坡”著名明信片拍摄地，也是游览少女峰必经的阿尔卑斯小镇，同菲斯特(First)、少女峰(Jungfrau)、翁根(Wengen)、劳特布伦嫩（Lauterbrunnen）等一起组成了少女峰地区最为壮阔美丽的风景线。冬季是著名的观雪胜地，夏季又是徒步爱好者的天堂，湖畔、绿草青地、瀑布、奶牛、雪山共同构成让这座让人着迷的小镇。

attractions.text_en: Lauterbrunnen lies on the western side of the Jungfrau region. More than 70 waterfalls and streams cascade down from the cliffs, so the literal translation of Lauterbrunnen from German is "many springs"—this town is a veritable town of waterfalls. Among them, the Staubbach Falls is the village's iconic sight, which the poets Goethe and Wordsworth wrote verses to praise. In addition, there are the Mürren Falls and the Trümmelbach Falls, which surge down from a cave ten stories high—not to be missed. From Lauterbrunnen you can take the WAB railway to reach Wengen, Kleine Scheidegg, the Jungfrau, and other places. At the same time, by taking the cable car via Mürren you can reach the Schilthorn and other places, and feast your eyes on the majestic scenery of the Bernese Highlands.
attractions.text_zh: 劳特布龙嫩(Lauterbrunnen)位于少女峰地区的西面，从山崖上落下来70多个瀑布和小河，所以劳特布龙嫩的德语直译是很多的泉水，这个小镇是名副其实的瀑布镇。其中施陶河瀑布是村子的标志性景观，诗人歌德和伍德·沃斯曾写诗来赞美它。此外还有米伦瀑布和从十层楼高的山洞里飞奔而下的特吕默尔河瀑布，也不可错过。从劳特布龙嫩出发可以乘WAB铁路到达翁根、克莱纳谢德格、少女峰等地。同时，乘坐缆车经米伦，可到达雪朗峰等地，饱览伯尔尼高地的雄伟风光。

attractions.text_en: Kleine Scheidegg lies between the Eiger and the Lauberhorn in the Bernese Highlands of Switzerland. The name means "little watershed," but in reality Kleine Scheidegg is actually higher than the nearby Grosse Scheidegg. In winter, Kleine Scheidegg is the center of the skiing area around Grindelwald and Wengen, and in summer it is one of the most popular hiking routes in the Alps. At the same time, Kleine Scheidegg is also the starting point of the Jungfrau Railway, and trains to and from the Jungfrau must transfer at Kleine Scheidegg.
attractions.text_zh: 小夏戴克位于瑞士伯恩高地的艾格峰和劳伯角峰（Lauberhorn）之间，这个名字的意思是“小分水岭”，但实际上小夏戴克比附近的大戴夏克（Grosse Scheidegg）还来的高。小夏戴克冬季是格林德尔瓦尔德和稳根周围滑雪区域的中心，夏季是阿尔卑斯山最受欢迎的徒步路线。同时，小夏戴克也是少女峰铁路的起点，往返于少女峰的列车必须在小夏戴客换乘。

attractions.text_en: Lucerne (Luzern) means "city of lights" in German. Legend has it that a lantern-bearing angel guided Lucerne's earliest settlers to choose the location of the church. Lucerne was originally just a small fishing village, but because it is set by a beautifully scenic lake, embraced by legend-filled mountains, and complemented by the medieval water tower and the Chapel Bridge (also called the Kapellbrücke, or Mill Bridge) that have stood for centuries in the river by the lake, it radiates a charm unique to Switzerland. From the 13th to the 19th century, Lucerne, as the main gateway in and out of the Alps, accumulated considerable wealth. Later, its medieval old town and the surrounding beautiful scenery became one of Switzerland's major tourist attractions.
attractions.text_zh: 卢塞恩（Luzern）在德语中是光明之城之意（cityoflights），传说一位掌灯天使指引卢塞恩最早的定居者选定了教堂的位置。卢塞恩原本只是一座小渔村，但因座落在风景优美的湖边，被充满传奇色彩的群山环抱，与那在湖畔河中站立了数百年的中世纪水塔与教堂桥（又名卡贝尔桥，磨房桥）交相辉映，散发着瑞士特有的魅力。13至19世纪期间，卢塞恩作为进出阿尔卑斯山的主要门户，累积了相当的财富。而后，她的中世纪老城与周边的美景更成为了瑞士的主要旅游景点之一。

attractions.text_en: Zurich Cathedral, also called the twin-towered church. This abbey church was first built around 1100; its architectural style is famous for its Romanesque twin towers, which serve as a landmark of Zurich. This church, which faces the Fraumünster across the river, played a pivotal role in the 16th-century Swiss Reformation, and the Faculty of Theology of the University of Zurich and the Museum of the Reformation are both established here. The stained-glass windows inside the church are the masterpieces of Giacometti, the master of Swiss modern art.
attractions.text_zh: 苏黎世大教堂，又称为双塔教堂。这座修道院教堂始建于1100年前后，其建筑风格以罗曼式的双塔闻名，并以此作为苏黎世的地标。这座与圣母大教堂隔河相望的教堂在16世纪瑞士宗教改革中，起到了举足轻重的作用，苏黎世大学神学院和宗教改革博物馆都设立于此。教堂内的彩画玻璃是瑞士现代艺术大师贾科梅蒂的杰作。

attractions.text_en: The Limmat River is drawn from the northern end of Lake Zurich, then flows through the center of Zurich, and continues northwest for 35 kilometers before finally emptying into the Aare. Walking along the Limmat, watching the slowly flowing river water, is yet another quiet and peaceful day—this is probably the feeling of life being serene and good. The swans in the river inadvertently wander into travelers' photos, adding a touch of liveliness and playfulness to this calm river.
attractions.text_zh: 利马特河从苏黎世湖北端引出，然后流经苏黎世市中心，再向西北方流35公里，最后注入阿勒河（Aare）。行走在利马特河边，看着缓慢流动的河水，又是静谧而祥和的一天，这大概就是岁月静好的感觉，河里天鹅在游人拍照时不经意的闯入，又为这平静的河水增添一丝灵动和跳脱之感。

attractions.text_en: Situated between Lucerne and Interlaken, the famous GoldenPass Express passes through here. It has the purest alpine lake waters in Switzerland, embraced by mountains amid verdant green grass, with a quaint village scattered along the shores of Lake Lungern—truly a Shangri-la far from the hustle and bustle of the world.
attractions.text_zh: 地处琉森与因特拉肯之间，著名的金色山口快车就会从这里经过。这里拥有瑞士最为纯净的高山湖水，群山环抱，绿草茵茵，古朴的村庄散落于龙疆湖畔，俨然一座远离尘嚣的世外桃源。

attractions.text_en: Lindenhof means "the courtyard of the linden trees." The park sits on a small hill covered with linden trees in the center of Zurich's old town. Before you is the Limmat River, making it an ideal place to admire Zurich Cathedral and the scenery of the right bank.
attractions.text_zh: 林登霍夫(Lindenhof)，意思为菩提树的中庭，公园坐落于苏黎世老城中心一片被菩提树覆盖的小山丘上。眼前就是利马特河，是欣赏苏黎世大教堂和右岸风光的理想之地。

attractions.text_en: Take a boat to tour Lake Lucerne; the Alpine region of central Switzerland can also be explored by waterway, enjoying the perfect fusion of lake-and-mountain scenery with magnificent peaks. (This product is included only from November to March each year, as a substitute for the Interlaken cruise during its maintenance season.)
attractions.text_zh: 乘船游览琉森湖，连通瑞士中部的阿尔卑斯山区也可以通过水路探索，乐享湖光山色与壮丽山峦的完美融合。（此产品仅每年11月到3月份包含，作为因特拉肯游船维修季的替代项目）

attractions.text_en:
Zurich's old town is a not-to-be-missed place to experience. Here gather traditional craftsmen and antique dealers, bookstores and flower shops, as well as jewelry and accessories, fashion boutiques, and of course Zurich's own local brands. Famous streets and lanes such as Bahnhofstrasse, Rennweg, Niederdorf, and Augustine
Lane are all located in the old town.
attractions.text_zh:
苏黎世的老城区是个不可错过的体验之地，这里汇聚了传统工匠与古董商、书店和花铺，也有珠宝首饰，时尚精品，当然也少不了苏黎世本土品牌。班霍夫大街(Bahnhofstrasse)、伦韦格街(Rennweg)、尼德道尔夫(Niederdorf)与圣奥古斯丁巷(Augustine
Lane)等著名街巷都位于老城区。

attractions.text_en: Lake Zurich is 4 kilometers wide and about 39 kilometers long. The piers on the lake are packed with yachts of all kinds, looking just like a club for the rich. One end of Lake Zurich reaches deep into the city center, and white swans and wild ducks can be seen everywhere on the water, leisurely and at ease—a scene of complete harmony. The northern shore of Lake Zurich is where the rich live, dubbed the "Gold Coast," while the southern shore is called the "Silver Coast." The end of Bahnhofstrasse is Lake Zurich; as one of the "world's most livable cities," the life of true Zurichers is everywhere imbued with tranquility and leisure.
attractions.text_zh: 苏黎世湖宽4公里，长约39公里，湖面码头停满了各色游艇，俨然一个富人俱乐部。苏黎世湖一段的尽头深入市中心，湖面上白天鹅、野鸭随处可见，悠闲自在，一派和谐景象。苏黎世湖的北岸为富人居住地，号称“金岸”，而南岸则称之为“银岸”。班霍夫大街的尽头便是苏黎世湖，作为“世界宜居的城市”，真正的苏黎世人的生活处处渗透着宁静和悠闲。

attractions.text_en: Lake Zurich is 4 kilometers wide and about 39 kilometers long. Its docks are filled with yachts of every kind, much like a rich people's club. One end of Lake Zurich reaches deep into the city center, where white swans and wild ducks can be seen everywhere on the water, leisurely and carefree, presenting a harmonious scene. The north shore of Lake Zurich is where the wealthy live, dubbed the "Gold Coast," while the south shore is called the "Silver Coast." Bahnhofstrasse ends at Lake Zurich. As a "world's most livable city," the life of true Zurich residents is permeated everywhere with tranquility and leisure.
attractions.text_zh: 苏黎世湖宽4公里，长约39公里，湖面码头停满了各色游艇，俨然一个富人俱乐部。苏黎世湖一段的尽头深入市中心，湖面上白天鹅、野鸭随处可见，悠闲自在，一派和谐景象。苏黎世湖的北岸为富人居住地，号称“金岸”，而南岸则称之为“银岸”。班霍夫大街的尽头便是苏黎世湖，作为“世界宜居的城市”，真正的苏黎世人的生活处处渗透着宁静和悠闲。

attractions.text_en: The twin towers of Zurich Cathedral are the landmark building of Zurich. According to legend, Charlemagne (Charlemagne the Great, king of the Carolingian dynasty of the Frankish Kingdom and the founder of the Holy Roman Empire) built the twin towers above the graves of Zurich's patron saints Felix and Regula. Other sights worth seeing include St. Peter's Church, which has the largest clock face in Europe, and the Fraumünster of Zurich, the latter famous for its stained-glass windows designed by Giacometti (Switzerland's master existentialist sculptor and painter) and Chagall (the surrealist painter).
attractions.text_zh: 苏黎世大教堂的双塔是苏黎世的地标性建筑。根据传说，查理曼（查理曼大帝，法兰克王国卡洛林王朝国王，神圣罗马帝国的奠基人）将双塔建在了苏黎世主保圣人Felix和Regula的墓地之上。其他值得一看的景点还包括：拥有欧洲至大钟面的圣彼得教堂和苏黎世圣母大教堂，该教堂因贾科梅蒂（瑞士超存在主义雕塑大师，画家）和夏卡尔（超现实主义画家）绘制的彩色玻璃窗而闻名。

attractions.text_en: Bahnhofstrasse (also known as Station Street) is one of Europe's longest shopping avenues and one of the most expensive shopping avenues in the world. More precisely, it is not only the truly priceless heart of Zurich, lined with luxury brands from around the world and private banks. Walking along Zurich's Bahnhofstrasse, countless visitors feel an inexplicable excitement, because beneath their feet are stored gold bars said to be among the largest quantities in the world, making many people too thrilled to move their feet. Standing among it, you can clearly feel the air filled with the scent of wealth, opulence, and languor.
attractions.text_zh: 班霍夫大街(又称车站大街)是欧洲较长的购物大道，也是世界上昂贵的购物大道之一，更确切的说它不仅是苏黎世真正的寸土寸金的中心，这里遍布世界各地的奢侈品牌，私人银行林立。走在苏黎世的班霍夫大街上，无数游人都会产生莫名的兴奋，因为在他们脚下储藏着数量号称世界前列的金条，让很多人都激动的挪不开脚步，置身其中，你明显能感受到空气中弥漫着财富，华贵和慵懒的气息。

attractions.text_en: Lucerne is located in central Switzerland, in the German-speaking region of Switzerland. Nestled between mountains and water, Lucerne possesses the unique beauty of the Middle Ages: medieval churches and towers, Renaissance-era palaces and mansions, as well as century-old shops and ancient streets and alleys are everywhere. The scenery of Lake Lucerne, with its mountains and water, reflects the city's beautiful views in an almost dreamlike, almost real way, making it an extraordinary pearl among Switzerland's many beautiful small towns. Since the 19th century, it has attracted many princes, nobles, and literati to visit and live here, and artists have found endless artistic inspiration in Lucerne.
attractions.text_zh: 卢塞恩位于瑞士中部，属瑞士德语区。依山傍水的卢塞恩具有中世纪所特有的美：中世纪的教堂、塔楼，文艺复兴时期的宫厅、邸宅以及百年老店、长街古巷，比比皆是。卢塞恩湖的湖光山色更是将城中的美景倒影的亦幻亦真，是瑞士众多美丽小城中不凡的那颗明珠。从19世纪起，就吸引了众多的王公贵族和文人墨客前来游览和居住，艺术家们在卢塞恩得到了不尽的艺术灵感。

attractions.text_en: Switzerland's GoldenPass train travels through the beautiful regions of the Alps, taking in charming lake and mountain scenery all along the way. One of its most beautiful stretches is the GoldenPass train (Luzern-Lungern Express) from Lungern to Lucerne (Luzern). Along the way are picturesque villages, azure lake waters, dense vegetation, vast pastures, leisurely cattle and sheep, and the snow-capped Alps. The ever-changing scenery from the foot to the summit of the mountains makes one marvel that this is a paradise on earth.
attractions.text_zh: 瑞士的黄金列车穿梭于阿尔卑斯美丽的区域，一路总览迷人的湖光山色。其中美丽的一段就是龙疆（Lungern）到卢塞恩（Luzern）这一段的金色山口列车（Luzren-Lungern Express），沿途秀美的村庄，碧蓝的湖水，茂密的植被，广袤的牧场，悠闲的牛羊，还有白雪皑皑的阿尔卑斯山脉，从山脚到山顶变幻的风景，让人感叹这就是人间仙境。

attractions.text_en: Located between Lucerne and Interlaken, the famous GoldenPass train passes through here. This place has Switzerland's purest alpine lake waters, surrounded by mountains, with lush green grass. The quaint village is scattered along the shore of Lake Lungern, making it a veritable paradise far removed from the hustle and bustle of the world.
attractions.text_zh: 地处卢塞恩与因特拉肯之间，著名的金色山口列车就会从这里经过。这里拥有瑞士最为纯净的高山湖水，群山环抱，绿草茵茵，古朴的村庄散落于龙疆湖畔，俨然一座远离尘嚣的世外桃源。

attractions.text_en: Lake Thun, located in the Bernese Oberland, has deep blue waters and is called the "right eye of God." Standing on the shore of Lake Thun, before your eyes are beautiful villages, solemn castles, and at the far end of the lake the slowly emerging Eiger, Mönch, and Jungfrau peaks. Your gaze switches between telephoto and wide angle, freezing each frame of picturesque scenery in your heart.
attractions.text_zh: 坐落于伯尔尼高地上的图恩湖，拥有深蓝色的湖水，被称之为“上帝的右眼”。驻足于图恩湖畔，眼前的美丽村落，庄严的城堡，湖畔尽头的慢慢浮现的艾格峰、僧侣峰和少女峰，视线在长焦与广角之间切换，在心中定格每一帧如画风景。

attractions.text_en: Grindelwald, located at the northern foot of the Eiger, is the famous postcard photography spot of Switzerland's "dreamy hillside" beloved by photographers, and also the Alpine town one must pass through to visit the Jungfrau. Together with First, Jungfrau, Wengen, Lauterbrunnen and others, it forms the most magnificent and beautiful scenic line of the Jungfrau region. In winter it is a famous snow-watching destination, and in summer it is a paradise for hiking enthusiasts. The lakeside, green grasslands, waterfalls, dairy cows, and snow-capped mountains together make this a fascinating town.
attractions.text_zh: 位于艾格峰(Eiger)的北麓脚下的格林德尔瓦尔德(Grindelwald) ，这里有摄影家心头最爱的瑞士“梦幻山坡”著名明信片拍摄地，也是游览少女峰必经的阿尔卑斯小镇，同菲斯特(First)、少女峰(Jungfrau)、翁根(Wengen)、劳特布伦嫩（Lauterbrunnen）等一起组成了少女峰地区最为壮阔美丽的风景线。冬季是著名的观雪胜地，夏季又是徒步爱好者的天堂，湖畔、绿草青地、瀑布、奶牛、雪山共同构成让这座让人着迷的小镇。

attractions.text_en: The Jungfrau is located about twenty or thirty kilometers south of Interlaken, at an altitude of 4,158 meters, and is one of the higher peaks of the Alps. The summit is covered with ice and snow year-round, while at the foot of the mountain the grass is green and the scenery beautiful, making it a famous sightseeing and outdoor sports destination in Switzerland. The Jungfrau region was listed as a World Natural Heritage Site in 2001.
attractions.text_zh: 少女峰位于因特拉肯以南二三十公里处，海拔 4158 米，是阿尔卑斯山脉的较高的山峰之一。山顶常年被冰雪覆盖，而山下却绿草茵茵、风景秀丽，是瑞士有名的观光及户外运动胜地。少女峰地区已于 2001 年被列为世界自然遗产。

attractions.text_en: The Aletsch region has been listed by UNESCO as a World Heritage Site. Also called the "Great Aletsch Glacier," the ice here weighs over 1.1 billion tons and is the famous and spectacular glacial landform of the Alps. The glacier extends from the northern slopes of the Eiger, Mönch, and Jungfrau toward the canton of Valais. The glacial meltwater flows into the Rhône River through the pristine Massa Gorge, so the region grows all kinds of rare plants and is the habitat of many rare animals. It is also an excellent location for activities such as hiking and skiing, with magnificent scenery that is hard to describe in words.
attractions.text_zh: 阿莱奇(Aletsch)地区已被联合国教科文组织列入世界遗产名录，又称为“大阿莱奇冰川”，这里冰重超过11亿吨，是阿尔卑斯山脉著名壮观的冰川地貌。冰川从艾格峰、僧侣峰和少女峰的北坡向瓦莱州延伸，冰川融水通过原始的马萨峡谷(Massa Gorge)流入罗纳河，因而该地区生长着各种珍稀植物，是许许多多珍稀动物的栖息地，也是徒步和滑雪等项目的绝佳地点，壮丽的风景难以用语言描述。

attractions.text_en: Grindelwald First attracts visitors from all directions to admire the magnificent scenery of the north face of the Eiger. Standing on the famous First Cliff Walk by Tissot, anyone will instantly feel that they are standing at the top of the world. The Cliff Walk by Tissot is located at the summit of First, offering a unique panoramic view of the Bernese Alps.
attractions.text_zh: 格林德瓦菲斯特吸引四面八方的游客前来欣赏艾格峰北坡的壮丽风光。站在著名的菲斯特悬崖天梭巅峰栈道，任何人都会立刻感到自己站在世界之巅。悬崖天梭巅峰栈道位于菲斯特峰顶，可以一览伯尔尼兹阿尔卑斯山的独特全景。

attractions.text_en: The heart of the Alps, Switzerland's land of purity. In the car-free fairytale town of Zermatt, a unique atmosphere of tranquility and pure holiday is created. Facing the legendary Matterhorn, every breath is the freshest greeting of the Alps. Hike the five lakes to encounter reflections, take the cog railway straight up into the clouds, and explore in the ice palace. This is the ultimate place to fulfill outdoor dreams, with the unique "King of the Mountains" experience: this is one of Zermatt's core features. Capture the "classic image" — the perfect reflection of the Matterhorn in Riffelsee, the most iconic view.
attractions.text_zh: 阿尔卑斯之心，瑞士的纯净之境。在无汽车的童话小镇采尔马特，更营造了独一无二的宁静、纯净度假氛围。与传奇的马特洪峰对望。每一次呼吸，都是阿尔卑斯山最清新的问候，徒步五湖邂逅倒影，乘齿轮火车直上云霄，在冰宫探险。这里是户外梦想的终极实践地，独特的“群山之王”体验：这是采尔马特的核心特色之一。抓住“经典画面”——马特洪峰在利菲尔湖的完美倒影，这是最具标志性的景观。

attractions.text_en: The Matterhorn is located in the town of Zermatt in the canton of Valais, Switzerland, at an altitude of 4,478 meters. It is the most beautiful peak of the Alps and a symbol that Switzerland takes pride in. With its single-pillar-holding-up-the-sky posture, it points straight to the heavens, and its special triangular pyramid shape has become a representative of the Alps. Whenever the morning glow or evening light shines upon it, the perennially snow-covered mountain body refracts a metallic luster.
attractions.text_zh: 马特宏峰（Matterhorn）位于瑞士瓦莱州小镇采尔马特，海拔 4478 米，是阿尔卑斯山最美丽的山峰，也是瑞士引以为骄傲的象征，以其一柱擎天之姿，直指天际，其特殊的三角锥造型，更成为阿尔卑斯山的代表，每当朝晖夕映，长年积雪的山体折射出金属般的光芒。

attractions.name_zh: 马特洪峰冰川天堂（自费）
attractions.text_en: Take the cable car from the town of Zermatt to the Matterhorn Glacier Paradise, where you can overlook the snow-capped Alps from high up. The iconic Matterhorn rises majestically on the horizon, making the glacial landscape an unforgettable experience. This peak is surrounded by 38 imposing four-thousand-meter peaks and 14 magnificent glaciers spanning three countries, with a unique world of peaks that is fascinating. Glacier Paradise has an impressive ice palace, a comfortable cinema lounge, an impressive viewing platform, and Europe's highest alpine restaurant, making it an unforgettable visiting destination in the Swiss Alps.
attractions.text_zh: 从采尔马特小镇乘坐缆车前往马特宏峰冰川天堂乐园，您可以从高处俯瞰白雪皑皑的阿尔卑斯山。标志性的马特宏峰雄伟地耸立在地平线上，使冰川景观成为令人难忘的体验。这座山峰被 38 座气势磅礴的四千米高峰和横跨三个国家的 14 条雄伟冰川所环绕，其独特的山峰世界令人着迷。冰川天堂乐园有令人印象深刻的冰川宫殿、舒适的影院休息室、令人印象深刻的观景平台和欧洲高山餐厅，使其成为瑞士阿尔卑斯山令人难忘的游览胜地。

attractions.text_en: The red twelve minutes leading to the silent mountain summit — the Zermatt shuttle train, a ritual journey into purity welcomes you onto the platform of Täsch station. Board the train to keep a lifelong appointment with the King of the Mountains. Next, please entrust your journey to a unique alpine railway. This leg of the journey is the first baptism carefully arranged for you by the world-famous "car-free pure land" of Zermatt — a ceremonial transition through time and space, traveling from the mundane world into the Alpine sanctuary, reaching the glorious end point of the snow-mountain route.
attractions.text_zh: 通往寂静山巅的红色十二分钟——泽尔玛特专列，一段驶入纯净的仪式欢迎登上泰施（Täsch）车站的站台。登上火车，来赴一场与山之王的终身约会了。接下来，请将旅程交托给一条独特的高山铁路，段旅程是世界闻名的“无车净土”采尔马特（Zermatt）为你精心安排的第一场洗礼，一场从凡俗世界驶入阿尔卑斯圣境的、充满仪式感的时空转换到达雪山路线的荣耀终点

attractions.text_en:
The Simplon Pass connects the canton of Valais from the valley of the town of Brig to Domodossola in northern Italy. It is hailed as the most beautiful pass of the Alps, with scenery along the way changing with altitude, including both magnificent mountains and rivers and charming villages and towns. The most special of these is the Simplon Pass car-train service, an experience of the unique Swiss mountain crossing, allowing you to ride the train with both passengers and car, crossing through the mountain tunnel. The road runs through narrow and magnificent granite gorges, traveling back and forth between Brig in Switzerland and Iselle in Italy.
(The car-on-rail service Ferroutage within this itinerary will not be available after heavy snowstorms or under the risk of mudslides triggered by rainfall. We kindly ask for your understanding!)
attractions.text_zh:
辛普朗山口将瓦莱州从布里格镇的山谷和意大利北部的多莫多索拉连接起来，被誉为阿尔卑斯山最美丽的山口，沿途的风景随海拔变化，既有壮阔的山川，也有别致的村镇，其中最为特别的是：辛普朗山口的汽车列车服务，体验独特的瑞士翻山体验，让你能连人带车乘坐火车穿越山体隧道，公路穿行于狭窄壮丽的花岗岩峡谷中，往返于瑞士布里格和意大利伊塞尔之间。
（本行程内的铁路汽车服务Ferroutage，在强暴雪后或者降雨引发泥石流的风险下，将无法体验，敬请谅解！）

attractions.text_en: Although its name Duomo means "dome," the Milan Cathedral is actually a Gothic building. Dominating the city center, the Milan Cathedral was begun in 1386 and took 500 years to complete. Hailed as Italy's most magnificent Gothic building, hundreds of spires soar into the clouds, and the white marble exterior walls are carved with thousands of statues. The interior space is vast, and sunlight streams in through the beautiful stained-glass mosaics on the windows, creating dim light and a solemn religious atmosphere. The crypt of the cathedral still preserves the remains of the Church of St. Tecla that stood on the original site.
attractions.text_zh: 虽然它的名字Duomo是“圆顶”的意思，米兰大教堂实际上却是一座哥特式建筑。雄踞在市中心的米兰大教堂始建于1386年，历经500年才完工，被誉为意大利壮丽的哥特式建筑数以百计的尖塔耸入云霄，白色大理石外墙上雕刻着数千座雕像。内部空间宽广，阳光透过窗上美丽的彩色玻璃镶嵌画射入，光线朦胧，充满庄严的宗教气氛。教堂地下室中还保留着原址上的圣·特库拉教堂的遗迹。

attractions.text_en: This is a magnificent shopping mall, though most tourists who come here come for sightseeing. Under the central arcade is a Prada boutique, whose scale and window displays are among the best in Milan, especially the window displays which are updated daily. Just standing outside the windows to admire them is also a great pleasure. The Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II is filled with quite a few high-end restaurants, cafés, and shops.
attractions.text_zh: 这是一个华丽的购物商场，不过多数来这里的游客都是来观光的。中央拱廊下有着Prada精品店，规模和橱窗布置都是米兰数一数二的，尤其橱窗布置天天更新，光是站在橱窗外欣赏也是一大乐事。埃马努埃莱二世拱廊遍布了不少高级的餐馆、咖啡厅以及商店。

attractions.text_en: Sforza Castle is one of Milan's most important buildings and a witness to Milan's vicissitudinous history. Overlooking the entire castle, it resembles a grand duchy, with high walls on four sides and a meticulously planned park. Built as a castle by Count Sforza in the 14th century, it later became the residence of the Sforza family, witnessing the entire process from the family's heyday to its decline. The castle is now opened by the Milan municipal government as a museum, including the Museum of Applied Arts and Music, the Archaeological Museum, and the Museum of Ancient Art. Its back gate is the Arch of Peace, which was named after the ruler Francesco renovated it.
attractions.text_zh: 斯福尔扎城堡是米兰最重要的建筑之一，是米兰沧桑历史的见证。俯瞰整个城堡像一个大公国，有四面的高墙和精致规划过的公园。在14世纪时由斯福尔扎伯爵作为城堡而建，而后成为斯福尔扎家族的住所，见证了从鼎盛时期到家族衰败的全过程。现城堡被米兰市政府辟为博物馆，其中有应用艺术和乐曲博物馆、考古博物馆、古代艺术博物馆，他的后门是和平门，是统治者费朗西斯科改造得名的。

attractions.name_zh: 威尼斯圣马可大教堂（外观）
attractions.text_en: Known simply as St. Mark's Basilica, it stands on St. Mark's Square in the center of Venice. First built in 829 AD and rebuilt from 1043 to 1071, it was once the largest church in medieval Europe and is a classic work of Venetian architectural art. It is also a treasure house with a rich collection of artworks.
attractions.text_zh: 简称圣马可大教堂，是矗立于威尼斯市中心的圣马可广场上。始建于公元829年，重建于1043~1071年，它曾是中世纪欧洲大的教堂，是威尼斯建筑艺术的经典之作，它同时也是一座收藏丰富艺术品的宝库。

attractions.text_en: This is a museum located on Piazza San Marco, where all of Venice's past glory resides. Inside you can see not only frescoes and the like, but also medieval weapons. On the way to the dungeon, you cross the Bridge of Sighs, where you can see the outside through a small hole, rather than having so many people on the opposite bridge looking over at you. You can take photos inside, as long as you don't use a flash.
attractions.text_zh: 这是一家位于Piazza San Marco的博物馆，威尼斯过去的辉煌都在这里了。里面可以看的不仅有壁画等，还有中世纪的兵器，去地牢的时候走过叹息桥，能通过小孔看外面，而不是像对面桥上面那么多的人在往你这里看叹息桥。里面是可以拍照片的，只要你不要用闪光灯就可以了。

attractions.text_en: The Bridge of Sighs was in ancient times the route the court had to take to escort condemned prisoners to prison. The Bridge of Sighs is in the early Baroque style. The bridge is shaped like a house, with a vault covering the upper part, tightly enclosed, with only two small windows on the side facing the canal. After prisoners were tried at the Doge's Palace, serious offenders were taken to the dungeon, and when crossing this airtight bridge, they could only look at the blue sky through the small windows, losing their freedom from then on, and involuntarily letting out sighs. It is said that lovers who kiss under the bridge can stay together forever, and the film "A Little Romance" was filmed here.
attractions.text_zh: 叹息桥是古代由法院向监狱押送死囚的必经之路。叹息桥造型属早期巴洛克式风格，桥呈房屋状，上部穹隆覆盖，封闭得很严实，只有向运河一侧有两个小窗，当犯人在总督府接受审判之后，重罪犯被带到地牢中，在经过这座密不透气的的桥时，只能透过小窗看看蓝天，从此失去了自由，不自主的发出叹息之声。听说恋人们在桥下接吻就可以天长地久，而电影「情定日落桥」就在这取景的。

attractions.text_en: This is the central square of Venice, once called by Napoleon "the most beautiful drawing room in Europe." The square is surrounded on three sides by grand and magnificent palaces, and on the east side stand the tall bell tower and St. Mark's Basilica. Since ancient times, it has been the public activity center for Venice's political, religious, and traditional festival events.
attractions.text_zh: 是威尼斯的中心广场，曾被拿破仑称作“欧洲美丽的客厅”。广场三面被宏伟壮丽的宫殿围绕，东面耸立着高大的钟楼和圣马可教堂。自古以来，就是威尼斯政治、宗教及传统节日的公共活动中心。

attractions.text_en: Cinque Terre is located in the coastal area of the Province of La Spezia in the Liguria region of Italy, built along the winding Mediterranean coastline. It is the collective name for five cliffside villages: Monterosso al Mare, Vernazza, Corniglia, Manarola, and Riomaggiore. Particularly special is the hiking trail that strings together the five villages, built along the coast, which is one of the world's most beautiful hiking routes, about 15-20 kilometers, taking around 5 hours. On one side is the Mediterranean, on the other side mountains, and ahead are Italian fishing villages, making it a destination that many hiking enthusiasts flock to. In 1997 it was inscribed on the UNESCO World Cultural Heritage List.
attractions.text_zh: 五渔村位于意大利利古里亚大区(Liguria)拉斯佩齐亚省海沿岸地区，沿着蜿蜒的地中海海岸线而建，是蒙特罗索（Monterosso al Mare）、韦尔纳扎（Vernazza）、科尔尼利亚（Corniglia）、马纳罗拉（Manarola）及里奥马焦雷（Riomaggiore）这五个悬崖边上的村镇的统称。特别的是把五个村庄串起的徒步线路，沿着海岸而建，是世界上美丽的徒步路线，约15-20公里，需5小时左右，一边是地中海，另一边是山脉，而前面则是意大利渔庄，是诸多徒步爱好者趋之若鹜的胜地。1997年被联合国教科文组织列入世界文化遗产名录。

attractions.text_en: The Leaning Tower of Pisa is the freestanding bell tower of the Pisa Cathedral in Italy. Located on the Piazza dei Miracoli (Square of Miracles) to the north of the city of Pisa in the province of Tuscany, Italy, it is a world-famous sight and one of Italy's symbols, and was chosen by UNESCO as a World Heritage Site. It is said that in 1590 AD, Galileo once performed a free-fall experiment on the Leaning Tower of Pisa and overturned Aristotle's views.
attractions.text_zh: 比萨斜塔是意大利比萨城大教堂的独立式钟楼，位于意大利托斯卡纳省比萨城北面的奇迹广场上，是世界著名的景观，也是意大利标志之一，被联合国教育科学文化组织评选为世界遗产。相传在公元1590年，伽利略曾经在比萨斜塔上做了一个自由落体实验，并推翻了亚里士多德的观点

attractions.text_en: Also called the Cathedral Square, it is a walled area in the center of the city of Pisa in the Tuscany region of Italy, partly grassland. The Piazza dei Miracoli is the center of the city of Pisa, and the square has four major buildings: Pisa Cathedral, the Leaning Tower of Pisa (bell tower), the Baptistery of St. John, and the Pisa Camposanto (cemetery). Around the square the ancient city walls and gates are also preserved. In April 1987, the International Council on Monuments and Sites nominated the Piazza dei Miracoli of the city of Pisa, Italy (including the cathedral, baptistery, Leaning Tower of Pisa, and cemetery) as a World Heritage Site.
attractions.text_zh: 又名主教座堂广场，是意大利托斯卡纳大区比萨市中心一片围墙包围的区域，部分为草地。奇迹广场是比萨城的中心，广场上有四大建筑：比萨主教座堂、比萨斜塔（钟楼）、圣乔瓦尼洗礼堂、比萨墓园。广场周围还保留着古代的城墙和城门。1987年4月，国际古迹遗产理事会提名意大利比萨城的奇迹广场（包括大教堂、洗礼堂、比萨斜塔和墓园）为世界遗产。

attractions.name_en: Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore (queuing required to enter)
attractions.name_zh: 圣母百花大教堂（需排队进入）
attractions.text_en: There are many solemn and majestic churches in the world, but very few churches can be so enchanting. This beautiful church, faced with white, red, and green granite, interprets the classical, elegant, and free spirit revered in the Renaissance era to the fullest. No wonder it was named "St. Mary of the Flowers." The original site of the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore was the Church of Santa Reparata built in the 4th century. In 1296, Giovanni de' Medici funded the construction of the new church, which took 175 years to complete.
attractions.text_zh: 世界上庄严雄伟的教堂很多，但很少有教堂能如此妩媚。这座使用白、红、绿三色花岗岩贴面的美丽教堂将文艺复兴时代所推崇的古典、优雅、自由诠释得淋漓尽致，难怪会被命名为“花之圣母”。圣母百花大教堂原址是建于4世纪的圣·雷帕拉塔教堂。1296年，乔凡尼·美第奇出资建造新的教堂，花了175年时间才建成。

attractions.text_en: Piazza della Signoria has the reputation of being an open-air sculpture museum, and has also been the center of the city's political life for several centuries. On the square stand the Palazzo Vecchio (Old Palace), a replica of Michelangelo's sculpture "David," and the Fountain of Neptune. The open Piazza della Signoria is surrounded by the Uffizi Gallery, the Loggia dei Lanzi, and numerous cafés and bars. The famous Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore is located directly to its north.
attractions.text_zh: 市政广场有露天雕塑博物馆的美誉，也是该城数个世纪以来政治生活中心，广场上坐落着维琪奥宫（旧宫）、米开朗基罗雕塑作品《大卫》的复制品以及海神喷泉。开放式的市政广场，周围环绕着乌菲兹美术馆、佣兵凉亭和众多的咖啡厅、酒吧。著名的圣母百花大教堂就位于它的正北方。

attractions.text_en: Located on the Arno River, the Ponte Vecchio is also known as the Old Bridge. Built in 1345, it is one of Europe's earlier large-span circular-arch bridges. It is said that Dante encountered the young maiden Beatrice here, and later poured his longing into "The Divine Comedy." Over the centuries, it has withstood floods, social upheavals, and wars while remaining standing. It is one of Florence's famous landmark buildings.
attractions.text_zh: 位于阿诺河(Arno)上的维奇奥桥，又被称为老桥。建于1345年，是欧洲较早的大跨度圆弧拱桥，据说但丁在这里邂逅了少女比阿特丽丝，后来将思慕之情倾注到《神曲》之中。几百年间，它经历过的水灾、社会动乱、战争而屹立不倒。是佛罗伦萨的著名地标建筑之一。

attractions.text_en: The Basilica of Santa Croce is an important church in Florence. First, it is the largest church of the Franciscan order; second, this church is also a fairly standard minor basilica, and the interior structure of most European Catholic churches developed on the basis of this church's form. The Basilica of Santa Croce was designed and built starting in 1294 by Arnolfo di Cambio, and was not preliminarily completed and put into use until 1443, but the entire facade of the church was added only in 1863, and the Gothic bell tower behind the church was also added in 1842. Inside the church are monuments and tombs of some of Florence's heavyweight celebrities, such as Dante, Michelangelo, Galileo, Machiavelli, Rossini, and so on.
attractions.text_zh: 圣十字教堂是佛罗伦萨一座重要的教堂，首先它是圣方济各教派至大的教堂，其次这座教堂还是一座相当标准的次级主座教堂，大部分的欧洲天主教堂的内部结构均是在这个教堂的形式基础上发展的。圣十字教堂由阿莫尔福·迪坎比奥于1294年开始设计和建造的，直到1443年才初步完工开始启用，但教堂的整个立面是1863年才增建的，1842年还增建了教堂后面的哥特式钟楼。教堂内有一些发佛罗伦萨重量级名人的纪念碑和陵墓，例如：但丁、米开朗基罗、伽利略、马基维利、罗西尼等等。
