You can stroll alone and feel the everyday vibe of Boulevard Haussmann; or, together with a few friends, walk along Boulevard Haussmann and enjoy the delight of shopping.
highlights.text_zh:
漫步巴黎奥斯曼大街
奥斯曼大街不在巴黎繁华的区域内，却因为2幢著名的百货公司而生动起来：法国的百货公司———老佛爷百货(GaleriesLafayette)及以家饰精品著称的春天百货(Printemps)。你可以独自漫步，感受奥斯曼大道的生活气息；也可以与三五好友一起，穿行在奥斯曼大街上，享受购物的欣喜。

attractions.text_en: The Palace of Versailles has always been a magnificent monument of the historical period of France's feudal rule. In terms of content, it was not only the French court, but also the administrative center of the state, as well as a concrete embodiment of the political views and lifestyle of French society at the time. It was the first time in Europe since the ancient Roman Empire that the power of an autocratic regime could concentrate such enormous manpower, material, and financial resources. At that time, in order to build it, Louis XIV mobilized more than 30,000 workers as well as architects, engineers, and technicians; besides solving the complex technical problems arising from constructing a large-scale architectural complex, they also had to solve problems in various aspects such as water supply and roads. It can be seen that the success of the Palace of Versailles powerfully proves the progress of France's economy and technology at the time, as well as the wisdom of the laboring people.
attractions.text_zh: 凡尔赛宫始终是法国封建统治历史时期的一座华丽的纪念碑。从内容上讲不仅是法兰西宫廷，而且是国家的行政中心，也是当时法国社会政治观点、生活方式的具体体现。它是欧洲自古罗马帝国以来，第一次表现出能够集中如此巨大的人力、物力、财力的专制政体力量。当时，路易十四为了建造它，共动用了三万余名工人和建筑师、工程师、技师，除了要解决建造大规模建筑群所产生的复杂技术问题外，还要解决引水、道路等各方面的问题。可见，凡尔赛宫的成功，有力地证明了当时法国经济和技术的进步和劳动人民的智慧。

attractions.text_en: Boulevard Haussmann is located between the 8th and 9th arrondissements of Paris. On the street are the two major department stores, Galeries Lafayette and Printemps. Marcel Proust, the author of "In Search of Lost Time," completed most of the writing of "In Search of Lost Time" in his residence at No. 102 on this street.
attractions.text_zh: 奥斯曼大街位于巴黎第八区和第九区之间。街上有巴黎老佛爷百货公司和春天百货两大百货公司。《追忆似水年华》的作者马塞尔·普鲁斯特曾在这条街102号的居所里，完成了《追忆似水年华》的大部分写作。

attractions.text_en: The Paris Opera House was designed by Charles Garnier in 1861 and is the pinnacle work of eclecticism. Its architecture perfectly combines several architectural forms, including the ancient Greek and Roman colonnade and Baroque; grand in scale, exquisite and meticulous, resplendent and magnificent, it is hailed as a theater where painting, marble, and gold ornamentation shine in mutual splendor, giving people great enjoyment. It is one of the typical buildings of Napoleon III.
attractions.text_zh: 巴黎歌剧院是由查尔斯·加尼叶于1861年设计的，是折衷主义登峰造极的作品，其建筑将古希腊罗马式柱廊、巴洛克等几种建筑形式完美地结合在一起，规模宏大，精美细致，金碧辉煌，被誉为是一座绘画、大理石和金饰交相辉映的剧院，给人以极大的享受。是拿破仑三世典型的建筑之一。

overview.text_zh:
上午参观法兰西引以为傲的卢浮宫博物馆，届时、将由法兰西国家馆讲解师，精选主题深度讲解；
下午前往游览巴黎圣母院、西岱岛，埃菲尔铁塔（外观）以及战神广场，之后乘坐塞纳河游船游览荣军院（外观）、大小皇宫（外观）、协和广场等地，全天游览巴黎市中心景点。
夜宿：巴黎美居酒店或诺富特酒店或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Mercure Hotel Paris or Novotel Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The Mercure or Novotel Paris is a comfortable business hotel under the Accor group. Located in the safer southern part of Paris, its convenient location makes travel easy, and whether you are on a business trip or a leisure journey, it offers you a comfortable stay. This stems from its distinctive brand characteristics: more than 700 hotels worldwide, professional and rigorous quality control, a unique hotel style deeply rooted in local character, and a warm and welcoming management team.
accommodation.text_zh:
巴黎美居酒店或诺富特酒店或同等4星级酒店
巴黎美居或诺富特酒店是雅高旗下的舒适型商务酒店，酒店位于更为安全的巴黎南部，地理位置方便出行，无论您是商务出差还是休闲之旅，都为您提供舒适的住宿体验，源于独特的品牌特征：全球超过700家酒店，专业严谨的质量监控，深得当地特色的独特酒店风格以及具有热情的管理团队。

highlights.text_en:
Take a Seine River cruise and feel the tenderness and romance of Paris
Aboard the famous "Bateaux Mouches" cruise boats with their transparent cabins, sailing along the Seine that weaves together so many sights. Over a roughly 3.2-kilometer, about one-hour journey, you pass famous landmarks such as Notre-Dame de Paris, the Grand and Petit Palais, the Pont Alexandre III, the Pont des Arts (love-lock bridge), the Louvre, the Champs-Élysées and the Île de la Cité. On the surface of the Seine you can savor Paris's romantic night, beautiful scenery and wonderful music — it is hailed as "the in-depth tour of Paris not to be missed."
highlights.text_zh:
乘塞纳河游船，感受巴黎的温柔与浪漫
乘坐著名的透明船舱的“苍蝇船”游船航行在融合诸多景点的塞纳河畔，3.2公里约1小时的航程途径巴黎圣母院，大小皇宫、亚历山大三世大桥，巴黎锁桥，卢浮宫、香榭丽舍大道巴黎西岱岛等著名景点，在塞纳河面上感受巴黎浪漫夜色，美景及美妙的音乐，被称为《巴黎不可错过的深度游览项目》。

attractions.text_en: If the Louvre bears witness to the glory of the Gauls, then the Île de la Cité, Notre-Dame de Paris and the Paris City Hall record an indissoluble bond with the Romans who conquered them. Without the Romans, there would be no Île de la Cité. Without the Île de la Cité, there would be no Paris as we know it today.
attractions.text_zh: 如果说卢浮宫见证了高卢人的荣耀，那西岱岛，巴黎圣母院和巴黎市政厅则写下了与征服她们的罗马人的不解之缘。如果没有罗马人，就没有西岱岛。没有西岱岛，就没有现在的巴黎。

attractions.text_en: Notre-Dame Cathedral sits on the Île de la Cité in the center of Paris and is the cathedral of the Catholic Archdiocese of Paris. The cathedral is in the Gothic style, and visitors can climb the towers; although you won't meet "the Hunchback of Notre-Dame," you can see the great bell from the 17th century, get up close to the mythical beasts on the cathedral's exterior walls, and look down over the beautiful scenery of the Île de la Cité and the Seine.
attractions.text_zh: 巴黎圣母院大教堂坐落于巴黎市中心的西岱岛上，是天主教巴黎总教区的主教座堂。教堂为哥特式风格，游客可以登上塔楼参观，虽然遇不到“钟楼怪人”，但却能看到17世纪的大钟、近距离接触教堂外壁上的神兽、俯瞰西岱岛与塞纳河的美丽风光。

attractions.text_en: It is one of the oldest museums in the world and a world-renowned treasury of art. The Louvre's building is shaped like a "U" and is divided into a new and an old part. The glass pyramid entrance in front of the Louvre was designed by the Chinese-American master architect I. M. Pei. Here are housed more than 400,000 works of art, of which about 35,000 are on long-term display, encompassing art from ancient Egypt, Greece, Etruria and Rome to medieval Europe and the countries of the East — truly an outstanding palace of art in human history. The itinerary includes a standard individual-visitor ticket (no Chinese audio guide).
attractions.text_zh: 是世界上古老的博物馆之一，是一座举世闻名的艺术宝库。卢浮宫建筑呈“U”形，分别为新、旧两个部分。卢浮宫前玻璃金字塔的入口是华裔建筑大师贝聿铭所设计。在这里珍藏着40余万件艺术珍品、其中长期展出约3.5万件，囊括了古埃及、希腊、伊特鲁里亚、罗马到欧洲中世纪和东方各国的艺术品，堪称人类历史上杰出的艺术殿堂。 行程包含普通散客门票（无中文讲解器）。

attractions.text_en:
The Champ de Mars is a large expanse of parkland located in the 7th arrondissement of Paris, France, lying between the Eiffel Tower to its northwest and the École Militaire (Military School) to its southeast.
Until the latter half of the 18th century it was an abandoned open ground; only after the Military School was established in 1765 did its status gradually rise, and at that time its main purpose was to serve as a place for military training. On 17 July 1791, during the French Revolution, a massacre and bloodshed took place here. Later, France used this ground to host several World's Fairs as well as the 1900 Olympic Games.
attractions.text_zh:
战神广场是一个座落于法国巴黎七区的广大带状公园，介于位在其西北方的埃菲尔铁塔、以及在其东南方的巴黎军校之间。
在十八世纪下半叶之前，这是一块被遗弃的空地，直到军事学校在1765年建立，它的地位才逐渐提升，当时主要的目的是用来作为军事训练的场所。在法国大革命时期的1791年7月17日，此处曾发生屠杀流血事件。后来法国曾经使用这个场地迎接过几次的世界博览会以及1900年的奥林匹克运动会。

attractions.text_en: The Eiffel Tower is one of the symbols of Paris, affectionately called the "Iron Lady" by the French. If Notre-Dame de Paris is the symbol of ancient Paris, then the Eiffel Tower is the emblem of modern Paris.
attractions.text_zh: 埃菲尔铁塔是巴黎的标志之一，被法国人爱称为“铁娘子”。如果说，巴黎圣母院是古代巴黎的象征，那么埃菲尔铁塔就是现代巴黎的标志。

attractions.text_en: Board the famous "Bateaux Mouches" cruise boats with their transparent cabins, sailing along the Seine that weaves together so many sights. Over a roughly 3.2-kilometer, about one-hour journey, you pass famous landmarks such as Notre-Dame de Paris, the Grand and Petit Palais, the Pont Alexandre III, the Pont des Arts (love-lock bridge), the Louvre, the Champs-Élysées and the Île de la Cité. On the surface of the Seine you can savor Paris's romantic night, beautiful scenery and wonderful music — it is hailed as "the in-depth tour of Paris not to be missed."
attractions.text_zh: 乘坐著名的透明船舱的“苍蝇船”游船航行在融合诸多景点的塞纳河畔，3.2公里约1小时的航程途径巴黎圣母院，大小皇宫、亚历山大三世大桥，巴黎锁桥，卢浮宫、香榭丽舍大道巴黎西岱岛等著名景点，在塞纳河面上感受巴黎浪漫夜色，美景及美妙的音乐，被称为《巴黎不可错过的深度游览项目》。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, head to Paris's fashion center, the Boulevard Haussmann and the Rue Royale, to freely visit fashionable shopping districts such as the Paris Opera (exterior), Printemps department store and Galeries Lafayette.
In the afternoon, head to the Palace of Versailles in the southwestern suburbs of Paris and tour the palace; afterwards, check in to the hotel.
Overnight: Mercure Hotel Paris or Novotel Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
上午前往巴黎时尚中心奥斯曼大街和皇家大道，自由参观巴黎歌剧院（外观）及春天百货，巴黎老佛爷等时尚街区。
下午前往位于巴黎西南部郊区的凡尔赛宫，游览凡尔赛宫；之后入住酒店。
夜宿：巴黎美居酒店或诺富特酒店或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Mercure Hotel Paris or Novotel Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The Mercure or Novotel Paris is a comfortable business hotel under the Accor group. Located in the safer southern part of Paris, its convenient location makes travel easy, and whether you are on a business trip or a leisure journey, it offers you a comfortable stay. This stems from its distinctive brand characteristics: more than 700 hotels worldwide, professional and rigorous quality control, a unique hotel style deeply rooted in local character, and a warm and welcoming management team.
accommodation.text_zh:
巴黎美居酒店或诺富特酒店或同等4星级酒店
巴黎美居或诺富特酒店是雅高旗下的舒适型商务酒店，酒店位于更为安全的巴黎南部，地理位置方便出行，无论您是商务出差还是休闲之旅，都为您提供舒适的住宿体验，源于独特的品牌特征：全球超过700家酒店，专业严谨的质量监控，深得当地特色的独特酒店风格以及具有热情的管理团队。

highlights.text_en:
Boulevard Haussmann in Paris
The Boulevard Haussmann is a core area of Paris, with its magnificent Haussmann-style architecture, bustling commercial atmosphere and rich artistic flavor — Galeries Lafayette and Printemps, the Paris Opera, the Hôtel de la Paix, the Louvre Pyramid, and the Sainte-Anne gourmet district. Here you can stroll and feel the commercial spirit of Paris, wandering along the Boulevard Haussmann to enjoy the delights of fine food, art and shopping.
highlights.text_zh:
巴黎奥斯曼大街
奥斯曼大街是巴黎的核心区域，这里有华丽的奥斯曼建筑群和繁华的商业氛围，以及浓郁艺术气息，老佛爷及巴黎春天，巴黎歌剧院，和平酒店、 罗浮宫金字塔，圣安娜美食区，在这里可以 漫步感受巴黎的商业气息，穿行在奥斯曼大街上，享受美食艺术和购物的欣喜。

attractions.text_en: The Palace of Versailles has always been a magnificent monument of France's feudal period. In substance it was not only the French court but also the nation's administrative center, and the concrete embodiment of the political views and lifestyle of French society at that time. It demonstrated the power of an absolutist regime capable of concentrating such enormous manpower, material resources and finances — the like of which Europe had not seen since the ancient Roman Empire. To build it, Louis XIV mobilized more than thirty thousand workers along with architects, engineers and technicians; besides solving the complex technical problems arising from constructing a large-scale building complex, they also had to solve problems of water supply, roads and many other matters. Clearly, the success of Versailles powerfully attests to the economic and technical progress of France at that time and to the wisdom of its working people.
attractions.text_zh: 凡尔赛宫始终是法国封建统治历史时期的一座华丽的纪念碑。从内容上讲不仅是法兰西宫廷，而且是国家的行政中心，也是当时法国社会政治观点、生活方式的具体体现。它是欧洲自古罗马帝国以来表现出能够集中如此巨大的人力、物力、财力的专制政体力量。当时，路易十四为了建造它，共动用了三万余名工人和建筑师、工程师、技师，除了要解决建造大规模建筑群所产生的复杂技术问题外，还要解决引水、道路等各方面的问题。可见，凡尔赛宫的成功，有力地证明了当时法国经济和技术的进步和劳动人民的智慧。

attractions.text_en: The Boulevard Haussmann lies between the 8th and 9th arrondissements of Paris. On this street are the two great department stores, Galeries Lafayette and Printemps. Marcel Proust, author of "In Search of Lost Time," lived at No. 102 on this street, where he completed most of the writing of "In Search of Lost Time."
attractions.text_zh: 奥斯曼大街位于巴黎第八区和第九区之间。街上有巴黎老佛爷百货公司和春天百货两大百货公司。《追忆似水年华》的作者马塞尔·普鲁斯特曾在这条街102号的居所里，完成了《追忆似水年华》的大部分写作。

attractions.text_en:
Paris Opera [exterior]
The opera house was designed by Charles Garnier in 1861. Its architecture perfectly combines several architectural styles, including the ancient Greco-Roman colonnade and the Baroque. Grand in scale, exquisitely detailed and resplendently magnificent, it is hailed as an opera house where painting, marble and gilding shine in mutual splendor, offering immense enjoyment. It is one of the typical buildings of Napoleon III's era.
attractions.text_zh:
巴黎歌剧院 【外观】
剧院是由查尔斯·加尼叶于1861年设计的，其建筑将古希腊罗马式柱廊、巴洛克等几种建筑形式完美地结合在一起，规模宏大，精美细致，金碧辉煌，被誉为是一座绘画、大理石和金饰交相辉映的剧院，给人以极大的享受。是拿破仑三世典型的建筑之一。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, set off for Geneva, capital of the French-speaking region of Switzerland. Upon arrival, tour Geneva's old town, the Lake Geneva area, the Flower Clock and the Jet d'Eau fountain, and visit the "Flower Bridge" district where various local delicacies and specialty shops of Geneva gather. Then check in to the Novotel Geneva Port at Annemasse.
Overnight: Novotel Geneva Port at Annemasse or Crowne Plaza Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
上午出发前往瑞士法语区首府日内瓦，到达后游览日内瓦老城，日内瓦湖区，花钟和大喷泉景点，游览云集日内瓦各种当地美食和特色商店“花桥”区域。随后入住安纳马斯日内瓦港诺富特酒店。
夜宿：安娜玛斯日内瓦港诺富特酒店或皇冠假日酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Novotel Geneva Port at Annemasse or Crowne Plaza Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The Novotel hotel opened in 2020 and is a comfortable business hotel under the Accor group; its decor harmonizes with its natural surroundings. Inspired by innovative New York hotel concepts, it includes a café and bakery area open to both hotel guests and the public. The hotel has a restaurant serving healthy seasonal cuisine. At the Rooftop 46 bar on the hotel's 8th floor, you can enjoy a happy hour overlooking the Alps and the Jura mountains.
accommodation.text_zh:
安娜玛斯日内瓦港诺富特酒店或皇冠假日酒店 或同等4星级酒店
诺富特酒店于2020年开业，是雅高旗下的舒适型商务酒店，酒店的装饰与其自然环境相协调。受到纽约创新酒店概念的启发，它包括一个向酒店客人和公众开放的咖啡厅和面包店区。酒店设有一间餐厅，提供健康的时令美食。在酒店8 层的 Rooftop 46 酒吧俯瞰阿尔卑斯山和侏罗山脉，享受快乐时光。

highlights.text_en:
Geneva Old Town
The upper town on the shores of Lake Geneva, with the charming Lake Geneva and the majestic Alps, forms a poetic, pastoral landscape. The beautiful scenery of the two countries' borderlands changes and interweaves continuously along Lake Geneva — on one side is Évian and Annemasse in France, on the other the old town of Geneva. The entire lake region is listed as a World Heritage Site, with one human heritage site after another and exceptionally well-preserved medieval towns; the roads are inlaid with cobblestones, and every small town and city has several fountains. Traditional houses and modern, novel shops weave together to create exquisite and wondrous experiences.
highlights.text_zh:
日内瓦古城区
日内瓦湖畔的上城区，风光旖旎的日内瓦湖和雄伟的阿尔卑斯山，构成的诗意田园风光，两国国境秀丽风景沿日内瓦湖不断变化交错、一边是法国依云安娜玛斯一边是日内瓦的旧城，整个湖区被列为世界遗产，一座又一座的人类遗产以及保护得十分完好的中世纪小城，路上镶嵌着一块块的石板，每个小镇、小城都就有多处喷泉。传统的房屋建筑和摩登新颖的店家，交织成一处处美轮美奂的奇妙体验。

attractions.text_en: Lake Geneva, also known as Lac Léman, straddles Switzerland and France. It is an important lake in Western Europe and a famous scenic area and health resort. By day you can take a cruise boat to tour Lake Geneva, and by night you can be intoxicated by the shimmering neon lights along the shore; luxury cruise ships often host concerts or dances on the lake. You can take a cruise boat to appreciate the beautiful scenery along the shores of Lake Geneva, watching the lake water, snow-capped mountains and blue sky merge into one.
attractions.text_zh: 日内瓦湖又名莱芒湖，横跨瑞士和法国，是西欧的重要湖泊，也是著名的风景区和疗养地。白天你可以乘坐游船游览日内瓦湖，晚上陶醉于岸边闪烁的霓虹，还时常有豪华游轮在湖面上举办音乐会或舞会。可乘坐游船领略日内瓦湖岸边美景，看湖水、雪山和蓝天连成一片。

attractions.text_en: The Jet d'Eau is located on the surface of Lake Geneva near the English Garden and is one of Geneva's more representative sights. The great fountain resembles a column of water spouted by a whale, reaching 140 meters high with a water flow of 500 liters; its spectacular sight can be seen from far away in the city center. At night there is also a chance to see the fountain illuminated by lights, making it even more magnificent.
attractions.text_zh: 大喷泉位于英国花园附近的日内瓦湖面上，是日内瓦比较具有代表性的景观之一。大喷泉宛若鲸鱼喷出的水柱，有140米高、500公升喷水量，其壮观景象从市中心很远就能看见。夜晚时还有机会看到灯光照明下的大喷泉，更是宏伟。

attractions.text_en: The Flower Clock is a famous sight in Geneva. Switzerland is known as the "Garden Country" and at the same time the "Land of Watches and Clocks," and what is even more wonderful is that Swiss craftsmen have ingeniously combined the beauty of flowers with the craftsmanship of clockmaking, originally creating the "Flower Clock."
attractions.text_zh: 花钟是日内瓦著名景点。瑞士号称“花园之国”，同时又是“钟表之乡”，而更奇妙的是瑞士的能工巧匠绝妙地将花卉之美同钟表的制造工艺完美地结合起来，别出心裁地创造出了“花钟”。

attractions.text_en: The upper town on the slopes of the right bank of the Rhône is also called the upper town by local residents because of its higher elevation. Here is not only a gathering place of churches and historic sites; among the winding lanes there are also many small, charming antique shops, and the former residence of Rousseau, the thinker of the European Enlightenment, is also located within the old town.
attractions.text_zh: 在隆河右岸山坡上的上城区，因为地势较高的缘故，当地的居民又称之为上城。这里不但是教堂、古迹的聚集地，在蜿蜒的小巷弄间还有许多小巧可爱的古董商店，欧洲启蒙时代的思想家卢梭的故居也位于旧城区内。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, head to Interlaken, which lies between Lake Brienz and Lake Thun — known as the "left and right eyes of God." You may freely tour Höheweg street, the Höhematte, the tranquil village amid green trees, dotted between mountains and water, where people and nature blend into one; or travel by coach to the Grindelwald and Wilderswil sights in the Jungfrau mountain region; or, at your own expense, take the panoramic cable car to the summit of the Jungfrau — the Top of Europe, the higher-altitude railway station in Europe — and visit the "Sphinx Observation Deck" and the Aletsch Glacier; or, at your own expense, head to the Swiss alpine adventure town of First and tour the Cliff Walk peak boardwalk. Afterwards, check in to the hotel.
Overnight: Sigriswil Snow Mountain Lake View Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
上午前往有“上帝左眼与右眼”之称的布里恩茨湖和图恩湖中央的因特拉肯，可自由游览何维克街，荷黑马特，宁静的村庄，绿树掩映，点缀在山水之间，人与自然浑然一体；或者随车前往格林德尔瓦尔德及维尔德斯维尔少女峰山区景点，或者自费乘坐全景缆车登顶少女峰——Top of Europe欧洲较高的火车站，前往“斯芬克斯观景台”及阿莱奇冰川；或者自费前往瑞士高山探险小镇菲斯特，游览悬崖天梭巅峰栈道。之后前往入住酒店。
夜宿：锡格里斯维尔雪山湖景酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Sigriswil Snow Mountain Lake View Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is located in a mountain ravine beside the panoramic bridge of Sigriswil. All guest rooms are decorated in an elegant Swiss countryside style, and the hotel's views satisfy your imagination of Switzerland — rooms enjoy views of Lake Thun, the surrounding mountains, or the village of Sigriswil. Sitting in the hotel's restaurant and gazing out over the emerald-green waters of Lake Thun and the snow-capped mountains tranquilly reflected in it, you feel as if you were in a painting, free to fully appreciate Switzerland's idyllic, paradise-like scenery.
accommodation.text_zh:
锡格里斯维尔雪山湖景酒店 或同等4星级酒店
酒店位于锡格里斯维尔（Sigriswil）全景桥旁边的山涧，所有的客房装饰为瑞士乡村典雅风格，酒店景观满足对瑞士的想象，客房客房享有图恩湖或周围群山或锡格里斯维尔村景致。坐在酒店的餐厅远眺碧绿的图恩湖水，宁静地倒影的雪山，恍然如画中，让人尽情欣赏瑞士世外桃源般的美好景致。

highlights.text_en:
The Jungfrau Region
As one of Switzerland's most famous and representative tourist destinations, the Jungfrau is not a single snow mountain, but a series of different Swiss landscapes centered around the Jungfrau and Interlaken, encompassing many different snow-mountain experiences and giving rise to the wonderful and rich tourist areas of the Jungfrau, First, Grindelwald and other sights. With the Jungfrau summit panoramic cable car, you can experience all kinds of different things. The First aerial adventure park, as the originator of aerial adventure tourism, and high-altitude paragliding not only adorn the snow mountains but also bring many thrilling activities to the younger crowd.
highlights.text_zh:
少女峰地区
作为瑞士著名的代表性旅游胜地，少女峰不是座雪山，而是围绕着少女峰、因特拉肯的一系列不同的瑞士风景组合，包含多种不同的雪山体验，成就了 精彩而丰富的瑞士少女峰 、 菲斯特，格兰维尔德等景点旅游景区。 少女峰登顶景观缆车，可以感受各种不同的体验。菲斯特空天冒险乐园，作为空天探险类旅游项目的始祖，而高空滑翔伞不仅仅装饰了雪山，还给年轻群体带来了许多的刺激活动。

attractions.text_en: The Höhematte is the green meadow square in the center of Interlaken, Switzerland's famous resort town. This green space was once the garden of a monastery, and now any construction on it is forbidden to prevent damaging this beautiful scenery. It is a great place to gaze at the Jungfrau; on the vast green meadow there is a fountain, and it is also dotted with many benches, so it is a great place for a walk. The Höhematte is also a landing site for hang-gliders; there is a reception point at the edge of the lawn, and after paying, staff will take visitors up the nearby mountain for free gliding, from which you can enjoy the beautiful scenery of Interlaken from high in the sky.
attractions.text_zh: 荷黑马特是瑞士著名的观光小镇因特拉肯镇中心的绿地广场，这片绿地是昔日修道院的庭园，现在则禁止兴建任何建筑物，以防止破坏这片美丽的景观。这里是眺望少女峰好的场所，辽阔的绿地上建有喷泉，还点缀着很多凉椅，所以也是散步的好地方。荷黑马特还是滑翔翼的降落地，草坪边上有接待点，付费后会有工作人员把游客带到附近山上进行自由滑翔，可在高空欣赏到因特拉肯的美景。

attractions.text_en: Located at the northern foot of the Eiger, Grindelwald is a famous postcard photography spot of Switzerland's "dreamlike slopes," beloved by photographers, and is also the Alpine town one must pass through to visit the Jungfrau. Together with First, the Jungfrau, Wengen and others, it forms the more magnificent and beautiful scenic line of the Jungfrau region. In winter it is a famous snow-viewing destination, and in summer it is a paradise for hiking enthusiasts; the lakeside, green grassland, waterfalls, dairy cows and snow mountains together make up this enchanting town.
attractions.text_zh: 位于艾格峰(Eiger)的北麓脚下的格林德尔瓦尔德(Grindelwald) ，这里有摄影家心头较为喜爱的瑞士“梦幻山坡”著名明信片拍摄地，也是游览少女峰必经的阿尔卑斯小镇，同菲斯特(First)、少女峰(Jungfrau)、翁根(Wengen)、等一起组成了少女峰地区较为壮阔美丽的风景线。冬季是著名的观雪胜地，夏季又是徒步爱好者的天堂，湖畔、绿草青地、瀑布、奶牛、雪山共同构成让这座让人着迷的小镇。

attractions.text_en: Grindelwald-First attracts visitors from all directions to admire the magnificent scenery of the Eiger's north face. Standing on the famous First Cliff Walk peak boardwalk, anyone will immediately feel as if standing on top of the world. The Cliff Walk peak boardwalk is located at the summit of First, where you can take in a unique panorama of the Bernese Alps.
attractions.text_zh: 格林德瓦菲斯特吸引四面八方的游客前来欣赏艾格峰北坡的壮丽风光。站在著名的菲斯特悬崖天梭巅峰栈道，任何人都会立刻感到自己站在世界之巅。悬崖天梭巅峰栈道位于菲斯特峰顶，可以一览伯尔尼兹阿尔卑斯山的独特全景。

attractions.text_en: The Jungfrau is located about twenty to thirty kilometers south of Interlaken, at an altitude of 4,158 meters, and is one of the higher peaks of the Alps. Its summit is covered in ice and snow all year round, while at the foot of the mountain the grass is green and the scenery beautiful — it is a famous Swiss destination for sightseeing and outdoor sports. The Jungfrau region was listed as a World Natural Heritage Site in 2001.
attractions.text_zh: 少女峰位于因特拉肯以南二三十公里处，海拔 4158 米，是阿尔卑斯山脉的较高的山峰之一。山顶常年被冰雪覆盖，而山下却绿草茵茵、风景秀丽，是瑞士有名的观光及户外运动胜地。少女峰地区已于 2001 年被列为世界自然遗产。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, head to the town of Lauterbrunnen and tour Lake Lauterbrunnen and the town's scenery. Then proceed to Lucerne to enjoy the lake and mountain scenery of Lake Lucerne, hear the Lion Monument tell that chapter of history about the Swiss people's loyalty and steadfast resolve, and visit sights such as the Chapel Bridge and the octagonal Water Tower. Afterwards, head to Zurich and check in to the hotel.
Overnight: Harry's Home Hotel Zurich-Limmattal or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
上午前往龙疆小镇，游览龙疆湖及小镇风光。之后前往卢塞恩，游览卢塞恩湖的湖光山色，听狮子纪念碑讲述瑞士人忠贞坚毅的那段历史，以及卡贝尔廊桥和八角型水塔等景点。之后前往苏黎世入住酒店。
夜宿：苏黎世利马塔尔哈利之家酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Harry's Home Hotel Zurich-Limmattal or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is located in the scenic heart of the Limmattal, a modern urban residence right next to one of Switzerland's larger shopping centers. The hotel has a bar, and the guest rooms are spacious and tidy, with beautiful parquet floors and modern furniture, large wardrobes and many small ideas that make life easier. The hotel offers various buffet or continental breakfasts. The verdant valleys, rolling hills and winding Limmat River around the hotel provide you with a comfortable, natural stay.
accommodation.text_zh:
苏黎世利马塔尔哈利之家酒店 或同等4星级酒店
酒店坐落在风景秀丽的利马塔尔中心地带，现代化的城市住宅，紧邻瑞士较大的购物中心，酒店配备酒吧，客房宽敞整洁，拥有漂亮的镶木地板和现代家具、大衣柜和许多让生活更轻松的小创意。酒店提供各类自助或欧陆式早餐。酒店周边绿意盎然的山谷、连绵起伏的丘陵和蜿蜒的利马特河，为您提供舒适自然的入住体验。

highlights.text_en:
The Town of Lauterbrunnen Beneath the Snow Mountains
As the filming location for the happy-ending finale of "Crash Landing on You," where the male and female leads spent their "two happiest weeks of the year," the idyllic paradise so sweet it makes your teeth ache, the otherworldly beauty of Lake Lauterbrunnen, seems tailor-made for the drama. The lake and mountain scenery is like paradise on earth; the beauty of Lake Lauterbrunnen needs no filter. If there is a paradise on earth, it must be in Lauterbrunnen — peaceful, beautiful days are nothing more than this.
highlights.text_zh:
雪山下的龙疆小镇
作为“爱的迫降”大团圆结局的取景地，剧中男女主角“一年中幸福的两周”都在这里度过，主角甜到齁的世外桃源，超然于世的龙疆湖美景，就像是为该剧量身定做的。人间天堂般的湖光山色，无滤镜的龙疆湖美景，如果有世外桃源，那一定在龙疆，岁月静好也不过如此。

attractions.text_en: Located between Lucerne and Interlaken, the famous GoldenPass Express passes through here. Surrounded by mountains, with green grass everywhere, the rustic village is scattered along the shores of Lake Lauterbrunnen, looking just like an otherworldly paradise far from the hustle and bustle.
attractions.text_zh: 地处卢塞恩与因特拉肯之间，著名的金色山口快车就会从这里经过。这里群山环抱，绿草茵茵，古朴的村庄散落于龙疆湖畔，俨然一座远离尘嚣的世外桃源。

attractions.text_en:
Lake Lucerne
This lake has a winding shape, and together with the surrounding mountains it forms the typical scenery of "lakes and mountains," attracting large numbers of tourists to come sightseeing. The music critic Ludwig Rellstab once described the hazy atmosphere of the first movement of Beethoven's "Piano Sonata No. 14" as the moonlight over Lake Lucerne, and so the piece acquired the title "Moonlight" — although this was not Beethoven's original intent.
attractions.text_zh:
卢塞恩湖
这座湖泊形状曲折，和周边的群山构成了典型的“湖光山色”景致，吸引了大量游客前来观光。音乐评论家雷尔斯塔布(Ludwig Rellstab)曾将贝多芬《第14钢琴奏鸣曲》的第1乐章的朦胧气氛形容为卢塞恩湖的月色，这首曲子因此得到了《月光》这个标题——虽然这并非贝多芬的本意。

attractions.text_en: Lucerne is located in central Switzerland and belongs to the German-speaking region of Switzerland. Nestled between mountains and water, Lucerne possesses the unique beauty characteristic of the Middle Ages: medieval churches and towers, Renaissance halls and mansions, as well as century-old shops and long streets and ancient lanes — all are everywhere to be seen. The lake and mountain scenery of Lake Lucerne reflects the city's beauty in an almost dreamlike, real-yet-unreal way; it is the extraordinary pearl among Switzerland's many beautiful small cities. From the 19th century, it attracted numerous princes, nobles and men of letters to visit and reside, and artists found endless artistic inspiration in Lucerne.
attractions.text_zh: 卢塞恩位于瑞士中部，属瑞士德语区。依山傍水的卢塞恩具有中世纪所特有的美：中世纪的教堂、塔楼，文艺复兴时期的宫厅、邸宅以及百年老店、长街古巷，比比皆是。卢塞恩湖的湖光山色更是将城中的美景倒影的亦幻亦真，是瑞士众多美丽小城中不凡的那颗明珠。从19世纪起，就吸引了众多的王公贵族和文人墨客前来游览和居住，艺术家们在卢塞恩得到了不尽的艺术灵感。

attractions.text_en: This statue of a dying lion was carved into natural rock in 1821 by a Danish sculptor. This lion, 10 meters long and over 3 meters high, lies in agony on the ground, a broken spear thrust into its shoulder, with a shield bearing the Swiss coat of arms beside it. The statue commemorates the 786 Swiss mercenaries who all died fighting on 10 August 1792 to protect the safety of Louis XVI's family in the Tuileries Palace in Paris; below the statue an inscription describes the course of this event. In those days, Switzerland was a poor and backward country, and men, driven by the need to make a living, went to various European countries to serve as mercenaries. Swiss mercenaries were loyal to their employers and fought bravely, but honor and money could not mask the cruelty of the mercenary system. After this event, Switzerland stopped exporting mercenaries, retaining only the guard serving the Catholic Holy See — the famous Swiss Guard. Owing to their renowned loyalty and bravery, this Swiss Guard of the Holy See has served to this day. Later, the American writer Mark Twain came to Lucerne and praised the "Dying Lion of Lucerne" as "the most mournful and moving piece of stone in the world."
attractions.text_zh: 这只濒死的狮子雕像是1821年由丹麦雕塑家雕刻在天然岩石上的。这头长10米、高3米多的雄狮，痛苦地倒在地上，折断的长矛插在肩头，旁边有一个带有瑞士国徽的盾牌。这座雕像是为了纪念1792年8月10日，为保护巴黎杜乐丽宫(Tuileries)中的路易十六家族的安全，全部战死的786名瑞士雇佣兵，雕像下方有文字描述了此事件的经过。当年，瑞士是一个贫穷落后的国家，男子迫于生计，纷纷到欧洲各国当雇佣兵。瑞士雇佣兵忠于雇主，英勇善战，但荣誉和金钱掩盖不了雇佣兵制度的残酷，这次事件之后，瑞士停止出口雇佣兵，仅留下为天主教廷服务的近卫军，就是那支著名的瑞士卫队。由于著名的忠勇，教廷的这支瑞士近卫军一直服务到现在。后来，美国作家马克·吐温来到卢塞恩，将“濒死的琉森狮子”誉为“世界上最悲壮和最感人的雕像”。

overview.text_en:
After breakfast, tour the Grossmünster (Zurich Cathedral) (exterior), Lake Zurich, the Bahnhofstrasse and other sights. Then set off for Milan, the fashion capital; upon arrival, freely visit Milan's landmark building, the Milan Cathedral (Duomo) (exterior), and the Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II, one of Europe's most beautiful shopping arcades.
Overnight: Royal Garden Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
早餐后，游览苏黎世大教堂（外观）、苏黎世湖、班霍夫大街等景点。之后出发前往时尚之都-米兰，到达后自由参观米兰的标志性建筑米兰主教堂（外观），欧洲漂亮的商业拱廊之一埃马努埃莱二世拱廊。
夜宿：皇家花园酒店 或同等 4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Royal Garden Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is set in lush gardens with fountains, palm trees and olive trees, blending classic elegance with modern style — a delightful and relaxing urban resort. The hotel is within walking distance of a nearby large commercial center; the guest rooms are spacious and elegant, with large marble bathrooms with bathtubs. The buffet breakfast is rich and varied, the Captain's Bar serves drinks and snacks all day, and the hotel has the glass-domed Blue Crab Grill restaurant serving international cuisine.
accommodation.text_zh:
皇家花园酒店 或同等4星级酒店
酒店坐落在郁郁葱葱的花园中，花园内有喷泉、棕榈树和橄榄树，将经典优雅与现代风格融为一体，是一处令人愉悦而轻松的城市度假胜地。酒店可步行至附近的大型商业中心；酒店的客房宽敞而优雅，设有带浴缸的大型大理石浴室，自助早餐丰盛多样，Captain's Bar 全天供应饮料和小吃，酒店设有玻璃圆顶的 Blue Crab Grill 餐厅，供应国际美食。

highlights.text_en:
Behold the Milan Cathedral, which took over 500 years to build and is famous throughout the world for its many exquisite sculptures and Gothic spires
Construction began in 1386, and it is the landmark building in the center of Milan. The main body of the cathedral took more than four centuries to be largely completed in 1812, while detail work continued until 1960 when the cathedral's last bronze door was installed. The passage of time has not only endowed it with the vicissitudes of history but also created its multiple stylistic features — Gothic spires paired with Baroque-style carvings, lavish in the extreme from top to bottom.
highlights.text_zh:
瞻仰历经500年建成，以众多精美的雕刻和哥特式的塔尖而闻名于世的米兰大教堂
始建于1386年，是米兰市中心的标志性建筑。教堂主体历经4个多世纪才于1812年基本完工，而细节工程则一直持续到1960年安装完成教堂的一扇铜门为止。岁月不仅赋予了它历史的沧桑，同时也为它营造出多重的风格样式，哥特式的尖塔搭配巴洛克风格的雕饰，自上而下，极尽奢华。

attractions.text_en: Lake Zurich is 4 kilometers wide and about 39 kilometers long; the docks on the lake are filled with yachts of all kinds, like a rich man's club. One end of Lake Zurich reaches deep into the city center, where white swans and wild ducks can be seen everywhere on the lake's surface, leisurely and content — a harmonious scene. The north shore of Lake Zurich is where the wealthy live, known as the "Gold Coast," while the south shore is called the "Silver Coast." The end of Bahnhofstrasse is Lake Zurich; as a "most livable city in the world," the lives of true Zurich residents are everywhere imbued with tranquility and leisure.
attractions.text_zh: 苏黎世湖宽4公里，长约39公里，湖面码头停满了各色游艇，俨然一个富人俱乐部。苏黎世湖一段的尽头深入市中心，湖面上白天鹅、野鸭随处可见，悠闲自在，一派和谐景象。苏黎世湖的北岸为富人居住地，号称“金岸”，而南岸则称之为“银岸”。班霍夫大街的尽头便是苏黎世湖，作为“世界宜居的城市”，真正的苏黎世人的生活处处渗透着宁静和悠闲。

attractions.text_en: Bahnhofstrasse (also called Station Street) is one of Europe's longer shopping avenues and one of the most expensive shopping avenues in the world. More precisely, it is not only the truly priceless center of Zurich, where luxury brands from around the world abound and private banks stand in rows. Walking along Zurich's Bahnhofstrasse, countless tourists feel an inexplicable excitement, because beneath their feet is stored an amount of gold bars said to rank among the world's foremost, making many people too excited to take a step away. Immersed in it, you can clearly feel the air filled with the scent of wealth, luxury and languor.
attractions.text_zh: 班霍夫大街(又称车站大街)是欧洲较长的购物大道，也是世界上昂贵的购物大道之一，更确切的说它不仅是苏黎世真正的寸土寸金的中心，这里遍布世界各地的奢侈品牌，私人银行林立。走在苏黎世的班霍夫大街上，无数游人都会产生莫名的兴奋，因为在他们脚下储藏着数量号称世界前列的金条，让很多人都激动的挪不开脚步，置身其中，你明显能感受到空气中弥漫着财富，华贵和慵懒的气息。

attractions.text_en: The Grossmünster is one of the three main churches of Zurich, Switzerland (the other two being the Fraumünster and the St. Peter's Church). The church is located near the bank of the Limmat River; construction began around 1100 and it was inaugurated around 1220. This church, facing the Fraumünster across the river, played a pivotal role in the 16th-century Swiss Reformation; the Faculty of Theology of the University of Zurich and the Museum of the Reformation are both established here. The stained-glass windows inside the church are masterpieces by the Swiss modern art master Giacometti.
attractions.text_zh: 苏黎世大教堂(Grossmünster)是瑞士苏黎世的3座主要教堂之一(另外两座是苏黎世圣母大教堂和)。教堂位于利马特河河岸附近，始建于1100年前后，约1220年揭幕。这座与圣母大教堂隔河相望的教堂在16世纪瑞士宗教改革中，起到了举足轻重的作用，苏黎世大学神学院和宗教改革博物馆都设立于此。教堂内的彩画玻璃是瑞士现代艺术大师贾科梅蒂的杰作。

attractions.text_en: This is a magnificent shopping mall, though most visitors who come here come to sightsee. Beneath the central arcade is a Prada boutique whose scale and window displays are among the best in Milan; in particular, the window displays are updated daily, so simply standing outside the windows to admire them is itself a great pleasure. The Galleria Vittorio Emanuele is dotted with many high-end restaurants, cafés and shops.
attractions.text_zh: 这是一个华丽的购物商场，不过多数来这里的游客都是来观光的。中央拱廊下有着Prada精品店，规模和橱窗布置都是米兰数一数二的，尤其橱窗布置天天更新，光是站在橱窗外欣赏也是一大乐事。埃马努埃莱长廊遍布了不少高级的餐馆、咖啡厅以及商店。

attractions.text_en: Although its name, Duomo, means "dome," the Milan Cathedral is in fact a Gothic building. Dominating the city center, the Milan Cathedral was begun in 1386 and took 500 years to complete; it is hailed as Italy's magnificent Gothic architecture, with hundreds of spires soaring into the clouds and thousands of statues carved on its white marble exterior walls. The interior space is vast; sunlight streams in through the beautiful stained-glass mosaics on the windows, the light hazy and full of a solemn religious atmosphere. In the crypt of the cathedral, the remains of the Church of Santa Tecla, which stood on the original site, are still preserved.
attractions.text_zh: 虽然它的名字Duomo是“圆顶”的意思，米兰大教堂实际上却是一座哥特式建筑。雄踞在市中心的米兰大教堂始建于1386年，历经500年才完工，被誉为意大利壮丽的哥特式建筑数以百计的尖塔耸入云霄，白色大理石外墙上雕刻着数千座雕像。内部空间宽广，阳光透过窗上美丽的彩色玻璃镶嵌画射入，光线朦胧，充满庄严的宗教气氛。教堂地下室中还保留着原址上的圣·特库拉教堂的遗迹。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, set off for the water city of Venice. Upon arrival, visit St. Mark's Basilica (exterior), St. Mark's Square, the Bridge of Sighs (exterior) and the magnificent Doge's Palace (exterior). These beautiful buildings built on the water, together with the winding water lanes, make Venice's romantic charm linger long. Here you can also taste Venice's specialty grand meal, the three-course cuttlefish-ink pasta (at your own expense).
Overnight: voco Venice Hotel (InterContinental) or Hilton Ambassador Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
上午出发前往水城威尼斯，到达后参观圣马可大教堂（外观），圣马可广场，叹息桥（外观），华丽的总督宫（外观），这些建造在水上的美丽建筑和蜿蜒的水巷一起，让威尼斯的浪漫风情久久挥之不去。在这里您还可以品尝到威尼斯特色大餐墨鱼面三道式（自理）。
夜宿：威尼斯洲际VOCO酒店或希尔顿大使酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
voco Venice Hotel (InterContinental) or Hilton Ambassador Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is one of Venice's newly renovated hotels, with an excellent location, stylish modern design, and guest rooms with natural tones and modern interiors, offering you a comfortable and warm stay. The hotel offers a rich breakfast, a well-equipped gym, and a lounge bar serving wine and cocktails; the hotel's Ludico Venice restaurant serves Italian dishes and delicacies.
accommodation.text_zh:
威尼斯洲际VOCO酒店或希尔顿大使酒店 或同等4星级酒店
酒店是威尼斯新装修的酒店之一，酒店地理位置优越，拥有时尚的现代设计，客房自然的色调和现代化的内饰，提供给您舒适温馨的入住体验。酒店提供丰盛的早餐，设备齐全的健身房，酒廊酒吧提供葡萄酒和鸡尾酒，酒店的Ludico Venice 餐厅供应意大利佳肴和美食。

highlights.text_en:
Venice, the most beautiful place in the world, the "Pearl of the Adriatic," still dazzlingly resplendent
As one of the important cities of the Renaissance, Venice is composed of 118 small islands, connected into one by 177 waterways and 401 bridges. It is known as the "City on Water," the "City of a Hundred Islands" and the "City of Bridges." Here is "St. Mark's Square," one of the most beautiful squares in the world, the beautiful Grand Canal, the phoenix-reborn La Fenice opera house, the melancholy Bridge of Sighs as written by Xu Zhimo, and breathtakingly beautiful arcades. This is the birthplace of the Venetian school of painting, and the filming location of many movie scenes; her unique temperament leaves every visitor enchanted and reluctant to leave.
highlights.text_zh:
世上美丽的威尼斯，“亚得里亚海明珠”依旧璀璨夺目
威尼斯作为文艺复兴时期的重镇之一，由118个小岛组成，并以177条水道、401座桥梁连成一体。有“水上都市”、“百岛城”、“桥城”之称。这里有世界上美丽的广场之一“圣马可广场”，有美丽的大运河，浴火重生的凤凰歌剧院，徐志摩笔下忧伤的叹息桥，美得令人窒息的回廊，这里是威尼斯画派的发源地，还是多部电影片段的拍摄地，她独特的气质让每一个到访的人都如痴如醉，不舍离去。

attractions.name_zh: 威尼斯圣马可大教堂（外观）
attractions.text_en: Known in short as St. Mark's Basilica, it stands on St. Mark's Square in the center of Venice. First built in 829 AD and rebuilt from 1043 to 1071, it was once the largest church in medieval Europe and a classic masterpiece of Venetian architectural art; at the same time it is also a treasury holding a rich collection of artworks.
attractions.text_zh: 简称圣马可大教堂，是矗立于威尼斯市中心的圣马可广场上。始建于公元829年，重建于1043~1071年，它曾是中世纪欧洲大的教堂，是威尼斯建筑艺术的经典之作，它同时也是一座收藏丰富艺术品的宝库。

attractions.text_en: This is a museum located on the Piazza San Marco; all of Venice's past glory is here. Inside you can see not only frescoes and the like, but also medieval weapons. On the way to the dungeon you cross the Bridge of Sighs, where you can look outside through small holes — rather than, like the many people on the opposite bridge, looking at the Bridge of Sighs from your side. Inside you can take photos, as long as you don't use a flash.
attractions.text_zh: 这是一家位于Piazza San Marco的博物馆，威尼斯过去的辉煌都在这里了。里面可以看的不仅有壁画等，还有中世纪的兵器，去地牢的时候走过叹息桥，能通过小孔看外面，而不是像对面桥上面那么多的人在往你这里看叹息桥。里面是可以拍照片的，只要你不要用闪光灯就可以了。

attractions.text_en: The Bridge of Sighs was in ancient times the route the court had to take when escorting condemned prisoners to the prison. The Bridge of Sighs is in the early Baroque style; the bridge is shaped like a house, covered by a vaulted dome on top and very tightly enclosed, with only two small windows facing the canal. After a prisoner had been tried in the Doge's Palace, serious criminals were taken to the dungeon, and when passing over this airtight bridge they could only look at the blue sky through the small windows. From then on they lost their freedom and involuntarily let out sighs. It is said that if lovers kiss beneath the bridge they can be together forever, and the movie "A Little Romance" was filmed here.
attractions.text_zh: 叹息桥是古代由法院向监狱押送死囚的必经之路。叹息桥造型属早期巴洛克式风格，桥呈房屋状，上部穹隆覆盖，封闭得很严实，只有向运河一侧有两个小窗，当犯人在总督府接受审判之后，重罪犯被带到地牢中，在经过这座密不透气的的桥时，只能透过小窗看看蓝天，从此失去了自由，不自主的发出叹息之声。听说恋人们在桥下接吻就可以天长地久，而电影「情定日落桥」就在这取景的。

attractions.text_en: It is the central square of Venice, once called by Napoleon "the most beautiful drawing room in Europe." The square is surrounded on three sides by grand and magnificent palaces, while to the east rise the tall Campanile (bell tower) and St. Mark's Basilica. Since ancient times, it has been the center of Venice's political, religious and traditional festival public activities.
attractions.text_zh: 是威尼斯的中心广场，曾被拿破仑称作“欧洲美丽的客厅”。广场三面被宏伟壮丽的宫殿围绕，东面耸立着高大的钟楼和圣马可教堂。自古以来，就是威尼斯政治、宗教及传统节日的公共活动中心。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, set off for Florence, the birthplace of the Renaissance, and visit the sights of Florence's old town: the world's third-largest cathedral — the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore (Florence Cathedral), the Piazza della Signoria, the Ponte Vecchio, as well as the Piazza Santa Croce and the Basilica of Santa Croce (exterior). Afterwards, check in to the hotel.
Overnight: Hilton Florence Metropole Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
上午出发前往文艺复兴的发源地-佛罗伦萨，参观佛罗伦萨老城景点：世界第三大教堂-圣母百花大教堂、市政广场，老桥以及圣十字广场和圣十字教堂（外观），之后入住酒店。
夜宿：佛罗伦萨希尔顿大都会酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Hilton Florence Metropole or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The Hilton Florence is a modern hotel offering a Tuscan-style experience, with an excellent location for reaching Florence's commercial center and enjoying the bustle of Florence. From the terrace of the hotel's executive lounge you can admire the magnificent scenery of Florence. Each guest room is decorated in a warm, modern style; wooden floors and spacious marble bathrooms provide great comfort.
accommodation.text_zh:
佛罗伦萨希尔顿大都会或同等4星级酒店
佛罗伦萨希尔顿酒店是一家体验托斯卡纳风格的现代化酒店，地理位置优越，可前往佛罗伦萨商业中心，享受佛罗伦萨的繁华。酒店行政酒廊的露台上可欣赏到佛罗伦萨的壮丽景色。每间客房均采用温馨的现代风格装饰；木地板和宽敞的大理石浴室可获得较大的舒适度。

highlights.text_en:
The Splendor and Heyday of Florence, the Shining Brilliance of the Renaissance
In the world's capital of art, the birthplace of the Renaissance — Florence, enjoy a stunning visual feast! Amid blue skies and white clouds, brightly colored walls, dark-green shutters and dark-red rooftops, seek the soul of the Renaissance; in the streets and lanes, squares and churches, museums and art galleries, feel the Renaissance that never grows old. As the writer Chen Yunhe said, "The poetic soul of Dante Alighieri and the painterly soul of da Vinci still drift over the skies of Florence, still continuing to seek out the people and events of the European Renaissance..."
highlights.text_zh:
佛罗伦萨的辉煌鼎盛，文艺复兴的星芒闪耀
在世界艺术之都、文艺复兴的发源地佛罗伦萨，享受一场震撼的视觉盛宴！在蓝天白云，彩色鲜艳的墙壁，深绿色的百叶窗，深红色的屋顶之间寻找文艺复兴的灵魂，在大街小巷、广场教堂，博物馆、美术馆之中感受文艺复兴不老。正如作家陈运和所说“阿利盖利．但丁的诗魂、达．芬奇的画魂，仍在佛罗伦萨上空飘荡，仍继续追寻欧洲文艺复兴时期那些人与事.....''

attractions.name_en: Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore (queuing required to enter)
attractions.name_zh: 圣母百花大教堂(需排队进入)
attractions.text_en: There are many solemn and majestic churches in the world, but few churches can be so graceful. This beautiful church, faced in white, red and green granite, interprets to the fullest the classical, elegant and free ideals esteemed in the Renaissance era — no wonder it was named "Saint Mary of the Flower." The original site of the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore was the Church of Santa Reparata, built in the 4th century. In 1296, Giovanni de' Medici funded the construction of a new church, which took 175 years to complete.
attractions.text_zh: 世界上庄严雄伟的教堂很多，但很少有教堂能如此妩媚。这座使用白、红、绿三色花岗岩贴面的美丽教堂将文艺复兴时代所推崇的古典、优雅、自由诠释得淋漓尽致，难怪会被命名为“花之圣母”。圣母百花大教堂原址是建于4世纪的圣·雷帕拉塔教堂。1296年，乔凡尼·美第奇出资建造新的教堂，花了175年时间才建成。

attractions.text_en: The Piazza della Signoria has the reputation of being an open-air sculpture museum, and has been the center of the city's political life for several centuries. On the square stand the Palazzo Vecchio (Old Palace), a replica of Michelangelo's sculpture "David," and the Fountain of Neptune. The open Piazza della Signoria is surrounded by the Uffizi Gallery, the Loggia dei Lanzi and numerous cafés and bars. The famous Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore is located directly to its north.
attractions.text_zh: 市政广场有露天雕塑博物馆的美誉，也是该城数个世纪以来政治生活中心，广场上坐落着维琪奥宫（旧宫）、米开朗基罗雕塑作品《大卫》的复制品以及海神喷泉。开放式的市政广场，周围环绕着乌菲兹美术馆、佣兵凉亭和众多的咖啡厅、酒吧。著名的圣母百花大教堂就位于它的正北方。

attractions.text_en: Located on the Arno River, the Ponte Vecchio is also known as the Old Bridge. Built in 1345, it is one of Europe's earlier large-span circular-arch bridges. It is said that Dante encountered the young Beatrice here, later pouring his feelings of longing into "The Divine Comedy." Over several centuries, it has stood unfallen through floods, social upheavals and wars. It is one of Florence's famous landmark buildings.
attractions.text_zh: 位于阿诺河(Arno)上的维奇奥桥，又被称为老桥。建于1345年，是欧洲较早的大跨度圆弧拱桥，据说但丁在这里邂逅了少女比阿特丽丝，后来将思慕之情倾注到《神曲》之中。几百年间，它经历过的水灾、社会动乱、战争而屹立不倒。是佛罗伦萨的著名地标建筑之一。

attractions.text_en: The Piazza Santa Croce is located in the center of Florence, Italy, and is an important public space that has continued from the Renaissance to the present day. The heart of the square is the magnificent Basilica of Santa Croce; this Gothic building is the resting place of Italian luminaries such as Michelangelo and Galileo, and its interior frescoes and sculptures are worth savoring carefully. Around the square are several cafés and restaurants offering authentic Italian cuisine, making it an ideal place to rest and taste local flavors. The Piazza Santa Croce is also a venue for various cultural events and festivals, especially in summer, when open-air concerts and theatrical performances attract large audiences. The open space of the square is suitable for strolling and admiring the surrounding architecture, feeling Florence's unique atmosphere.
attractions.text_zh: 圣十字广场位于意大利佛罗伦萨市中心，是文艺复兴时期延续至今的重要公共空间，广场的核心是宏伟的圣十字大教堂这座哥特式建筑是米开朗基罗和伽利略等意大利名人的安息地，内部的壁画和雕塑值得细细品味。广场周围有多家咖啡馆和餐厅，提供地道的意大利美食，是休憩和品尝当地风味的理想之地。圣十字广场也是举办各种文化活动和节庆的场所，尤其在夏季，露天音乐会和戏剧表演吸引众多观众。广场的开放空间适合漫步和观赏周围的建筑，感受佛罗伦萨的独特氛围。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, set off to tour the Cinque Terre, traveling along the Ligurian coastline to visit the beautiful fishing villages on the cliffs; in the afternoon, head to Pisa to tour the Leaning Tower of Pisa (exterior) and the Piazza dei Miracoli at the heart of Pisa's historical and cultural center, then proceed to Siena to check in to the hotel.
Overnight: Four Points by Sheraton Siena or an equivalent 4-star hotel
Note: If the Cinque Terre cannot be visited due to factors such as severe weather or a railway company strike, the itinerary will automatically be changed to touring the coastal cities by coach or by other means.
overview.text_zh:
上午出发前往游览五渔村，沿利古里亚海岸线，游览悬崖上的美丽渔村；下午前往比萨，游览比萨斜塔（外观）和比萨历史文化中心的奇迹广场，之后前往锡耶纳入住酒店。
夜宿：锡耶纳福朋喜来登酒店 或同等4星级酒店
备注：如遇恶劣天气或者铁路公司罢工等因素导致无法游览五渔村，行程将自动更改为乘坐大巴车或其它形式游览海岸线城市。

accommodation.text_en:
Four Points by Sheraton Siena or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is located on a quiet hilltop, surrounded by olive trees and gardens, with beautiful surroundings ideal for getting close to nature. The guest rooms are laid with comfortable wooden floors, brightly designed with attractively arranged, stylish interiors; the hotel also has a refined restaurant serving classic Italian, local and Tuscan cuisine at dinner. The hotel's outdoor pool, fitness center and sauna all provide you with an even more relaxing stay.
accommodation.text_zh:
锡耶纳福朋喜来登酒店 或同等4星级酒店
酒店位于安静的山顶，周围环绕着橄榄树和花园，环境优美且适合亲近自然。客房铺设舒适的木质地板， 设计明亮，摆设美观的时尚内装，同时酒店配有精致的餐厅，在晚餐时段供应经典的意大利、当地和托斯卡纳美食。酒店的室外泳池、健身中心以及桑拿浴室都为您提供更加放松的入住体验。

highlights.text_en:
Italy's Beautiful Fishing Villages, an Idyllic Paradise on the Cliffs
Along the long coastline of the Mediterranean, the little train stops at each beautiful fishing village. Watch the sun-bathed beaches, the waves quietly lapping against the rocks, the colorful houses growing nearer from afar; your curiosity to gaze upon the beautiful fishing villages reaches its peak the moment you arrive. Walking on foot through the lanes of the fishing villages, the closer you get the more delightful the surprises. It is like savoring a visual feast of five-colored delicacies, slowly relishing the flavors within — this scene is so beautiful it stirs the heart.
highlights.text_zh:
意大利美丽的渔村，悬崖上的世外桃源
沿地中海的绵长海岸线小火车在每个美丽渔村停靠，眼看被阳光笼罩的沙滩，海浪静静地拍打着岩石，五彩斑斓的房子由远及近，远眺美丽渔村的好奇心在到达的一刻达到高点，徒步行走于渔村的小巷之间，越走近越惊喜。像是细细品味五色美味的视觉盛宴，一点点细品个中滋味，此情此景美好得让人心动。

attractions.text_en: The Cinque Terre is located on the coastal area of the Province of La Spezia in the Liguria region of Italy, built along the winding Mediterranean coastline. It is the collective name for these five cliffside villages: Monterosso al Mare, Vernazza, Corniglia, Manarola and Riomaggiore. What is special is the hiking trail that strings the five villages together; built along the coast, it is one of the most beautiful hiking trails in the world, about 15-20 kilometers and requiring around 5 hours. On one side is the Mediterranean, on the other the mountains, and ahead the Italian fishing villages — it is a destination that countless hiking enthusiasts flock to. In 1997 it was inscribed by UNESCO on the World Cultural Heritage List.
attractions.text_zh: 五渔村位于意大利利古里亚大区(Liguria)拉斯佩齐亚省海沿岸地区，沿着蜿蜒的地中海海岸线而建，是蒙特罗索（Monterosso al Mare）、韦尔纳扎（Vernazza）、科尔尼利亚（Corniglia）、马纳罗拉（Manarola）及里奥马焦雷（Riomaggiore）这五个悬崖边上的村镇的统称。特别的是把五个村庄串起的徒步线路，沿着海岸而建，是世界上美丽的徒步路线，约15-20公里，需5小时左右，一边是地中海，另一边是山脉，而前面则是意大利渔庄，是诸多徒步爱好者趋之若鹜的胜地。1997年被联合国教科文组织列入世界文化遗产名录。

attractions.text_en: The Leaning Tower of Pisa is the freestanding bell tower of the Cathedral of the city of Pisa, Italy. Located on the Piazza dei Miracoli (Square of Miracles) to the north of the city of Pisa in the Tuscany region of Italy, it is a world-famous landmark and one of the symbols of Italy, selected by UNESCO as a World Heritage Site. According to legend, in the year 1590 AD, Galileo performed a free-fall experiment on the Leaning Tower of Pisa and overturned the views of Aristotle.
attractions.text_zh: 比萨斜塔是意大利比萨城大教堂的独立式钟楼，位于意大利托斯卡纳省比萨城北面的奇迹广场上，是世界著名的景观，也是意大利标志之一，被联合国教育科学文化组织评选为世界遗产。相传在公元1590年，伽利略曾经在比萨斜塔上做了一个自由落体实验，并推翻了亚里士多德的观点

attractions.text_en: Also known as the Piazza del Duomo (Cathedral Square), it is a walled area in the center of the city of Pisa in the Tuscany region of Italy, partly laid with grass. The Piazza dei Miracoli is the center of the city of Pisa, and on the square stand four great buildings: the Pisa Cathedral, the Leaning Tower of Pisa (bell tower), the Baptistery of St. John, and the Camposanto (cemetery). Around the square the ancient city walls and gates are still preserved. In April 1987, the International Council on Monuments and Sites nominated the Piazza dei Miracoli of Pisa, Italy (including the cathedral, baptistery, Leaning Tower of Pisa and cemetery) as a World Heritage Site.
attractions.text_zh: 又名主教座堂广场，是意大利托斯卡纳大区比萨市中心一片围墙包围的区域，部分为草地。奇迹广场是比萨城的中心，广场上有四大建筑：比萨主教座堂、比萨斜塔（钟楼）、圣乔瓦尼洗礼堂、比萨墓园。广场周围还保留着古代的城墙和城门。1987年4月，国际古迹遗产理事会提名意大利比萨城的奇迹广场（包括大教堂、洗礼堂、比萨斜塔和墓园）为世界遗产。

overview.text_en: After breakfast, set off for the old town of Siena and tour sights such as Siena Cathedral (exterior), the Piazza del Campo, Siena City Hall (exterior) and the Torre del Mangia (exterior). Then head to the old town of Pienza to visit Piazza Pio II, Pienza Cathedral (exterior), and afterwards proceed to Rome, taking free photos along the Cypress Lane on the way. After arriving in Rome, the wonderful journey comes to an end.
overview.text_zh: 早餐后出发前往锡耶纳古城，游览锡耶纳大教堂（外观），田野广场，锡耶纳市政厅（外观），曼吉亚塔楼（外观）等景点。之后前往皮恩扎古城参观游览二世广场，皮恩扎大教堂（外观），之后前往罗马，途中在丝柏树小径自由拍照，抵达罗马后结束美好旅程。

highlights.text_en:
The Idyllic Scenery of the Val d'Orcia and the Medieval Old Town of Pienza
Close your eyes and you will imagine the classic scenery of Tuscany — blue skies and white clouds, rolling hills dotted with rows of cypress trees and grapevines, and finally wheat fields — this is the perfect portrayal of the Val d'Orcia. From the city walls of the old town of Pienza, look down upon the scenery of the World Heritage Site — the "Val d'Orcia."
highlights.text_zh:
奥尔恰谷田园美景与中世纪古城-皮恩扎
闭上眼睛，你会想象出托斯卡纳的经典景色—蓝天白云，连绵起伏的山丘，点缀着成排的丝柏树和葡萄藤，最后是麦田--这就是Val D'Orcia 的完美写照。从皮恩扎古城的城墙上俯瞰世界遗产-「Val D'orcia奥尔恰山谷」的景致。

attractions.text_en: Siena, this medieval old town, is full of masterpieces by great artists and medieval classical architecture. Wandering through Siena's ancient, crisscrossing cobblestone lanes and the deep, secluded courtyards hidden everywhere, you feel as if you were in medieval Europe of a thousand years ago, and every detail will bring you surprises. Over the centuries, this city has maintained a complete classical appearance, as if time has stood still here since the 14th century. Besides its unique scenery and art collections, Siena also preserves a series of traditions, including the cooking and making of sweets. On your trip to Siena, don't forget to taste the local specialties — almond soft cookies (ricciarelli), nut tart (panforte), peppered spiced nut cake (pan pepato), rice pudding (budini di riso), walnut cookies (cavallucci), or walnut wafers (copate)!
attractions.text_zh: 锡耶纳，这座中世纪古城布满了艺术大师的杰作和中世纪古典建筑，穿梭在锡耶纳古老而纵横交错的石板小巷和隐藏在各处的幽深庭院中，您仿佛置身于千年前的欧洲中世纪，其中的每一处细节都会给您带来惊喜。这座城市在几个世纪以来，一直保持着完整的古典外貌，仿佛时间自十四世纪起便在此停滞。除了它独特的风景和艺术典藏，锡耶纳还保持着一系列的传统，包括甜品的烹饪制作。在您的锡耶纳之行中，别忘了品尝当地的特色- 杏仁软饼ricciarelli、果仁馅饼panforte、胡椒香料果仁糕pan pepato、米饭布丁budini di riso、核桃饼cavallucci、或核桃华夫copate!

attractions.text_en: The Piazza del Campo (also called the Shell Square because of its shell-like shape) is the center of the city of Siena and one of the larger surviving medieval squares in Europe. Directly facing the square are the Siena City Hall and the tower; inside the City Hall is the Civic Museum, which houses numerous paintings of the Sienese school, including Ambrogio Lorenzetti's "Allegory of Good Government" and "Allegory of Bad Government." The tower's full name is the Torre del Mangia; it is the tallest building in Siena and the second-tallest tower in Italy, with a vertical height of 102 meters. Visitors can reach the top via 55 flights of stairs to take in the beautiful scenery of the city of Siena.
attractions.text_zh: 田野广场(因形似贝壳也叫贝壳广场)是锡耶纳城市的中心，是欧洲现存较大的中世纪广场之一，广场正对面是锡耶纳市政厅和塔楼，市政厅内有市立博物馆，里面藏有锡耶纳学派的众多绘画作品，包括AmbrogioLorenzetti的《好政府寓意》和《坏政府寓意》。塔楼全名为曼贾塔TorrediMangia，它是锡耶纳较高的建筑，也是意大利第二高的塔楼，垂直高度达到102米，游客可以通过55层的阶梯达到顶端，一览锡耶纳城的美景。

attractions.text_en: The Torre del Mangia adjoins the City Hall and is the taller tower of medieval Italy. In the mid-14th century, the outbreak of the Black Death in the city claimed nearly two-thirds of the population and dealt a heavy blow to the city's development. After the disaster, the survivors added a marble loggia to the tower to commemorate the Virgin Mary. Inside the tower there are 332 narrow steps in total, and you can climb to the top to take in a view of Siena's scenery.
attractions.text_zh: 曼吉亚塔楼紧邻市政厅，是意大利中世纪较高的塔楼。14世纪中期，城内黑死病的爆发夺走了近2/3的人口，也使城市发展受到巨大打击。灾难过后，幸存者们为塔楼加上一个大理石的凉廊，以此来纪念圣母玛利亚。楼内共有332级狭窄的台阶，可以攀登到顶，一览锡耶纳风光。

attractions.text_en: Pienza is a municipality in the Province of Siena in the Tuscany region of central Italy, adjacent to Montalcino. It is one of the earliest ideal towns of the Renaissance, founded by Pope Pius II; its original purpose at the time of founding was to renovate his impoverished hometown and make it the Pope's summer retreat. In 1996 it was inscribed on the UNESCO World Heritage List. The architecture here is Gothic in style and influenced by the German style. The main square of the town is Piazza Pio II, which contains the principal 15th-century buildings, such as the cathedral (built 1459-1462), the Piccolomini Palace, the Bishop's Palace, and the town hall with its crenellated tower (built 1462).
attractions.text_zh: 皮恩扎（Pienza）是意大利中部托斯卡纳大区锡耶纳省的一个市镇，毗邻蒙塔尔奇诺，它是文艺复兴时期最早的理想小镇，由罗马教皇PiusII创立，当时创立的目的是为了翻新给他贫穷的家乡并把此作为罗马教皇的避暑地。1996年，被列入联合国世界遗产名录。这里的建筑呈哥特风，并受德式风格的影响。小镇的主要广场是PiazzaPioII，广场里包含15世纪的主要建筑，如教堂（建于1459-1462）、皮科洛米尼宫（PiccolominiPalace、主教宫、带有锯齿形塔的大会堂（建于1462）。

attractions.text_en: The winding Cypress Lane, a country road lined on both sides with Italian cypresses, with its uniquely shaped curves and neatly arranged cypress trees, has become one of the symbols of Tuscany's idyllic scenery. The cypresses on both sides of the road cast mottled shadows under the sunlight, creating a tranquil and poetic atmosphere that attracts countless photography enthusiasts and tourists to come and take pictures.
attractions.text_zh: 蜿蜒曲折丝柏树小径、两旁种满意大利柏树的乡村道路，独特造型的弯道和整齐排列的丝柏树，成为托斯卡纳田园风光的象征之一。道路两侧的柏树在阳光的照射下投下斑驳的影子，营造出一种宁静而诗意的氛围，吸引了无数摄影爱好者和游客前来打卡。

attractions.text_en: The Val d'Orcia was inscribed on the UNESCO World Heritage List in 2004. Tuscany's Val d'Orcia is famous for its postcard-perfect scenery and hill towns; it is a unique meeting of art and nature, holding rich historical imprints. Its natural landscape was redesigned during the Renaissance, embodying the Italian city-states' ideal of "good government."
attractions.text_zh: 奥尔恰山谷，2004年被列入联合国教科文组织世界遗产名录。托斯卡纳的 Val d'Orcia 以其明信片般的完美风景和山城而闻名，这里是艺术与自然的独特交汇，蕴藏着丰富的历史印记，其自然景观在文艺复兴时期经过重新设计，体现了意大利城邦“良政”的理念。

overview.text_zh:
上午参观法兰西引以为傲的卢浮宫博物馆，届时、将由法兰西国家馆讲解师，精选主题深度讲解；
下午前往游览巴黎圣母院、西岱岛，埃菲尔铁塔（外观）以及战神广场，之后乘坐塞纳河游船游览荣军院（外观）、大小皇宫（外观）、协和广场等地，全天游览巴黎市中心景点。
夜宿：巴黎美居酒店或诺富特酒店或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Mercure Paris Hotel or Novotel Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The Mercure Paris Hotel or Novotel Hotel is a comfort-class business hotel under the Accor group. The hotel is located in the safer southern part of Paris, in a convenient location for getting around. Whether you are on a business trip or a leisure journey, it offers you a comfortable lodging experience, stemming from its distinctive brand characteristics: more than 700 hotels worldwide, professional and rigorous quality control, a distinctive hotel style deeply rooted in local character, and an enthusiastic management team.
accommodation.text_zh:
巴黎美居酒店或诺富特酒店或同等4星级酒店
巴黎美居酒店或诺富特酒店是雅高旗下的舒适型商务酒店，酒店位于更为安全的巴黎南部，地理位置方便出行，无论您是商务出差还是休闲之旅，都为您提供舒适的住宿体验，源于独特的品牌特征：全球超过700家酒店，专业严谨的质量监控，深得当地特色的独特酒店风格以及具有热情的管理团队。

highlights.text_en:
Take a Seine River cruise and feel the gentleness and romance of Paris
Board the famous glass-cabin "Bateaux Mouches" cruise boat sailing along the banks of the Seine, which weaves together many attractions. On the roughly 1-hour, 3.2-kilometer voyage you pass famous sites such as Notre-Dame de Paris, the Grand and Petit Palais, the Pont Alexandre III, the Paris love-lock bridge, the Louvre, the Champs-Élysées and Paris's Île de la Cité. On the surface of the Seine you take in the romantic night views of Paris, the beautiful scenery and the wonderful music. It is hailed as "the in-depth tour of Paris not to be missed."
highlights.text_zh:
乘塞纳河游船，感受巴黎的温柔与浪漫
乘坐著名的透明船舱的“苍蝇船”游船航行在融合诸多景点的塞纳河畔，3.2公里约1小时的航程途径巴黎圣母院，大小皇宫、亚历山大三世大桥，巴黎锁桥，卢浮宫、香榭丽舍大道巴黎西岱岛等著名景点，在塞纳河面上感受巴黎浪漫夜色，美景及美妙的音乐，被称为《巴黎不可错过的深度游览项目》。

attractions.text_en: If the Louvre bears witness to the glory of the Gauls, then the Île de la Cité, Notre-Dame de Paris and the Paris City Hall record the inseparable bond with the Romans who conquered them. Without the Romans, there would be no Île de la Cité. Without the Île de la Cité, there would be no Paris as it is today.
attractions.text_zh: 如果说卢浮宫见证了高卢人的荣耀，那西岱岛，巴黎圣母院和巴黎市政厅则写下了与征服她们的罗马人的不解之缘。如果没有罗马人，就没有西岱岛。没有西岱岛，就没有现在的巴黎。

attractions.text_en: The Cathedral of Notre-Dame de Paris stands on the Île de la Cité in the center of Paris and is the cathedral seat of the Catholic Archdiocese of Paris. The church is in the Gothic style, and visitors can climb the towers. Although you will not meet the "Hunchback of Notre-Dame," you can see the great bell from the 17th century, get up close to the mythical beasts on the church's outer walls, and look down upon the beautiful scenery of the Île de la Cité and the Seine.
attractions.text_zh: 巴黎圣母院大教堂坐落于巴黎市中心的西堤岛上，是天主教巴黎总教区的主教座堂。教堂为哥特式风格，游客可以登上塔楼参观，虽然遇不到“钟楼怪人”，但却能看到17世纪的大钟、近距离接触教堂外壁上的神兽、俯瞰西岱岛与塞纳河的美丽风光。

attractions.text_en: It is one of the oldest museums in the world and a world-renowned treasure house of art. The Louvre building is in the shape of a "U" and is divided into a new part and an old part. The entrance at the glass pyramid in front of the Louvre was designed by the Chinese-American master architect I. M. Pei. Here are housed more than 400,000 art treasures, of which about 35,000 are on long-term display, encompassing artworks from ancient Egypt, Greece, Etruria and Rome to medieval Europe and the various countries of the East. It can be called an outstanding palace of art in human history. The itinerary includes the ordinary individual-visitor ticket (without a Chinese-language audio guide).
attractions.text_zh: 是世界上古老的博物馆之一，是一座举世闻名的艺术宝库。卢浮宫建筑呈“U”形，分别为新、旧两个部分。卢浮宫前玻璃金字塔的入口是华裔建筑大师贝聿铭所设计。在这里珍藏着40余万件艺术珍品，其中长期展出约3.5万件，囊括了古埃及、希腊、伊特鲁里亚、罗马到欧洲中世纪和东方各国的艺术品，堪称人类历史上杰出的艺术殿堂。 行程包含普通散客门票（无中文讲解器）。

attractions.text_en:
The Champ de Mars is a large strip-shaped park located in the 7th arrondissement of Paris, France, lying between the Eiffel Tower to its northwest and the École Militaire (Paris Military School) to its southeast.
Until the second half of the 18th century, this was an abandoned open space. It was not until the Military School was established in 1765 that its standing gradually rose, when its main purpose was to serve as a place for military training. During the French Revolution, on 17 July 1791, a massacre and bloodshed once occurred here. Later, France used this venue to host several World's Fairs as well as the 1900 Olympic Games.
attractions.text_zh:
战神广场是一个座落于法国巴黎七区的广大带状公园，介于位在其西北方的埃菲尔铁塔、以及在其东南方的巴黎军校之间。
在十八世纪下半叶之前，这是一块被遗弃的空地，直到军事学校在1765年建立，它的地位才逐渐提升，当时主要的目的是用来作为军事训练的场所。在法国大革命时期的1791年7月17日，此处曾发生屠杀流血事件。后来法国曾经使用这个场地迎接过几次的世界博览会以及1900年的奥林匹克运动会。

attractions.text_en: The Eiffel Tower is one of the symbols of Paris, affectionately called the "Iron Lady" by the French. If Notre-Dame de Paris is the symbol of ancient Paris, then the Eiffel Tower is the symbol of modern Paris.
attractions.text_zh: 埃菲尔铁塔是巴黎的标志之一，被法国人爱称为“铁娘子”。如果说，巴黎圣母院是古代巴黎的象征，那么埃菲尔铁塔就是现代巴黎的标志。

attractions.text_en: Board the famous glass-cabin "Bateaux Mouches" cruise boat sailing along the banks of the Seine, which weaves together many attractions. On the roughly 1-hour, 3.2-kilometer voyage you pass famous sites such as Notre-Dame de Paris, the Grand and Petit Palais, the Pont Alexandre III, the Paris love-lock bridge, the Louvre, the Champs-Élysées and Paris's Île de la Cité. On the surface of the Seine you take in the romantic night views of Paris, the beautiful scenery and the wonderful music. It is hailed as "the in-depth tour of Paris not to be missed."
attractions.text_zh: 乘坐著名的透明船舱的“苍蝇船”游船航行在融合诸多景点的塞纳河畔，3.2公里约1小时的航程途径巴黎圣母院，大小皇宫、亚历山大三世大桥，巴黎锁桥，卢浮宫、香榭丽舍大道巴黎西岱岛等著名景点，在塞纳河面上感受巴黎浪漫夜色，美景及美妙的音乐，被称为《巴黎不可错过的深度游览项目》。

overview.text_zh:
上午前往巴黎时尚中心奥斯曼大街和皇家大道，自由参观巴黎歌剧院（外观）及春天百货，巴黎老佛爷等时尚街区；
下午前往位于巴黎西南部郊区的凡尔赛宫，游览凡尔赛宫；之后返回酒店。
夜宿：巴黎美居酒店或诺富特酒店或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Mercure Paris Hotel or Novotel Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The Mercure Paris Hotel or Novotel Hotel is a comfort-class business hotel under the Accor group. The hotel is located in the safer southern part of Paris, in a convenient location for getting around. Whether you are on a business trip or a leisure journey, it offers you a comfortable lodging experience, stemming from its distinctive brand characteristics: more than 700 hotels worldwide, professional and rigorous quality control, a distinctive hotel style deeply rooted in local character, and an enthusiastic management team.
accommodation.text_zh:
巴黎美居酒店或诺富特酒店或同等4星级酒店
巴黎美居酒店或诺富特酒店是雅高旗下的舒适型商务酒店，酒店位于更为安全的巴黎南部，地理位置方便出行，无论您是商务出差还是休闲之旅，都为您提供舒适的住宿体验，源于独特的品牌特征：全球超过700家酒店，专业严谨的质量监控，深得当地特色的独特酒店风格以及具有热情的管理团队。

highlights.text_en:
Boulevard Haussmann in Paris
Boulevard Haussmann is a core area of Paris. Here there are magnificent Haussmann-style building complexes and a bustling commercial atmosphere, as well as a rich artistic flavor: Galeries Lafayette and Printemps de Paris, the Paris Opera, the Hôtel de la Paix, the Louvre Pyramid, the Sainte-Anne gourmet district. Here you can stroll and feel the commercial vibe of Paris, walking along Boulevard Haussmann and enjoying the delight of fine food, art and shopping.
highlights.text_zh:
巴黎奥斯曼大街
奥斯曼大街是巴黎的核心区域，这里有华丽的奥斯曼建筑群和繁华的商业氛围，以及浓郁艺术气息，老佛爷及巴黎春天，巴黎歌剧院，和平酒店、罗浮宫金字塔，圣安娜美食区，在这里可以漫步感受巴黎的商业气息，穿行在奥斯曼大街上，享受美食艺术和购物的欣喜。

attractions.text_en: The Palace of Versailles has always been a magnificent monument of the period of France's feudal rule. In terms of content it was not only the French court, but also the administrative center of the nation, and a concrete embodiment of the political views and way of life of French society at that time. It represented the power of an absolutist regime able to concentrate such enormous manpower, material resources and finances—the like of which had not been seen in Europe since the ancient Roman Empire. At that time, in order to build it, Louis XIV mobilized more than thirty thousand workers as well as architects, engineers and technicians. Besides solving the complex technical problems arising from constructing a large-scale building complex, they also had to solve various problems such as water supply and roads. It can thus be seen that the success of the Palace of Versailles powerfully attests to the progress of France's economy and technology at that time and to the wisdom of the laboring people.
attractions.text_zh: 凡尔赛宫始终是法国封建统治历史时期的一座华丽的纪念碑。从内容上讲不仅是法兰西宫廷，而且是国家的行政中心，也是当时法国社会政治观点、生活方式的具体体现。它是欧洲自古罗马帝国以来表现出能够集中如此巨大的人力、物力、财力的专制政体力量。当时，路易十四为了建造它，共动用了三万余名工人和建筑师、工程师、技师，除了要解决建造大规模建筑群所产生的复杂技术问题外，还要解决引水、道路等各方面的问题。可见，凡尔赛宫的成功，有力地证明了当时法国经济和技术的进步和劳动人民的智慧。

attractions.text_en: Boulevard Haussmann is located between the 8th and 9th arrondissements of Paris. On the street are the two major department stores of Paris, Galeries Lafayette and Printemps. Marcel Proust, the author of "In Search of Lost Time," once completed most of the writing of "In Search of Lost Time" in his residence at No. 102 on this street.
attractions.text_zh: 奥斯曼大街位于巴黎第八区和第九区之间。街上有巴黎老佛爷百货公司和春天百货两大百货公司。《追忆似水年华》的作者马塞尔·普鲁斯特曾在这条街102号的居所里，完成了《追忆似水年华》的大部分写作。

attractions.text_en:
Paris Opera [exterior]
The opera house was designed by Charles Garnier in 1861. Its architecture perfectly combines several architectural forms such as the ancient Greek and Roman colonnade and the Baroque. Grand in scale, exquisite and meticulous, splendid and resplendent, it is hailed as a theater where painting, marble and gilded ornamentation set each other off brilliantly, giving people great enjoyment. It is one of the typical buildings of Napoleon III.
attractions.text_zh:
巴黎歌剧院 【外观】
剧院是由查尔斯·加尼叶于1861年设计的，其建筑将古希腊罗马式柱廊、巴洛克等几种建筑形式完美地结合在一起，规模宏大，精美细致，金碧辉煌，被誉为是一座绘画、大理石和金饰交相辉映的剧院，给人以极大的享受。是拿破仑三世典型的建筑之一。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, set off for Geneva, the capital of the French-speaking region of Switzerland. After arriving, tour the Old Town of Geneva, the Lake Geneva area, the Flower Clock and the Jet d'Eau fountain, and tour the "Flower Bridge" (Pont des Bergues) area, gathering all kinds of local delicacies and specialty shops of Geneva. Afterward, check in at the Novotel Geneva Centre at Annemasse.
Overnight: Novotel Annemasse Centre Porte de Genève or Crowne Plaza or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
上午出发前往瑞士法语区首府日内瓦，到达后游览日内瓦老城，日内瓦湖区，花钟和大喷泉景点，游览云集日内瓦各种当地美食和特色商店“花桥”区域。随后入住安纳马斯日内瓦港诺富特酒店。
夜宿：安娜玛斯日内瓦港诺富特酒店或皇冠假日酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Novotel Annemasse Centre Porte de Genève or Crowne Plaza or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The Novotel hotel opened in 2020 and is a comfort-class business hotel under the Accor group. The hotel's decor is in harmony with its natural surroundings. Inspired by New York's innovative hotel concept, it includes a café and bakery area open to both hotel guests and the public. The hotel has a restaurant offering healthy seasonal cuisine. At the Rooftop 46 bar on the 8th floor of the hotel, enjoy happy hour overlooking the Alps and the Jura Mountains.
accommodation.text_zh:
安娜玛斯日内瓦港诺富特酒店或皇冠假日酒店 或同等4星级酒店
诺富特酒店于2020年开业，是雅高旗下的舒适型商务酒店，酒店的装饰与其自然环境相协调。受到纽约创新酒店概念的启发，它包括一个向酒店客人和公众开放的咖啡厅和面包店区。酒店设有一间餐厅，提供健康的时令美食。在酒店8 层的 Rooftop 46 酒吧俯瞰阿尔卑斯山和侏罗山脉，享受快乐时光。

highlights.text_en:
The old town of Geneva
The upper town on the shore of Lake Geneva, with the beautiful scenery of Lake Geneva and the majestic Alps, forms a poetic, idyllic landscape. The graceful scenery of the two countries' borders continually changes and interlaces along Lake Geneva—on one side is Évian and Annemasse in France, and on the other side is the old town of Geneva. The entire lake area is listed as a World Heritage Site, with one human heritage site after another, as well as remarkably well-preserved little medieval towns. The roads are inlaid with stone slabs, and every small town and small city has several fountains. Traditional house architecture and modern, novel shops interweave into one wonderful, exquisite experience after another.
highlights.text_zh:
日内瓦古城区
日内瓦湖畔的上城区，风光旖旎的日内瓦湖和雄伟的阿尔卑斯山，构成的诗意田园风光，两国国境秀丽风景沿日内瓦湖不断变化交错、一边是法国依云安娜玛斯一边是日内瓦的旧城，整个湖区被列为世界遗产，一座又一座的人类遗产以及保护得十分完好的中世纪小城，路上镶嵌着一块块的石板，每个小镇、小城都就有多处喷泉。传统的房屋建筑和摩登新颖的店家，交织成一处处美轮美奂的奇妙体验。

attractions.text_en: Lake Geneva, also known as Lake Léman, straddles Switzerland and France. It is an important lake in Western Europe and a famous scenic area and health resort. During the day you can take a cruise boat to tour Lake Geneva, and at night be intoxicated by the flickering neon lights on the shore. There are also often luxury cruise ships holding concerts or balls on the lake. You can take a cruise boat to appreciate the beautiful scenery along the shores of Lake Geneva, watching the lake water, snow-capped mountains and blue sky merge into one.
attractions.text_zh: 日内瓦湖又名莱芒湖，横跨瑞士和法国，是西欧的重要湖泊，也是著名的风景区和疗养地。白天你可以乘坐游船游览日内瓦湖，晚上陶醉于岸边闪烁的霓虹，还时常有豪华游轮在湖面上举办音乐会或舞会。可乘坐游船领略日内瓦湖岸边美景，看湖水、雪山和蓝天连成一片。

attractions.text_en: The Jet d'Eau is located on the surface of Lake Geneva near the English Garden and is one of the more representative sights of Geneva. The great fountain is like a column of water spouted by a whale, 140 meters high with a water flow of 500 liters; its spectacular sight can be seen from far away in the city center. At night you may also have the chance to see the great fountain under floodlighting, which is even more magnificent.
attractions.text_zh: 大喷泉位于英国花园附近的日内瓦湖面上，是日内瓦比较具有代表性的景观之一。大喷泉宛若鲸鱼喷出的水柱，有140米高、500公升喷水量，其壮观景象从市中心很远就能看见。夜晚时还有机会看到灯光照明下的大喷泉，更是宏伟。

attractions.text_en: The Flower Clock is a famous attraction in Geneva. Switzerland is known as the "Garden Nation" and at the same time the "Land of Watches and Clocks." What is even more wonderful is that Switzerland's skilled craftsmen ingeniously combined the beauty of flowers perfectly with the craftsmanship of watchmaking, creatively producing the "Flower Clock."
attractions.text_zh: 花钟是日内瓦著名景点。瑞士号称“花园之国”，同时又是“钟表之乡”，而更奇妙的是瑞士的能工巧匠绝妙地将花卉之美同钟表的制造工艺完美地结合起来，别出心裁地创造出了“花钟”。

attractions.text_en: The upper town on the hillside on the right bank of the Rhône, because of its higher terrain, is also called the upper town by local residents. Here it is not only a gathering place of churches and historic sites; among the winding small alleys there are also many small, lovely antique shops. The former residence of Rousseau, the thinker of the European Enlightenment era, is also located within the old town.
attractions.text_zh: 在隆河右岸山坡上的上城区，因为地势较高的缘故，当地的居民又称之为上城。这里不但是教堂、古迹的聚集地，在蜿蜒的小巷弄间还有许多小巧可爱的古董商店，欧洲启蒙时代的思想家卢梭的故居也位于旧城区内。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, head to Interlaken, located in the center between Lake Brienz and Lake Thun, which are known as "God's left eye and right eye." You can freely tour Höheweg street and Höhematte, the tranquil villages, shaded by green trees and dotted among the mountains and waters, where man and nature blend as one; or take the coach to Jungfrau region attractions such as Grindelwald and Wilderswil; or, at your own expense, take the panoramic cable car to the summit of the Jungfrau—Top of Europe, the higher railway station in Europe—and go to the "Sphinx Observation Deck" and the Aletsch Glacier; or, at your own expense, go to the Swiss alpine adventure town of First and tour the Cliff Walk peak trail.
Overnight: Sigriswil Snow Mountain Lake View Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
上午前往有“上帝左眼与右眼”之称的布里恩茨湖和图恩湖中央的因特拉肯，可自由游览何维克街，荷黑马特，宁静的村庄，绿树掩映，点缀在山水之间，人与自然浑然一体；或者随车前往格林德尔瓦尔德及维尔德斯维尔等少女峰山区景点，或者自费乘坐全景缆车登顶少女峰——Top of Europe欧洲较高的火车站，前往“斯芬克斯观景台”及阿莱奇冰川；或者自费前往瑞士高山探险小镇菲斯特，游览悬崖天梭巅峰栈道。
夜宿：锡格里斯维尔雪山湖景酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Sigriswil Snow Mountain Lake View Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is located in a mountain gorge beside the panoramic bridge of Sigriswil. All the guest rooms are decorated in an elegant Swiss country style, and the hotel's views satisfy one's imagination of Switzerland; the guest rooms enjoy views of Lake Thun or the surrounding mountains or the Sigriswil village scenery. Sitting in the hotel's restaurant and gazing into the distance at the emerald-green waters of Lake Thun and the snow-capped mountains tranquilly reflected in it, it is as if you are within a painting, allowing you to fully appreciate Switzerland's idyllic, paradise-like beautiful scenery.
accommodation.text_zh:
锡格里斯维尔雪山湖景酒店 或同等4星级酒店
酒店位于锡格里斯维尔（Sigriswil）全景桥旁边的山涧，所有的客房装饰为瑞士乡村典雅风格，酒店景观满足对瑞士的想象，客房客房享有图恩湖或周围群山或锡格里斯维尔村景致。坐在酒店的餐厅远眺碧绿的图恩湖水，宁静地倒影的雪山，恍然如画中，让人尽情欣赏瑞士世外桃源般的美好景致。

highlights.text_en:
The Jungfrau region
As a famous, iconic tourist destination of Switzerland, the Jungfrau is not a single snow mountain, but a series of different Swiss scenic combinations surrounding the Jungfrau and Interlaken, including many different snow-mountain experiences, which together create the splendid and rich tourist scenic areas of Switzerland's Jungfrau, First, Grindelwald and so on. The Jungfrau summit panoramic cable car lets you experience all kinds of different things. First's Cliff Adventure Park, as the originator of aerial-adventure-type tourism projects, and the high-altitude paragliding not only adorn the snow mountains but also bring many thrilling activities to the younger crowd.
highlights.text_zh:
少女峰地区
作为瑞士著名的代表性旅游胜地，少女峰不是座雪山，而是围绕着少女峰、因特拉肯的一系列不同的瑞士风景组合，包含多种不同的雪山体验，成就了 精彩而丰富的瑞士少女峰 、 菲斯特，格兰维尔德等景点旅游景区。 少女峰登顶景观缆车，可以感受各种不同的体验。菲斯特空天冒险乐园，作为空天探险类旅游项目的始祖，而高空滑翔伞不仅仅装饰了雪山，还给年前群体带来了许多的刺激活动。

attractions.text_en: Höhematte is a green meadow square in the center of Interlaken, the famous Swiss sightseeing town. This green expanse was once the garden of a monastery; now the construction of any buildings on it is forbidden in order to prevent the destruction of this beautiful landscape. This is a good place from which to gaze at the Jungfrau. On the vast green expanse there are fountains and it is also dotted with many benches, so it is also a good place for a walk. Höhematte is also the landing place for hang-gliding/paragliding; there is a reception point on the edge of the lawn, and after payment staff will take visitors to the nearby mountains for free gliding, where you can appreciate the beautiful scenery of Interlaken from high in the air.
attractions.text_zh: 荷黑马特是瑞士著名的观光小镇因特拉肯镇中心的绿地广场，这片绿地是昔日修道院的庭园，现在则禁止兴建任何建筑物，以防止破坏这片美丽的景观。这里是眺望少女峰好的场所，辽阔的绿地上建有喷泉，还点缀着很多凉椅，所以也是散步的好地方。荷黑马特还是滑翔翼的降落地，草坪边上有接待点，付费后会有工作人员把游客带到附近山上进行自由滑翔，可在高空欣赏到因特拉肯的美景。

attractions.text_en: Located at the northern foot of the Eiger, Grindelwald is home to the famous postcard photography spot of Switzerland's "dreamy hillside," a favorite in the hearts of photographers, and is also an Alpine town through which one must pass when touring the Jungfrau. Together with First, the Jungfrau, Wengen and others, it forms the more magnificent and beautiful scenic line of the Jungfrau region. In winter it is a famous snow-viewing resort, and in summer it is a paradise for hiking enthusiasts; the lakeside, green grass, waterfalls, dairy cows and snow-capped mountains together make up this fascinating town.
attractions.text_zh: 位于艾格峰(Eiger)的北麓脚下的格林德尔瓦尔德(Grindelwald) ，这里有摄影家心头较为喜爱的瑞士“梦幻山坡”著名明信片拍摄地，也是游览少女峰必经的阿尔卑斯小镇，同菲斯特(First)、少女峰(Jungfrau)、翁根(Wengen)、等一起组成了少女峰地区较为壮阔美丽的风景线。冬季是著名的观雪胜地，夏季又是徒步爱好者的天堂，湖畔、绿草青地、瀑布、奶牛、雪山共同构成让这座让人着迷的小镇。

attractions.text_en: Grindelwald-First attracts visitors from all directions who come to admire the magnificent scenery of the north face of the Eiger. Standing on the famous First Cliff Walk peak trail, anyone will immediately feel that they are standing on the summit of the world. The Cliff Walk peak trail is located at the summit of First, where you can take in a unique panorama of the Bernese Alps.
attractions.text_zh: 格林德瓦菲斯特吸引四面八方的游客前来欣赏艾格峰北坡的壮丽风光。站在著名的菲斯特悬崖天梭巅峰栈道，任何人都会立刻感到自己站在世界之巅。悬崖天梭巅峰栈道位于菲斯特峰顶，可以一览伯尔尼兹阿尔卑斯山的独特全景。

attractions.text_en: The Jungfrau is located twenty or thirty kilometers south of Interlaken, at an altitude of 4,158 meters, and is one of the higher peaks of the Alps. The summit is covered by ice and snow all year round, while at the foot of the mountain there is lush green grass and beautiful scenery; it is a well-known sightseeing and outdoor-sports resort in Switzerland. The Jungfrau region was listed as a World Natural Heritage Site in 2001.
attractions.text_zh: 少女峰位于因特拉肯以南二三十公里处，海拔 4158 米，是阿尔卑斯山脉的较高的山峰之一。山顶常年被冰雪覆盖，而山下却绿草茵茵、风景秀丽，是瑞士有名的观光及户外运动胜地。少女峰地区已于 2001 年被列为世界自然遗产。

overview.text_en:
In the morning, head to the town of Lauterbrunnen and tour Lake Lauterbrunnen and the town scenery. Afterward, go to Lucerne and tour the scenery of Lake Lucerne, listen to the Lion Monument recount that period of Swiss history of loyalty and steadfastness, as well as the Chapel Bridge (Kapellbrücke) and the octagonal water tower and other attractions. Then head to Zurich.
Overnight: Zurich Limmattal Haus zum Hirschen Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
overview.text_zh:
上午前往龙疆小镇，游览龙疆湖及小镇风光。之后前往卢塞恩，游览卢塞恩湖的湖光山色，听狮子纪念碑讲述瑞士人忠贞坚毅的那段历史，以及卡贝尔廊桥和八角型水塔等景点。之后前往苏黎世。
夜宿：苏黎世利马塔尔哈利之家酒店 或同等4星级酒店

accommodation.text_en:
Zurich Limmattal Haus zum Hirschen Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel
The hotel is located in the picturesque heart of the Limmattal, a modern urban residence next to Switzerland's larger shopping center. The hotel is equipped with a bar; the guest rooms are spacious and tidy, with beautiful parquet floors and modern furniture, large wardrobes and many small ideas that make life easier. The hotel offers various buffet or continental breakfasts. The verdant valley, rolling hills and winding Limmat River around the hotel provide you with a comfortable, natural stay experience.
accommodation.text_zh:
苏黎世利马塔尔哈利之家酒店 或同等4星级酒店
酒店坐落在风景秀丽的利马塔尔中心地带，现代化的城市住宅，紧邻瑞士较大的购物中心，酒店配备酒吧，客房宽敞整洁，拥有漂亮的镶木地板和现代家具、大衣柜和许多让生活更轻松的小创意。酒店提供各类自助或欧陆式早餐。酒店周边绿意盎然的山谷、连绵起伏的丘陵和蜿蜒的利马特河，为您提供舒适自然的入住体验。

highlights.text_en:
The town of Lauterbrunnen beneath the snow mountains
As the filming location for the happy-reunion ending of "Crash Landing on You," where the leading man and woman of the drama spent "the happiest two weeks of the year," the protagonists' paradise that is sweet to the point of cloying, the transcendent beautiful scenery of Lake Lauterbrunnen, seems tailor-made for the drama. The heavenly lakes and mountains, the unfiltered beauty of Lake Lauterbrunnen—if there is a paradise on earth, it must be in Lauterbrunnen; serene, peaceful years are nothing more than this.
highlights.text_zh:
雪山下的龙疆小镇
作为“爱的迫降”大团圆结局的取景地，剧中男女主角“一年中幸福的两周”都在这里度过，主角甜到齁的世外桃源，超然于世的龙疆湖美景，就像是为该剧量身定做的。人间天堂般的湖光山色，无滤镜的龙疆湖美景，如果有世外桃源，那一定在龙疆，岁月静好也不过如此。

attractions.text_en: Located between Lucerne and Interlaken, the famous GoldenPass Express passes through here. Here it is surrounded by mountains, with lush green grass, and quaint villages scattered along the shores of Lake Lauterbrunnen, truly a paradise far from the hustle and bustle of the world.
attractions.text_zh: 地处卢塞恩与因特拉肯之间，著名的金色山口快车就会从这里经过。这里群山环抱，绿草茵茵，古朴的村庄散落于龙疆湖畔，俨然一座远离尘嚣的世外桃源。

attractions.text_en:
Lake Lucerne
This lake has a winding, twisting shape, and together with the surrounding mountains forms typical "lake and mountain" scenery, attracting large numbers of tourists who come to sightsee. The music critic Ludwig Rellstab once described the hazy atmosphere of the first movement of Beethoven's "Piano Sonata No. 14" as the moonlight on Lake Lucerne, and so this piece acquired the title "Moonlight"—although this was not Beethoven's own intention.
attractions.text_zh:
卢塞恩湖
这座湖泊形状曲折，和周边的群山构成了典型的“湖光山色”景致，吸引了大量游客前来观光。音乐评论家雷尔斯塔布(Ludwig Rellstab)曾将贝多芬《第14钢琴奏鸣曲》的第1乐章的朦胧气氛形容为卢塞恩湖的月色，这首曲子因此得到了《月光》这个标题——虽然这并非贝多芬的本意。

attractions.text_en: Lucerne is located in central Switzerland and belongs to the German-speaking region of Switzerland. Nestled between mountains and water, Lucerne has the beauty unique to the Middle Ages: medieval churches and towers, Renaissance palaces and mansions, as well as century-old shops, long streets and ancient lanes can be seen everywhere.
